2.name: Fireball Pierce Chance And Increased Mana Cost
2.description: Fireball now pierces enemies (continue through targets it hits), but costs more mana.

3.name: Fireball Fire Penetration
3.description: Fireball hits have additional fire penetration and lightning penetration.

4.name: Fireball Fire Crit Chance
4.description: Improves Fireball's base critical strike chance.

6.name: Fireball Projectile Speed And Damage
6.description: Fireball deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and travels faster, causing it to travel farther.

8.name: Fireball Crit Chance Reduced Cast Speed
8.description: Improves Fireball's base critical strike chance, but reduces its cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Fireball Added Projectiles Two Allocable
9.description: Fireball releases additional projectiles that fire in a cone when cast, but costs more mana.

12.name: Fireball Extra Projectile After Sequence Node
12.description: Fireball releases additional projectiles. These additional projectiles are NOT reduced by the extra projectiles penalty via the {Embers} node.

13.name: Fireball Ignite Chance
13.description: Fireball hits have a higher chance to ignite enemies.

14.name: Fireball Spreading Flames Chance
14.description:
Fireball hits have a chance to apply {Spreading Flames}, an ailment which deals fire damage over time and spreads to nearby enemies.

Additionally all damage over time ailments applied by Fireball deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifier).

15.name: Fireball Spreading Flames Damage
15.description: {Spreading Flames} applied by fireball has additional fire penetration

16.name: Fireball Crit Chance Against Ignited
16.description: Fireball hits have more critical strike chance against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Fireball Cast Speed
17.description: Fireball has increased cast speed.

18.name: Fireball Shred Fire Protection On Hit
18.description: Fireball hits have a chance to reduce enemy fire resistance.

21.name: Fireball Flame Burst After 1 Fewer Hits
21.description: Flame Burst requires fewer hits with Fireball to trigger.

22.name: Fireball Mana Cost And Damage
22.description: Fireball deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana.

25.name: Fireball Pierce Vs Mana Drain
25.description: Fireballs have a chance to pierce enemies (continue through targets it hits), but {Flamethrower} costs more mana per second to channel.

26.name: Fireball Reduced Mana Drain
26.description: {Flamethrower} costs less mana per second to channel.

27.name: Fireball Protection While Channelling
27.description: You have additional Armor and Fire Resistance while channeling Fireball's {Flamethrower}.

28.name: Fireball Increased Duration
28.description: Fireballs last longer, causing them to travel further.

7.name: Fireball Added Projectiles One Allocable
7.description: Fireball releases additional projectiles that fire in a cone when cast, but costs more mana.

10.name: Fireball Converts Crit Chance
10.description: Nodes on this tree that add crit chance instead increase stun chance by 20 times the stated value.

11.name: Fireball Projectiles In Sequence
11.description: Fireballs fire in sequence in the same direction and can now hit the same target, but Fireball releases fewer projectiles and has less cast speed for each extra projectile (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Fireball Homing
19.description: Fireballs now seek nearby targets.

20.name: Fireball Flame Burst After 5 Hits
20.description: Hitting the same enemy with several fireballs triggers a {Flame Burst} around them.

23.name: Fireball Zero Cost
23.description: Fireball has increased cast speed and deals more damage for each extra projectile (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer fires extra projectiles.

24.name: Fireball Flamethrower
24.description: Fireball becomes a channelled ability that rapidly spews fireballs from your hand, but rapidly drains your mana. You do not regenerate mana while channelling.

5.name: Fireball Added Lightning Damage
5.description:
Half of Fireball's base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this portion of its damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Fireball gains a {Lightning} tag.

Fireball also gains additional critical strike multiplier.

2.name: Nova Skill Tree Ice Nova
2.description: Enables {Ice Nova}, which has a freeze rate of 40. Elemental Nova hits deal more (multiplicative with other modifiers) damage.

3.name: Nova Skill Tree Chill Chance
3.description: Elemental Nova has a chance to chill enemies and an increased chance to freeze enemies.

5.name: Nova Skill Tree Increased Damage
5.description: Elemental Nova deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Elemental Nova costs more mana.

6.name: Nova Skill Tree Chance To Gain Ward On Hit
6.description: Elemental Nova hits have a chance to grant ward.

7.name: Nova Skill Tree Increased Ward Gained
7.description: The {Protective Strikes} and {Survival of the Victor} nodes on this tree grant more ward.

8.name: Nova Skill Tree Lightning Nova
8.description: Enables {Lightning Nova}, which has +1% critical strike chance compared to other Elemental Nova types. Elemental Nova hits deal more (multiplicative with other modifiers) damage.

9.name: Nova Skill Tree Crit Chance
9.description: Elemental Nova hits have an increased critical strike chance.

10.name: Nova Skill Tree Chance To Gain Ward On Kill
10.description: Elemental Nova kills have a chance to grant ward.

11.name: Nova Skill Tree Ward Retention
11.description: You have more ward retention for 4 seconds after killing an enemy with Elemental Nova. You may have only one instance of this buff at once.

12.name: Nova Skill Tree Fire Nova
12.description: Enables {Fire Nova}, which deals 8% more hit damage than other Elemental Nova types. All Elemental Nova hits deal more (multiplicative with other modifiers) damage.

13.name: Nova Elemental Penetration
13.description: Elemental Nova hits penetrate enemy elemental resistances.

14.name: Nova Skill Tree Cast Speed
14.description: Elemental Nova hits deal more damage against enemies that are at high health (multiplicative with other modifiers). Elemental Nova has increased cast speed.

17.name: Nova Skill Tree Cooldown Recovery
17.description: Elemental Nova has a shorter cooldown.

18.name: Nova Skill Tree Spark Charge
18.description:
Elemental Nova hits have a chance to attach a {Spark Charge}, which deals lightning damage to nearby enemies after 1 second or when the enemy dies.

Additionally, Elemental Nova deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Nova Skill Tree Ignite Chance
19.description: Elemental Nova hits have a chance to Ignite enemies.

20.name: Nova Skill Tree Extra Charge
20.description: You can store an additional charge of Elemental Nova.

21.name: Nova Skill Tree Increased Area
21.description: Elemental Nova has a larger area of effect.

23.name: Nova Skill Tree Overcharge Damage
23.description: {Overcharged} Elemental Novas deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased stun chance.

24.name: Nova Freeze Shock Ignite
24.description:
{Ice Nova} has a higher chance to Freeze enemies.

{Lightning Nova} has a chance to Shock enemies.

{Fire Nova} has a chance to Ignite enemies.

25.name: Nova Subtracts Mana Cold Vulnerability
25.description: Elemental Nova costs less mana, but you take increased cold damage if you have cast Elemental Nova recently (past 4 seconds).

26.name: Nova Base Elemental Damage
26.description: Elemental Nova deals more elemental damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a slightly larger area of effect. These effects are doubled when it is directly cast.

27.name: Nova Crit Chance and Armour Shred
27.description: Elemental Nova has a chance to shred armour on hit and has increased critical strike chance.

29.name: Nova Reduced Mana Drain
29.description: Elemental Nova costs less mana per second to channel

30.name: Nova No Lightning
30.description:
You have additional lightning resistance while channeling, but Lightning Nova is disabled.

If you have not taken the {Fire Nova} or {Ice Nova} nodes, then this node re-enables basic Elemental Nova.

32.name: Nova Conditional Damage
32.description: Elemental Nova hits deal more damage against chilled enemies, frozen enemies, shocked enemies, and ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Nova Skill Tree Chaining Ice Nova
4.description: Elemental Nova casts {Freezing Cascade} on hit, creating a cascade of freezing novas that chain between enemies.

15.name: Nova Skill Tree Target
15.description: Elemental Nova is now cast at a target location instead of around you.

16.name: Nova Skill Tree Increased Area Cooldown
16.description: Elemental Nova has a significantly larger area of effect when directly cast, and ignites caused by Elemental Nova have increased duration, but Elemental Nova has a 4 second cooldown. The area of effect increase is smaller if Elemental Nova is channeled.

22.name: Nova Skill Tree Overcharge
22.description: Elemental Novas have a chance to be {Overcharged}. Overcharged Novas shock enemies and have a larger area of effect.

28.name: Nova Channelled
28.description: Elemental Nova becomes a channeled ability, unleashing 5 novas per second, and rapidly draining your mana. Elemental Nova has a smaller area of effect (multiplicative with other area modifiers).

34.name: Nova Skill Tree Crit Damage
34.description: Elemental Nova critical strikes deal more damage.

0.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Root Node

2.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Additional Elemental Protection
2.description: While Fire Shield is active you have additional elemental resistance.

3.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Additional Ward Regen

4.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Can Cast On Allies

5.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Reduced Damage Threshold

6.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Additional Duration

8.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Aoe Radius

10.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Ignite Frequency

13.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Ignite Chance Granted

14.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Fireball Damage

15.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Fireball Ignite Chance

17.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Extra Aoe Damage

7.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Aoe Damage

9.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Aoe Ignite

11.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Lightning Damage

12.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Cold Damage

16.name: Fire Shield Skill Tree Fireball Pierce

2.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Dodge Rating
2.description: Your Wolves have additional dodge chance, and have increased dodge rating for each point of strength you have.

5.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Bleed Chance
5.description: Wolves have a chance to cause enemies to bleed with their melee attacks.

6.name: Summon Wolf Bleed And DoT Damage
6.description: Wolves deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and bleed they inflict has additional Physical Penetration.

8.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Added Speed
8.description: Wolves have increased attack and move speed.

9.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Damage
9.description: Wolves deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Melee Damage
10.description: Your Wolves' melee hits deal more damage, have a greater chance to stun (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and it has improved base critical strike enemies, but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Summon Wolf Armour and Leech
12.description: Wolves have additional armor, and their attacks leech a portion of the physical damage they deal as health.

13.name: Summon Wolf Chill Chance
13.description: Wolves have a chance to chill enemies on hit.

14.name: Summon Wolf Cold Damage
14.description: Wolves deal additional cold damage with attacks, and have an increased chance to stun enemies.

16.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Added Health Regen
16.description: Wolves have additional base health regeneration and increased health regeneration.

18.name: Summon Wolf Small Lightning Retaliation Chance
18.description: Your Wolves have a chance to retaliate with {Storm Bolt} when hit or when they hit an enemy.

19.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Added Health
19.description: Your Wolves have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Lightning Damage
21.description: Your Wolves deal more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Melee Lightning Damage
22.description: Your Wolves' melee attacks deal additional lightning damage.

23.name: Summon Wolf Attunement Scaling
23.description: Your Wolves now deal increase damage and have increased health for each point of Attunement you have.

24.name: Summon Wolf Damage If Howled
24.description: Wolves have more damage and dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers). This bonus is tripled for Wolves that have used {Howl} recently.

25.name: Summon Wolf Stun Immunity
25.description: Your Wolves cannot be stunned.

7.name: Summon Wolf Howl on Your Kill
7.description:
When you kill an enemy one of your Wolves has a chance to {Howl}. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

Howl also grants more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased melee attack speed to all affected allies.

26.name: Summon Wolf Howl on Hit
26.description: The buffs granted by {Howl} last longer and wolves have a chance to Howl when they hit a rare or boss enemy. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

27.name: Summon Wolf Haste On Howl
27.description: Your Wolves' {Howl} also grant {Haste} for a short duration.

28.name: Summon Wolf Slow Chance
28.description: Bleed inflicted by Wolves lasts longer and wolves have a chance to slow on hit and when hit.

29.name: Summon Wolf Ice Bite Chance
29.description:
Your Wolves gain the {Ice Bite} ability, which deals higher damage in a larger area, with a 6 second cooldown. 20% of the remaining cooldown is recovered every time the Wolf hits with an ability other than Ice Bite, including their basic attack.

Ice Bite deals melee cold damage. Consequently this damage scales with your wolves' increases to melee and cold damage, but not increases to their physical damage.

3.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Leaps
3.description: Your Wolves gain a {Leap Attack} to close the gap on distant enemies. Leap Attack has a 10 second cooldown.

20.name: Summon Wolf Skill Tree Lightning Retaliation
20.description: Your Wolves have a chance to retaliate with {Storm Bolt} when hit, and deal more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Summon Wolf Additional Wolf
11.description: You have an additional wolf companion at all times. This wolf does not count towards your companion limit.

17.name: Summon Wolf Infinite Wolves
17.description: You can summon Wolves up to your maximum number of companions.

4.name: Summon Wolf Howl on Kill
4.description: Wolves have a chance to {Howl} on kill. This does not expend Howl's mana cost or put it on cooldown.

3.name: Swipe Skill Tree Crit Damage On Hit
3.description: While you have {Aspect of the Panther} you have additional critical strike multiplier per Stack. This bonus is doubled if you are dual wielding.

4.name: Swipe Bleed Chance
4.description: Swipe hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

5.name: Swipe Physical Shred Chance
5.description: Swipe has a chance to shred physical resistance on hit.

6.name: Swipe Health Or Mana Gain
6.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you gain health if you are transformed, or mana if you are not transformed.

7.name: Swipe Skill Tree Cull Percent
7.description:
Swipe hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). 

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

8.name: Swipe Aspect Of The Panther Duration
8.description:
Each stack of {Aspect of the Panther} lasts longer and grants increased health regen.

Aspect of the Panther also applies to your {Sabertooth} if you have one.

10.name: Swipe Reduced Lightning Damage Cooldown
10.description: The cooldown for the effect of the {Storm Claw} node is reset if you summon a Totem.

11.name: Swipe Added Lightning Damage
11.description:
Swipe has a chance to shock on hit and a portion of Swipe's base damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not with increases to physical damage.

If you have 5 points in this node, Swipe loses its {Physical} tag.

13.name: Swipe Damage And Leech
13.description: Swipe deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and leeches a portion of damage dealt as health.

15.name: Swipe Skill Tree Damage On Hit
15.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of Aspect of the Panther. Each stack lasts 4 seconds and grants you more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Swipe Skill Tree Melee Damage On Hit
16.description: Aspect of the Panther can have more stacks and each stack grants you additional melee damage.

18.name: Swipe Skill Tree Always Spirit Wolves
18.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you call forth a {Spirit Wolf} from each of your summoned wolves.

19.name: Swipe Skill Tree Attack Speed On Hit Keystone
19.description: While you have {Aspect of the Panther} you have increased attack and cast speed. This does not scale with the number of stacks.

20.name: Swipe Damage Vs Shocked and Chilled
20.description: Swipe deals more Lightning Damage per stack of Shock on the target and more Cold Damage per stack of Chill on the target.

21.name: Swipe Increased Area
21.description: Swipe deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

22.name: Swipe Companion Ability On First Hit
22.description: When you use Swipe and hit at least one enemy your nearest companion uses its companion ability and is restored to full health.

24.name: Swipe Damage To Slowed
24.description: Swipe hits deal more damage against slowed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers)

2.name: Swipe Skill Tree Slows
2.description: Swipe deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and slows enemies, but has a cooldown.

9.name: Swipe Lightning Damage Cooldown
9.description:
Swipe deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Every 3 seconds, your next Swipe deals damage in a larger area and has its base damage converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not with increases to physical damage.

Swipe gains a {Lightning} tag.

14.name: Swipe Skill Tree Claw Totem
14.description: You have a chance to summon a {Claw Totem} when Swipe kills an enemy or hits a rare or boss enemy.

17.name: Swipe Skill Tree Spirit Wolves
17.description: When you attack with Swipe and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to call forth a {Spirit Wolf} from each of your summoned wolves.

12.name: Swipe Lightning Penetration
12.description: Swipe has additional lightning penetration based on your Attunement

23.name: Swipe Totem Damage On Hit
23.description: When you use Swipe and hit at least one enemy, all your totems gain +1 Melee Damage and +1 Spell Damage. This buff stacks and lasts until the totems expire.

2.name: Tornado Skill Tree Increased Duration
2.description: Tornado lasts longer.

3.name: Tornado Skill Tree Pull Multiplier
3.description: Tornado has increased pull strength.

4.name: Tornado Skill Tree Double Cast
4.description: When you use Tornado, you have a chance to create an additional Tornado, but Tornadoes have reduced pull strength.

6.name: Tornado Skill Tree Casts Lightning Faster
6.description: Tornado casts {Storm Bolt} more frequently.

7.name: Tornado Skill Tree Increased Base Damage
7.description: Tornado deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs more mana.

9.name: Tornado Skill Tree Stationary
9.description: Tornado is now stationary, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Tornado Skill Tree Lightning Range
11.description: {Storm Bolts} target enemies from further away.

13.name: Tornado Skill Tree Storm Orb Frequency
13.description: Tornadoes cast {Storm Orbs} more frequently.

14.name: Tornado Skill Tree Ignites
14.description: Tornado ignites nearby enemies every second.

15.name: Tornado Skill Tree Ignite Frequency
15.description: Tornado gains a portion of your chance to ignite with fire spells as ignite chance per second.

16.name: Tornado Skill Tree Cast Speed
16.description: Tornado has increased cast speed and area of effect.

18.name: Tornado Skill Tree Attack And Cast Speed On Cast
18.description: {Aspect of the Storm} now also grants increased attack and cast speed.

19.name: Tornado Skill Tree Mana Regen On Cast
19.description: Tornado costs less mana, and {Aspect of the Storm} grants increased mana regeneration.

20.name: Tornado Skill Tree Buff Duration
20.description: {Aspect of the Storm} lasts longer.

21.name: Tornado Skill Tree Instant Cast
21.description: Tornado is now instant cast and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but now has a 4 second cooldown.

22.name: Tornado Skill Tree Cooldown Recovery Speed
22.description: Tornado has a shorter cooldown and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Tornado Skill Tree Casts Lightning
5.description: Tornado casts {Storm Bolt} at a nearby enemy every 2 seconds.

8.name: Tornado Skill Fire Tornado
8.description:
Tornados' base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Tornado deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Tornado Skill Tree Attaches
10.description: Tornado deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and attach to you wherever you move, but you can no longer cast additional Tornadoes at once.

12.name: Tornado Skill Tree Storm Orbs
12.description: Tornado now create a {Storm Orb} every second, but Tornado has less cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Tornado Skill Tree Movement Speed On Cast
17.description: Casting Tornado grants {Aspect of the Storm} for 2 seconds, which grants 10% increased movespeed.

0.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Root Node

2.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Increased Attack Speed
2.description: Mana Strike has increased attack speed.

3.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Increased Damage On Hit
3.description: You deal increased damage if you have hit an enemy with Mana Strike recently (past 4 seconds).

4.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Increased Spell Damage On Hit
4.description: Mana Strike hits grant you increased spell damage for 4 seconds. This effect can stack.

6.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Mana On Kill
6.description: Mana Strike grants mana when it kills an enemy, or when it hits a rare or boss enemy.

7.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Mana On Crit
7.description: Mana Strike grants mana when it critically strikes an enemy.

8.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree No Crit Damage
8.description: Significantly improves Mana Strike’s base critical strike chance, but Mana Strike no longer deals more critical strike damage.

9.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Increased Mana On Hit
9.description: Mana Strike grants you more mana.

11.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Knockback
11.description:
Mana Strike has a chance to knock enemies back on hit.

This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

13.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Crit Per Mana
13.description: Mana Strike gains base critical strike chance equal to a percentage of your current mana, but loses a fixed amount of base critical strike chance.

14.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Lightning Damage Per Mana
14.description: Mana Strike has additional melee lightning damage equal to a percentage of your current mana.

15.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Damage While Out Of mana
15.description: Mana Strike deals more damage while you are out of mana.

16.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Reduced Mana Gained
16.description: Mana Strike deals more damage when you are out of mana (multiplicative with other modifiers), but also grant less mana.

18.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Attack Speed And Lightning Reduced Mana Cost
18.description: Mana Strike has increased attack speed. {Mana Arc} created by {Mana Storm} costs less mana.

19.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Lightning Reduced Mana Cost
19.description: {Mana Arc} created by {Mana Storm} costs less mana.

20.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Increased Area
20.description: Mana Strike deals damage in a larger area.

21.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Mana On Hit While Out Of Mana
21.description: Mana Strike grants more mana on hit while you are out of mana.

22.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Additional Mana On Hit
22.description: Mana Strike grants you more mana if it hits an enemy.

23.name: Mana Strike Ward On Hit
23.description: When you attack with Mana Strike and hit at least one enemy you gain ward

24.name: Mana Strike Percent Mana To Ward
24.description: A portion of mana gained on hit is converted to ward instead.

25.name: Mana Strike Increased Ward On Hit
25.description: Mana Strike hits grant more ward.

26.name: Mana Strike Auto Target
26.description: Mana Strike automatically targets the enemy closest to the cursor and has improved base critical strike chance.

5.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Target
5.description: Mana Strike hits enemies at a target location, rather than in front of you, but grants significantly less mana.

10.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Cooldown Mana On Hit
10.description: Mana Strike grants twice as much mana on hit and hits in a much larger area, but has a cooldown and less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Spark Charge
12.description: Mana Strike hits have a chance to attach a {Spark Charge}.

17.name: Mana Strike Skill Tree Lightning On Hit
17.description: Mana Strike additionally strikes enemies it hits with {Mana Arc} while you are not out of mana. {Mana Arc} consumes 15 mana.

28.name: Mana Strike Cold Conversion
28.description:
Mana Strike's base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage. It now has a chance to freeze enemies.

Shock chance on hit from all sources is converted to frostbite chance for Mana Strike.

Swaps Mana Strike's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

0.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Root Node

2.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Crit Damage
2.description: Fury Leap's critical strikes deal more damage.

3.name: Fury Leap Other Reset Chance
3.description:
You have a chance to reset Fury Leap's cooldown whenever you kill an enemy with any other skill.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.

5.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Casts Lightning Faster
5.description: {Storm Bolts} occur with increased frequency.

6.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Lightning Resets Cooldown
6.description:
You have additional spell damage per 2 Attunement while leaping, and kills with {Storm Bolt} have a chance to reset Fury Leap's cooldown.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.

7.name: Fury Leap Damage On Landing
7.description: When you land, you and your minions gain additional melee damage and spell damage for 3 seconds. This buff can stack.

8.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Attack And Cast Speed On Landing
8.description: When you land, you and your minions gain {Frenzy} for 3 seconds, which increases attack and cast speed. Frenzy cannot stack.

10.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Stun Chance
10.description: Fury Leap has an increased chance to stun enemies and stuns it inflicts last longer.

11.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Pull Chance
11.description: Fury Leap pulls enemies when you land.

13.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Vines At End
13.description: Fury Leap has a chance to cast {Summon Vines} where you land.

14.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Area
14.description: Fury Leap's deals damage in a larger area and costs less mana.

15.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Damage Against Full Life
15.description: Fury Leap hits deal more damage against enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Fury Leap Increased Damage
16.description: Fury Leap deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you leech a portion of the damage it deals as health.

18.name: Fury Leap Always Crit Below Half Health
18.description: While you are below half health, Fury Leap always critically strikes.

17.name: Fury Leap Reset On Kill
17.description:
Fury Leap's cooldown is reset when you kill an enemy with a short leap.

Fury Leap's cooldown can only be reset once every 5 seconds.

9.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Pets Jump
9.description: Your Wolf, Sabertooth, and Raptor companions leap with you.

12.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Vines At Start
12.description: Fury Leap has a chance to cast {Summon Vines} where you leap from.

4.name: Fury Leap Skill Tree Casts Lightning
4.description: Fury Leap creates {Storm Bolts} while you are leaping.

20.name: Fury Leap Cooldown Recovery Speed
20.description: Fury Leap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown.

22.name: Fury Leap Casts Upheaval
22.description: When you land with Fury Leap you cast Upheaval. This consumes Upheaval's mana cost and requires positive mana.

24.name: Fury Leap Immune While Leaping
24.description: You are immune to damage while leaping.

25.name: Fury Leap Damage Per Distance
25.description: Fury Leap deals more damage based on how far you leap.

26.name: Fury Leap Heal on Landing
26.description: When you land, you and your minions are healed.

27.name: Fury Leap Cleanse on Landing
27.description: When you land you cleanse all ailments on you and your minions.

2.name: Meteor Skill Tree Increased Damage
2.description: Meteor deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Meteor has reduced cast speed.

3.name: Meteor Skill Tree Cast Speed
3.description: Meteor has increased cast speed, but costs more mana. Meteors fall faster.

4.name: Meteor Skill Tree Against Full Health
4.description: Meteor deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and even more against enemies at full health.

6.name: Meteor Skill Tree Shrapnel Damage
6.description: {Shrapnel} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

7.name: Meteor Skill Tree Shrapnel Speed
7.description: {Shrapnel} travels faster, causing it to travel further.

8.name: Meteor Skill Tree Shrapnel Pierces
8.description: {Shrapnel} projectiles pierce (continue through targets they hit), but travel slower.

9.name: Meteor Skill Tree Stun Chance
9.description: Meteor has a chance to stun enemies and stuns it inflict last longer.

11.name: Meteor Skill Tree Fall Speed
11.description: Meteor falls faster.

13.name: Meteor Skill Tree Shower Radius
13.description: Meteor deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but meteors fall further apart.

14.name: Meteor Skill Tree More Meteors
14.description: When directly cast, more Meteors fall per cast, but individual Meteors deal damage in a smaller area.

15.name: Meteor Skill Tree Frequency
15.description: Meteors fall more frequently. This does not affect the total number of Meteors that fall.

17.name: Meteor Skill Tree Mana Efficiency
17.description: Meteor costs less mana.

18.name: Meteor Increased Area
18.description: Meteors deals damage in a larger area of effect.

19.name: Meteor Crit Chance
19.description: Improves Meteor's base critical strike chance. Meteor has a chance to deal damage in a significantly larger area.

20.name: Meteor Crit Multi
20.description: Meteor critical strikes deal more damage.

22.name: Meteor Additional Meteors
22.description: When directly cast, more Meteors fall per cast.

24.name: Meteor Mana Recovered
24.description:
After you cast Meteor you recover a portion of the mana spent over the next three seconds. 

You can only recover mana from one cast at once, so if you cast meteor again within three seconds you lose the remaining mana you would have recovered from the first cast.

25.name: Meteor Fire Damage Buff
25.description: Casting Meteor grants the {Craterborn} buff, granting additional fire penetration and increased cast speed for a short duration. Craterborn does not stack.

26.name: Meteor Mana From Fireball
26.description: Casting Fireball while you have {Craterborn} grants ward and restores your mana.

10.name: Meteor Non Fire Damage
10.description: Meteors deal more damage of all types except fire (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Meteor Skill Tree Shrapnel Chance
5.description: Meteor has a chance to break into {Shrapnel} on impact, hitting nearby enemies.

12.name: Meteor Skill Tree Twin Meteors
12.description: When directly cast, an additional Meteor falls within a 4m radius of the first, but Meteor costs much more mana.

16.name: Meteor Skill Tree Line
16.description: Meteors fall in a line towards where you aim, but Meteor costs more mana.

23.name: Meteor Always Crit
23.description: Meteor always crits if you have more than 400 mana before you cast it.

0.nodeName: Lightning Blast Skill Tree Root Node
0.name: Lightning Blast Skill Tree Root Node

5.nodeName: Lightning Blast More Damage Against Shocked And Chilled
5.name: Lightning Blast More Damage Against Shocked And Chilled

7.name: Lightning Blast Blind Chance

8.name: Lightning Blast Shock Nova

14.name: Lightning Blast Ward Per Mana Spent

15.name: Lightning Blast Base Crit And Damage

19.name: Lightning Blast Added Lightning Damage And Forks

22.nodeName: Lightning Blast Double Cast And Crit Multi
22.name: Lightning Blast Double Cast And Crit Multi

24.nodeName: Lightning Blast Increased Damage And Reduced Chain Damage
24.name: Lightning Blast Increased Damage And Reduced Chain Damage

28.nodeName: Lightning Blast No Cost When OOM And Cannot Chain
28.name: Lightning Blast No Cost When OOM And Cannot Chain

30.name: Lightning Blast Quadrouple Cast

2.name: Lightning Blast Additional Chains Per Recent Cast

16.name: Lightning Blast Increased Maximum Chains And Mana Cost

18.name: Lightning Blast Chains Hit Same Enemy

0.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Root Node

3.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Additional Block Elemental Protection

4.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Ward Gain on Block

5.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Additional Block Chance

7.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Reduced Mana Regeneration Penalty

8.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Nova Area

9.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Ward Retention

10.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Additional Armour

11.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Ward Regen

13.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Nova Frequency

14.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Nova Damage

15.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Nova Crit Chance

16.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Nova Crit Multi

6.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Block Immunity

12.name: Ice Ward Skill Tree Ice Nova

2.name: Glacier Skill Tree Chill Chance
2.description: Each of Glacier’s explosions has a chance to chill enemies.

3.name: Glacier Skill Tree Damage 1
3.description: Glacier’s smallest explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Glacier Skill Tree Damage 2
4.description: Glacier’s middle-sized explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Glacier Skill Tree Damage 3
5.description: Glacier’s largest explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Glacier Skill Tree Chill Chance 1
6.description: Glacier’s smallest explosion has a chance to chill enemies.

7.name: Glacier Skill Tree Chill Chance 2 And Damage
7.description: Glacier’s middle-sized explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a chance to chill enemies.

8.name: Glacier Skill Tree Chill Chance 3 And Damage
8.description: Glacier’s largest explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a chance to chill enemies.

9.name: Glacier Skill Tree Vortex Chance 1
9.description: Glacier’s smallest explosion has a chance to create an {Ice Vortex}, which lasts for 4 seconds and deals spell cold damage over time.

10.name: Glacier Skill Tree Vortex Chance 2
10.description: Glacier’s middle-sized explosion has a greater chance to create an {Ice Vortex}, and the {Rime} buff has increased duration.

11.name: Glacier Skill Tree Vortex Chance 3
11.description: Glacier’s largest explosion has a greater chance to create an {Ice Vortex}, and the {Rime} buff has increased effect.

13.name: Glacier Rime
13.description: When you cast Glacier you gain the {Rime} buff which increases your damage over time and freeze rate multiplier.

15.name: Glacier Skill Tree Super Middle Explosion
15.description: Glacier’s middle-sized explosion deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Glacier costs more mana.

16.name: Glacier Skill Stun Chance
16.description: Glacier has an increased chance to freeze and stun enemies.

17.name: Glacier Skill Tree Mana On Crit
17.description: Critical hits with Glacier grant mana equal to a percentage of your maximum mana, up to a limited number of times per second.

18.name: Glacier Skill Tree Mana On Kill
18.description: Glacier kills grant mana equal to a percentage of your maximum mana.

20.name: Glacier Skill Crit Chance
20.description: Greatly improves Glacier’s base critical strike chance, but reduces its critical strike multiplier.

22.name: Glacier Freeze Chance Vs Damage
22.description: Glacier has a higher chance to freeze enemies, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Glacier Hit Damage
24.description: Glacier costs less mana and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

28.name: Glacier Ward On Crit
28.description: You gain ward on critical strikes with Glacier.

12.name: Glacier Skill Tree Vortex Chance
12.description: Each of Glacier’s explosions has a chance to create an {Ice Vortex}, which lasts for 4 seconds and deals spell cold damage over time.

14.name: Glacier Skill Tree Removes Largest
14.description: Glacier costs less mana, but the largest explosion is disabled.

19.name: Glacier Skill Tree Reverse
19.description: Glacier’s explosions occur in reverse order.

21.name: Glacier Skill No Movement
21.description: All of Glacier’s explosions occur at a target location, but Glacier's critical hits no longer deal extra damage (compared to non-critical hits).

25.name: Glacier Skill Tree Super Vortex Chance
25.description: {Ice Vortices} created by Glacier have a chance to instead become a {Greater Ice Vortex} that deals significantly more damage and has a larger radius.

26.name: Glacier More Damage To Bosses
26.description: Glacier deals more hit damage to rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

27.name: Glacier Double Chill
27.description: Chill chance granted by this tree is doubled. Glacier hits deal more damage to chilled enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

30.name: Glacier Teleport
30.description:
When you directly cast Glacier you are teleported to the target location, as long as the location is accessible. This does not count as casting the Teleport skill and is not affected by Teleport's skill tree.

Glacier also gains a cooldown and now counts as a {Traversal} skill.

0.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Root Node

2.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Damage And Bleed Chance
2.description: Your bear deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

4.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Thorn Burst Damage
4.description: {Thorn Burst} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a chance to inflict bleed on hit.

5.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Thorn Burst Retaliation
5.description: Your bear also releases a {Thorn Burst} when hit, up to a limited number of times per 4 seconds.

6.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Thorn Burst Armor Shred
6.description: {Thorn Burst} has a chance to shred armor on hit.

12.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Swipe Cooldown
12.description: Your bear's {Swipe} has a shorter cooldown.

13.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Melee Damage And Stun
13.description: Your bear deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and its melee attacks have a higher chance to stun enemies.

14.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Added Health And Tenacity
14.description: Your bear has more health and takes less damage at low health (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Crit Chance
16.description: Your bear has additional critical strike chance.

17.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Crit Damage
17.description: Your bear takes less damage from critical strikes and its own critical strikes deal more damage.

18.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Armour
18.description: Your bear has additional armor based on your strength.

3.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Thorn Bear
3.description: Your bear's basic attack releases a {Thorn Burst}, a spell that deals physical damage around the bear.

7.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Health Regen
7.description:
Your bear has more health regeneration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

While you have an active bear companion, you have more health regeneration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Swipe
11.description:
Your bear can use {Swipe} with a 2 second cooldown. Your Bear's Swipe scales with its own stats, but is affected by your Swipe Tree.

Your bear deals additional melee physical damage per 3 points of your Strength.

15.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Earthquake
15.description: Your bear can use {Earthquake}, with a 6 second cooldown. When cast this way, Earthquake uses your bear's stats but your Earthquake tree. Earthquakes cast by your bear deal less damage.

19.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Thorn Burst Poison
19.description: {Thorn Burst} has a chance to poison enemies on hit. Additionally, your bear deals more poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Summon Bear Damage Per Bleed
22.description: Your bear has increased movement speed and deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target (up to 30).

23.name: Summon Bear Area
23.description: Your bear's abilities have increased area of effect.

24.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Earthquake Reset
24.description: Your bear gains an additional charge for Earthquake. When you directly cast {Warcry} or enter {Werebear Form}, your bear restores a charge for Earthquake.

25.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Lightning Conversion
25.description:
The base physical damage of your bear's melee attack is converted to lightning, and it has a {Lightning} tag instead of {Physical}.

Your bear shocks enemies on hit.

Your bear gains the ability to teleport towards enemies, on an 8 second cooldown.

8.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Attack Speed
8.description: Your bear has increased attack speed.

9.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Stun Immunity
9.description: Your bear has increased movement speed and cannot be stunned.

10.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Earthquake Causes Thorn Bursts
10.description: Your bear has a chance to cast a {Thorn Burst} from each enemy hit by its {Earthquake}. This chance is tripled against bosses and rare enemies.

21.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Roar Area And Effect
21.description: Your bear's {Roar} has increased area and healing effectiveness.

26.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Roar Damage Mitigation
26.description: Your bear's {Roar} also grants itself and your minions less damage taken for 6 seconds.

27.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Roar Frailty
27.description: Your bear's {Roar} inflicts Frailty on enemies.

28.name: Summon Bear Skill Tree Roar Damage Redirect
28.description: Your bear's {Roar} also grants you a percentage of damage taken redirected to your highest health minion for 6 seconds.

4.name: Thorn Totem Mana Regain
4.description: You regain mana when a Thorn Totem dies or is unsummoned.

5.name: Thorn Totem Tree Mana Efficiency
5.description: Summon Thorn Totem costs less mana.

6.name: Thorn Totem Tree Poison Chance
6.description: Thorn Totem hits have a chance to poison enemies.

8.name: Thorn Totem Poison Duration
8.description: Poison and Frostbite inflicted by Thorn Totem last longer.

10.name: Thorn Totem Freeze Chance From Attunement
10.description: Thorn Totem has a higher chance to freeze enemies, and a greater chance to freeze enemies for each point of Attunement you have.

11.name: Thorn Totem Added Cold Damage
11.description: Thorn Totem deals additional spell cold damage, including its own thorns.

12.name: Thorn Totem Tree Spell Damage vs Distance And Speed
12.description: Thorn Totems deal more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but their projectiles travel more slowly.

13.name: Thorn Totem Tree Extra Projectiles
13.description: Thorn Totems have a chance to release twice as many thorns with each burst.

15.name: Thorn Totem Pierce
15.description: Thorn Totem's thorns can pierce enemies up to a maximum

16.name: Thorn Totem Tree Damage vs Cast Speed
16.description: Thorn Totem deals more damage, but has less cast speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Thorn Totem Tree Double Damage Chance
17.description: Thorn Totem's thorns have a chance to deal double damage on hit.

18.name: Thorn Totem Tree Armour Shred Chance
18.description: Thorn Totem hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

19.name: Thorn Totem Tree Increased Speed
19.description: Thorn Totem's thorns travel faster and farther.

20.name: Thorn Totem Summoning Speed
20.description: You summon Thorn Totem faster and all Thorn Totems have increased cast speed.

21.name: Thorn Totem Tree More Health
21.description: Thorn Totems have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional physical resistance.

23.name: Thorn Totem Tree Duration
23.description: Thorn Totems last longer and have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers)

24.name: Thorn Totem Tree Crit
24.description: Thorn Totems have an increased critical strike chance and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

25.name: Thorn Totem Damage Per Poison Stack
25.description: Thorn Totem's thorn hits deal more damage per stack of poison on the target (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to a maximum.

2.name: Thorn Totem Tree More Totems
2.description: You can have additional Thorn Totems active, but Summon Thorn Totem costs more mana.

3.name: Thorn Totem Ring
3.description: You summon your maximum number of Thorn Totems at once in a ring around the target location, but your maximum number of Thorn Totems is reduced and Summon Thorn Totem costs additional mana per additional totem summoned.

7.name: Thorn Totem Tree Poison Cloud
7.description:
When Thorn Totems die or are unsummoned they release a {Poison Burst}, which deals a small amount of physical spell damage on hit and inflicts poison.

Thorn Totem gains a {Poison} tag, but this does not affect the damage type of Thorn Totems' other abilities.

9.name: Thorn Totem Convert To Cold
9.description:
Thorn Totem's thorns gain a chance to freeze and 100% of their base physical damage is converted to cold damage. Consequently its damage now scales with your totems' increases to cold damage instead of physical damage.

All poison chance is converted to frostbite chance for Thorn Totems.

Thorn Totems have additional cold resistance.

14.name: Thorn Totem Single Projectile
14.description: Thorn Totems fire only one thorn with each burst, but they have massively increased cast speed, are more accurate with their thorns, and their thorns' hits deal more damage to rare enemies and bosses (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Thorn Totem Tree Homing
22.description: Thorn Totem's thorns now seek nearby targets, but Thorn Totem has less cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

3.name: Serpent Strike Cull
3.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to instantly kill enemies that are below a threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

4.name: Serpent Strike Freeze Rate
4.description: Serpent Strike hits have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

6.name: Serpent Strike Serpent Venom Damage Per Vit
6.description: Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your Vitality, and if you have 50 Vitality you regain mana when you inflict an enemy with Serpent Venom or refresh its duration.

7.name: Serpent Strike Poison And Damage Per Poison
7.description: Serpent Strike hits have a higher chance to poison on hit and they deal more melee damage per stack of poison on the target, up to a limit.

8.name: Serpent Strike Scorpion Ability
8.description:
When you lunge forwards with Serpent Strike, if you have a {Scorpion} it casts its companion ability, {Venom Nova}, twice, once centred on itself, and once centred on you.

This effect has a 12 second cooldown, but ignores Venom Nova's regular cooldown and does not put it on cooldown.

10.name: Serpent Strike Constrictor
10.description: You gain a stack of {Constrictor} every 0.5 seconds, up to a maximum of 4. When you use Serpent Strike all stacks are consumed causing the attack to deal more damage per stack (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Serpent Strike Constrictor Poison
11.description: Each stack of {Constrictor} also grants Serpent Strike additional poison chance and increased poison duration when consumed

12.name: Serpent Strike Constrictor Mana
12.description: You regain mana when you consume a stack of {Constrictor}.

13.name: Serpent Strike Dodge Rating On Use
13.description:
You gain {Slither} for 4 seconds when you use Serpent Strike and hit at least one enemy.

Each stack grants you more dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers).

14.name: Serpent Strike Bleed Chance
14.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

15.name: Serpent Strike Attack Speed
15.description: Serpent Strike has increased attack speed.

16.name: Serpent Strike Armour Shred
16.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to shred enemy armor and posion resistance.

17.name: Serpent Strike Health On Crit And Kill
17.description: You regain health when Serpent Strikes kills or critically strikes an enemy.

18.name: Serpent Strike Crit Multi
18.description: Serpent Strike's critical strikes deal more damage.

21.name: Serpent Strike Snake Recovery
21.description: {Primal Serpents} have increased melee attack speed and are granted health when they hit enemies with a melee attack.

22.name: Serpent Strike Snake Health
22.description: {Primal Serpents} have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional armour

23.name: Serpent Strike Snake Poison
23.description: {Primal Serpents}'s hits have an additional chance to poison enemies and inflict {frailty}.

24.name: Serpent Strike Heal Snake
24.description: Instead of summoning a new serpent when the {Primal Serpent} node's effect triggers, you heal your current serpent to full health and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds. This damage buff can stack.

2.name: Serpent Strike Snek
2.description: When Serpent Strike kills an enemy or hits a rare or boss enemy, you have a chance to summon a {Primal Serpent}.

5.name: Serpent Strike Serpent Venom
5.description: Serpent Strike hits have a chance to inflict {Serpent Venom}, an ailment that deals poison damage over time and prevents enemies from landing critical strikes. It lasts 3 seconds and cannot stack.

9.name: Serpent Strike Lunge If Out Of Range
9.description: When you attempt to use Serpent Strike against a target that is slightly out of range you will lunge forwards before attacking.

20.name: Serpent Strike Cold Conversion
20.description:
Serpent Strike now has a chance to freeze and its base physical damage is converted to cold damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite chance.

26.name: Serpent Strike Frostbite Duration
26.description: Frosbite inflicted by Serpent Strike lasts longer and has additional cold penetration

27.name: Serpent Strike Dodge Per Cold Res
27.description: You have additional dodge rating per cold resistance, for each stack of the {Slither} buff.

28.name: Serpent Strike Bleed Chance Per Maelstrom
28.description: Each active stack of {Maelstrom} grants Serpent Strike additional chance to inflict bleed on hit and more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

29.name: Serpent Strike Armour Shred Effect Per Dex
29.description: Armour Shred inflicted by Serpent Strike has an increased effect based on your Dexterity.

30.name: Serpent Strike Serpent Venom Damage Per Poison
30.description: Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on the number of poison and frostbite stacks on them, up to a maximum benefit from each ailment.

31.name: Serpent Strike Serpent Venom Damage Per Crit
31.description:
Serpent Venom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your melee critical strike chance.

If your melee crit chance is above 50% then Serpent Venom deals its damage twice as quickly. This does not increase the total damage it deals over its full duration, but rather halves its duration and doubles its damage per second.

32.name: Serpent Strike Poison Pen
32.description: Ailments applied by Serpent Strike and {Primal Serpents} have additional poison penetration.

3.name: Static Orb Mana Cost And Damage From Max Mana

5.name: Static Orb Static Ground Damage From Crit Multi

6.name: Static Orb Allies Shock Chance In Static Ground

8.name: Static Orb Rare Explosion Much Less Mana Cost

12.name: Static Orb No Tendrils Much More Freeze Rate

14.nodeName: Static Orb Spell Damage To Shocked Enemies
14.name: Static Orb Spell Damage To Shocked Enemies

15.nodeName: Static Orb Static Charges On Hit With Orb
15.name: Static Orb Static Charges On Hit With Orb

16.nodeName: Static Orb Stun Chance And Duration Plus Ward On Stun
16.name: Static Orb Stun Chance And Duration Plus Ward On Stun

20.nodeName: Static Orb More Damage And Area Automatic Early Explosion
20.name: Static Orb More Damage And Area Automatic Early Explosion

21.nodeName: Static Orb More Damage With Distance But Slower
21.name: Static Orb More Damage With Distance But Slower

22.nodeName: Static Orb Arching Orb No Pull But Faster

23.name: Static Orb More Chains On Next Lightning Blast

24.nodeName: Static Orb Next Lightning Blasts Regain Static Orb Mana
24.name: Static Orb Next Lightning Blasts Regain Static Orb Mana

25.nodeName: Static Orb More Damage And Speed
25.name: Static Orb More Damage And Speed

26.nodeName: Static Orb Explodes On Contact More Damage Per Mana Cost
26.name: Static Orb Explodes On Contact More Damage Per Mana Cost

2.name: Entangling Roots Shockwave Poison Chance
2.description: Root Wave hits have a chance to poison enemies.

3.name: Entangling Roots DoT Poison Conversion
3.description: Entangling Roots' base physical damage over time is converted to poison and it now has the poison tag. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

4.name: Entangling Roots Blind
4.description: Rooted enemies are also blinded.

5.name: Entangling Roots Creates Seeds
5.description:
Entangling Roots now creates seeds in the area. When an enemy draws too close to a seed it bursts, releasing a burst of spores that slow and poison enemies.

If you have taken the {Winternid Thorns} node, the seed bursts inflict {Frostbite} and {Chill} instead of slow and poison.

6.name: Entangling Roots Seeds Heal
6.description:
The spores from {Seeds} now heal you and your allies. 

This effect is tripled for minions.

7.name: Entangling Roots Haste On Allies
7.description: Seeds now burst when an ally draws close to them which grants you and your allies the {Haste} buff, granting you 30% increased movement speed.

8.name: Entangling Roots Seeds Burst From Upheaval
8.description: Seeds now burst when you hit them with {Upheaval} and deal damage in a larger area when detonated this way.

9.name: Entangling Roots Seeds Grow Vines After Burst
9.description: Seeds will now grow {Vines} when they burst.

10.name: Entangling Roots Rooting Duration
10.description: Root Wave immobilizes enemies for a longer duration.

11.name: Entangling Roots Cannot Be Dodged
11.description: Root Wave cannot be dodged.

12.name: Entangling Roots Roots Buffs Totems
12.description: Entanging Roots now wraps around your totems and vines for twice the duration as enemies, granting them additional armor and increased attack and cast speed.

13.name: Entangling Roots Roots Buffs And Roots Spriggan
13.description: Entangling Roots now also wraps around your Spriggans for twice the duration as enemies, granting them all buffs from {Frenzying Thorns} as well as additional projectiles with their {Thorn Volley}.

14.name: Entangling Roots Roots Leech
14.description: Entangling Roots leeches a portion of the damage it deals as health to you.

15.name: Entangling Roots Roots More Damage
15.description: Entangling Roots deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Entangling Roots Root Damage Accelerates
16.description: Entangling Roots damage accelerates over time, dealing more damage each second (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Entangling Roots Circle Mode
17.description: You now cause Entangling Roots to expand in a circle around you rather than a cone in front, but it now has a cooldown.

18.name: Entangling Roots Cast From Nearest Totem
18.description: Entangling Roots is now cast from the nearest totem to your cursor.

19.name: Entangling Roots Autocast When Stunned
19.description:
When you are stunned, you now cast Entangling Roots. 

This effect has a 20 seconds cooldown, which doesn't affect Entangling Root's cooldown.

20.name: Entangling Roots Shockwave Physical Shred
20.description: Root Wave hits shred enemy physical resistance.

21.name: Entangling Roots Shockwave Damage And Stun Chance
21.description: Root Wave's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have a higher chance to stun enemiess.

22.name: Entangling Roots Cold Conversion
22.description:
Entangling Roots' base damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Physical Resistance Shred from all sources is converted to Cold Resistance Shred chance and effects related to Physical Resistance Shred now depend on Cold Resistance Shred instead.

23.name: Entangling Roots Frostbite Conversion
23.description:
Root Wave has a chance to inflict {Frostbite}. 

Poison chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite for Root Wave and effects related to poison now depend on Frostbite instead.

24.name: Entangling Roots Freeze Rate
24.description: Root Wave gains additional freeze rate per character level.

25.name: Entangling Roots Shockwave Heals Allies
25.description:
Root Wave now heals other allies it hits. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

This effect is tripled for minions.

26.name: Entangling Roots Physical Damage Buff To Allies
26.description: Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to deal additional physical damage with spells and attacks for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

27.name: Entangling Roots Adaptive Spell Damage Buff To Allies
27.description: Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to deal additional damage with spells for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

28.name: Entangling Roots Crit Buff To Allies
28.description: Root Wave causes your Wolves and Bear it hits to have improved base critical strile chance and deal more damage with critical strikes for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack.

29.name: Entangling Roots Poison Chance Buff To Allies
29.description:
Root Wave causes your minions and other allies it hits to have additional chance to poison on hit. This buff lasts 8 seconds and does not stack.

The effect is tripled for Scorpions and Serpents.

5.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree More Damage Against Chilled
5.name: Volcanic Orb Tree More Damage Against Chilled

7.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Damage VS Duration
7.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Damage VS Duration

8.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Increased Speed

9.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Shrapnel Stun Chance
9.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Shrapnel Stun Chance

13.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosive Ground Frequency
13.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosive Ground Frequency

14.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Duration And Mana
14.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Duration And Mana

18.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion Ignite Chance
18.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion Ignite Chance

24.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Speed Increase Over Time
24.name: Volcanic Orb Speed Increase Over Time

15.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion On Death
15.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion On Death

16.nodeName: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion On Cast Chance
16.name: Volcanic Orb Tree Explosion On Cast Chance

3.name: Summon Spriggan Vines Cooldown Recovery
3.description: Your Spriggan's Summon Vine ability has a shorter cooldown.

4.name: Summon Spriggan Vine Damage
4.description: Your Spriggan's summoned {Vines} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Summon Spriggan Vine Health And Poison Resist
6.description: Your Spriggan's summoned {Vines} have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional poison resistance.

7.name: Summon Spriggan Spell Damage
7.description: Your Spriggan deals more spell damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Summon Spriggan Hit Damage To CCd
10.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} hits deal more damage to immobilized, stunned or frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Summon Spriggan Hit Damage To Poisoned
11.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} hits deal more damage to poisoned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Increased Healing
12.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} and {Rejuvenating Wind} restore more health.

13.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Spell Damage
13.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional spell damage.

14.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Crit Chance And Avoidance
14.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional base critical chance and critical strike avoidance.

15.name: Summon Spriggan Health
15.description: Your Spriggan has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Summon Spriggan Armor And Physical Resist
16.description: Your Spriggan has additional armor and physical resistance.

18.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Damage
18.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Towards You
21.description: Your Spriggan now casts {Ensnaring Roots} towards you whenever there are enemies around you, rather than it casting towards enemies near itself.

22.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Cooldown Recovery
22.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} has a shorter cooldown.

23.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Duration
23.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} lasts longer.

24.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Minion Healing
24.description: Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} restores significantly more health to minions.

2.name: Summon Spriggan Summons Vines
2.description:
Your Spriggan can now use {Summon Vine}, melee minions that poison enemies they hit, up to a maximum of 6 Vines.

These Vines are not affected by your Vine limit or nodes on the {Spriggan Form} tree.

5.name: Summon Spriggan Three Vines
5.description: Your Spriggan's {Summon Vine} ability now summons three vines at a time, but has a significantly longer cooldown (multiplicative with other modifiers).

8.name: Summon Spriggan Chance For More Volley Thorns
8.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} has a chance to fire 2 extra Thorns.

9.name: Summon Spriggan More Volley Thorns
9.description: Your Spriggan's {Thorn Volley} always fires 1 extra Thorn and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Summon Spriggan Casts Ensnaring Roots
17.description: Your Spriggan can now cast {Ensnaring Roots}, a wave of roots deals physical damage and roots enemies it hits for 1.5 seconds. Rooted enemies take physical damage over time until they are freed.

20.name: Summon Spriggan Cold Conversion
20.description:
Thorn Volley's and Ensnaring Roots' base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. They also have a chance to freeze enemies.

Poison chance from all sources, for both skills, is converted to {Frostbite} and effects related to poison now depend on Frostbite instead.

25.name: Summon Spriggan Freeze Rate And Aura Freeze Rate
25.description: Your Spriggan has a higher chance to freeze enemies. Your Spriggans Aura grants its allies a higher chance to freeze enemies.

26.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Dodge Rating Per Attunement Doubled For Minions
26.description:
Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} now also grants allies additional dodge rating per point of your Attunement.

This effect is doubled on minions.

27.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Heals Allies On Hit
27.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} now heals allies it hits.

28.name: Summon Spriggan Ensnaring Roots Cannot Be Dodged
28.description: Your Spriggan's {Ensnaring Roots} can no longer be dodged.

29.name: Summon Spriggan Reflect For You And Spriggan Plus Vitality
29.description: While you control a Spriggan, you and your Spriggans reflect flat damage to attackers per point of Vitality.

30.name: Summon Spriggan Aura Wolf Crow Raptor Effects
30.description:
Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} grants additional effects based on the amount of active companions you have.
For each {Wolf}, it grants increased attack and cast speed.
For each {Storm Crow}, it grants increased mana regeneration.
For each {Raptor}, it grants additional critical strike multiplier.

31.name: Summon Spriggan Bear Cat Scorpion Effects
31.description:
Your Spriggan's {Healing Aura} grants additional effects based on your active companions.
With a {Bear}, it grants a percentage of max health gained as endurance threshold.
With a {Sabertooth},  it grants increased dodge rating.
With a {Scorpion}, it grants increased area of effect.

2.name: Warpath Tree Added Void Damage
2.description:
Warpath deals additional melee void damage. 

This effect is doubled while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

4.name: Warpath Tree Time Rot Conversion
4.description:
Warpath's base physical damage is converted to void. Consequently this damage scales with increases to void damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Warpath has a chance to inflict {Time Rot}. Bleed and ignite chance from all sources are converted to Time Rot chance for Warpath.

Swaps Warpath's {Physical} tag for a {Void} tag.

5.name: Warpath Tree Damage Against Time Rot
5.description: Warpath hits deal more damage against enemies per stack of {Time Rot} on them (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Warpath Tree Area
12.description: Warpath deals damage in a larger area.

13.name: Warpath Tree Increased Speed
13.description: While spinning, you have increased movement speed.

14.name: Warpath Tree Damage
14.description:
Warpath deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon or dual wielding.

23.name: Warpath Tree Less Channel Cost
23.description: Warpath costs less mana per second.

28.name: Warpath Tree Armor Shred Chance
28.description: Warpath hits shred enemy armor.

27.name: Warpath Tree Less Channel Cost And Reduced Ele Res
27.description: Warpath costs significantly less mana per second, but you have reduced elemental resistance while spinning.

6.name: Warpath Tree Block
6.description: While spinning, you have additional block chance and block effectiveness.

25.name: Warpath Tree Weapon Master
25.description: While spinning, you have additional melee leech while wielding an axe, additional base crit chance while wielding a sword, additional physical penetration while wielding a mace and additional fire penetration while wielding a sceptre.

7.name: Warpath Tree 2h Area
7.description: Warpath deals damage in a larger area while wielding a two handed weapon.

8.name: Warpath Tree Mana Regen With 2h
8.description: While spinning, you gain mana every three seconds while wielding a two handed weapon.

9.name: Warpath Tree Bleed Chance And Duration
9.description:
Warpath hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and bleed stacks inflicted by Warpath have increased duration.

Both effects will instead apply to ignite or time rot if you have {Earthscorcher} or {Apocalypse Whirl}.

10.name: Warpath Tree Ignite Conversion
10.description:
Warpath's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite for Warpath.

Swaps Warpath's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

11.name: Warpath Tree Burning Trail
11.description: While spinning, you leave behind a burning trail that ignites enemies each second. If ignite has been converted to {Time Rot} with {Apoclypse Whirl} this trail inflicts Time Rot instead.

16.name: Warpath Tree Spell Damage
16.description: While spinning, you have additional spell damage.

17.name: Warpath Tree Heals Allies
17.description: While spinning, you and your allies are healed each second within Warpath's area of effect. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

18.name: Warpath Tree Smite Chance
18.description:
While spinning, you have a chance to cast {Smite} each second on a nearby enemy.

This consumes Smite's mana cost.

19.name: Warpath Tree Hit Damage To Ignited
19.description: Warpath hits deal more melee fire damage to ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) and ignite it inflicts has additional Fire Penetration

20.name: Warpath Tree Damage And Area More Channel Cost
20.description: For each second you continuously spin, Warpath deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area, but costs more mana per second.

21.name: Warpath Tree Slash After Spinning
21.description: After spinning for at least 2 seconds you do a {Warslash} when you stop spinning. This deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for each second you spent spinning, up to a maximum duration.

22.name: Warpath Tree Melee Damage To Low Health
22.description: Warpath deals more melee damage to enemies on low health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

29.name: Warpath Tree Summon Forged Weapons
29.description: While spinning, you summon {Forged Weapons} every 5 seconds as if you had hit an enemy with {Forge Strike}.

30.name: Warpath Tree Summon Frequency
30.description: While spinning, you summon {Forged Weapons} more frequently.

31.name: Warpath Tree Echoes
31.description:
While spinning, you deal increased void damage and you have a chance each second to create an {Echo} at a recent location that uses Warpath on the spot for 2 seconds. This chance is equal to twice your chance for skills to echo.

You can only create a Warpath echo if you have been spinning for at least 2 seconds and have travelled at least 4 metres in the past 2 seconds.

32.name: Warpath Tree Abyssal Echoes Every 5 Sec
32.description:
While spinning, you cast {Abyssal Echoes} every 5 seconds.

This consumes Abyssal Echoes' mana cost.

2.name: Volatile Reversal Cooldown Recovery
2.description: Volatile Reversal has a shorter cooldown.

3.name: Volatile Reversal Short Jump Low Cooldown
3.description: Volatile Reversal's forwards jump has a significantly shorter maximum distance, but its cooldown is reduced.

4.name: Volatile Reversal Crit Chance
4.description: Volatile Reversal has additional critical strike chance.

5.name: Volatile Reversal Mana Gain On Crit
5.description: When you critically strike at least one enemy with Volatile Reversal you regain mana.

6.name: Volatile Reversal Haste On Backwards Jump
6.description: You gain the {Haste} buff for a short duration, when you jump backwards in time.

7.name: Volatile Reversal Dodge Rating From Armor
7.description: While you are able to jump backwards in time, a percentage of your armor mitigation also applies to damage over time.

8.name: Volatile Reversal Frenzy After Forwards Jump
8.description: You gain the {Frenzy} buff, while you are able to jump backwards in time.

9.name: Volatile Reversal Additional Combo Duration
9.description: You can use Volatile Reversal's second combo ability for a longer period of time and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Volatile Reversal Devouring Orbs Get Older
10.description:
When you jump forwards in time, your existing {Devouring Orbs} become older.

This causes them to expire sooner.

11.name: Volatile Reversal Devouring Orbs Cooldown Recovery
11.description: When you jump backwards in time, {Devouring Orb} recovers some of its cooldown scaling with the amount of {Devouring Orbs} that expired after jumping forwards in time.

12.name: Volatile Reversal Devouring Orbs Pulled To You
12.description: When you jump forwards in time, all your {Devouring Orbs} are pulled towards you and trigger a {Void Rift}, but Volatile Reversal costs additional mana.

13.name: Volatile Reversal Devouring Orbs Get Younger
13.description:
When you jump backwards in time, your existing {Devouring Orbs} become younger.

This causes them to expire later, and each orb can only benefit from this once.

14.name: Volatile Reversal Second Ability Removed
14.description: Volatile Reversal's second combo ability is removed, but the melee attack deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and Volatile Reversal deals damage in a larger area.

15.name: Volatile Reversal More Damage
15.description: Volatile Reversal deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Volatile Reversal Second Ability Jumps Forwards
16.description: Volatile Reversal's second combo ability now jumps you forward in time to your target location, instead of backwards.

17.name: Volatile Reversal Increased Area
17.description: Volatile Reversal deals damage in a larger area.

18.name: Volatile Reversal Fire Conversion
18.description:
Volatile Reversal's base void damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to void damage.

Time Rot chance from this tree is converted to ignite chance.

Swaps Volatile Reversal's {Void} tag for a {Fire} tag.

19.name: Volatile Reversal Randomized Arrival
19.description: When you jump forwards in time, your arrival location is slightly randomized, but the melee attack deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and Volatile Reversal deals damage in a larger area.

20.name: Volatile Reversal Attack Slow Chance
20.description: Volatile Reversal's hits have a chance to slow enemies and it deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the enemy.

21.name: Volatile Reversal Guaranteed Echo After
21.description: When you travel at least 4 meters by jumping through time, your next direct melee attack or spell is guaranteed to {Echo}, if it is able to.

22.name: Volatile Reversal More Damage From Travel
22.description: When you jump backwards in time, Volatile Reversal deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per meter travelled, up to a maximum.

23.name: Volatile Reversal Attack Void Essence Chance
23.description: Volatile Reversal's melee hits have a chance to grant you a {Void Essence}.

24.name: Volatile Reversal Starting Void Bolts
24.description: When you directly use Volatile Reversal you now also cast a {Void Bolt} at up to 3 enemies near your starting location, but Volatile Reversal costs additional mana.

25.nodeName: Volatile Reversal Void Bolts Time Rot Chance
25.name: Volatile Reversal Void Bolts Time Rot Chance

26.name: Volatile Reversal Void Bolts Increased DoT Taken
26.description: Enemies hit by Volatile Reversal's {Void Bolts} take increased damage over time for several seconds. This effect does not stack.

27.name: Volatile Reversal Void Bolts Can Return Shotgun
27.description:
Your {Void Bolts} return to you.

All returning Void Bolts can hit the same targets again. (This means a single cast of the Void Bolt spell can hit a single enemy up to 4 times)

28.name: Volatile Reversal Arrival Void Bolts
28.description: When you directly use Volatile Reversal you now also cast a {Void Bolt} at up to 3 enemies near your arrival location, but Volatile Reversal costs additional mana.

29.name: Volatile Reversal Arrival Abyssal Echoes
29.description:
The {Void Bolts} from the {Terminal Void Bolt} node are now replaced with a single cast of {Abyssal Echoes}.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Abyssal Echoes'} mana cost.

2.name: Shield Rush Tree Damage
2.description: Shield Rush deals more damage.

3.name: Shield Rush Tree Damage Against Full Health While Travelling
3.description: Shield Rush hits deal more hit damage to enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Shield Rush Tree Backwards Beam
5.description: When Shield Rush ends it creates a {Void Beam} that travels back in the direction you came from, but Shield Rush costs more mana.

7.name: Shield Rush Tree AoE Void Damage
7.description: Shield Rush's final impact deals additional melee void damage.

8.name: Shield Rush Tree Attack Speed Reduced Void Damage
8.description: Shield Rush hits deal additional void damage, but this damage is reduced by your increased attack speed.

9.name: Shield Rush Tree Mana Efficiency
9.description: Shield Rush costs less mana.

10.name: Shield Rush Tree Less Damage Taken
10.description: You take less damage while using Shield Rush (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Shield Rush Tree Travel Stun Chance
11.description: Shield Rush hits have an increased chance to stun enemies.

13.name: Shield Rush Tree Mana Restore
13.description: When Shield Rush ends, your mana is restored to the amount you had when it started, but Shield Rush now has a 10 second cooldown.

14.name: Shield Rush Tree Adds Charges
14.description: Shield Rush gains additional charges, but you take more damage while using Shield Rush (multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Shield Rush Tree No Cooldown
15.description: Shield Rush no longer has a cooldown, but costs health in addition to mana to use.

16.name: Shield Rush Tree Increase AoE
16.description: Shield Rush's final impact deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

17.name: Shield Rush Tree Area Damage
17.description: Shield Rush's final impact deals more damage.

18.name: Shield Rush Tree Area Crit Chance
18.description: Improves the base critical strike chance of Shield Rush's final impact.

19.name: Shield Rush Tree Area Crit Multi
19.description: Critical strikes from Shield Rush's final impact deal more damage.
