3.name: Holy Aura Increased Flame Burst Final Hit
3.description: If you are the one to get the final hit to unleash {Flame Burst} on an enemy, it deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Holy Aura Increased Attack and Cast Speed
4.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased attack and cast speed.

5.name: Holy Aura Added Crit Chance
5.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased critical strike chance.

6.name: Holy Aura Increased Crit Multi
6.description: Holy Aura causes you and your allies' critical strikes to deal more damage.

7.name: Holy Aura Fire Damage
7.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased fire and lightning damage.

8.name: Holy Aura Added Ignite On Hit Chance
8.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies a chance to ignite and electrify enemies.

9.name: Holy Aura Added Elemental Penetration
9.description: Holy Aura causes you and your allies to penetrate enemy fire and lightning resistance.

10.name: Holy Aura Physical Damage
10.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased physical damage.

11.name: Holy Aura Throwing Damage And Stun Chance
11.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased throwing attack damage and increased stun chance with throwing attacks.

12.name: Holy Aura Added Ele Prot
12.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional elemental resistance and endurance threshold.

13.name: Holy Aura Increased Dodge Chance
13.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional dodge chance.

14.name: Holy Aura Increased Healing Effectiveness
14.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased healing effectiveness.

18.name: Holy Aura Throwing Attack Speed And Haste Chance
18.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increasing throwing attack speed and a chance to gain {Haste} for 1 second on hit.

19.name: Holy Aura Increased Health Regeneration
19.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased health regeneration.

20.name: Holy Aura Ward Generation
20.description: Holy Aura regenerates ward for you and nearby allies.

21.name: Holy Aura Ward Retention
21.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies increased ward retention.

23.name: Holy Aura Block Prot And Health On Block
23.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional block effectiveness and health when blocking attacks.

24.name: Holy Aura Ward On Block
24.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies ward when blocking attacks.

26.name: Holy Aura Health Globe Chance On Kill
26.description: When an enemy dies in Holy Aura's area of effect, there is a chance it spawns a {Health Globe}, healing for 70 health.

2.name: Holy Aura Fire Damage After Melee Hits
2.description:
Your melee hits apply 10 stacks of {Fiery Inquisition} and the melee hits of other allies affected by the aura apply 1 stack. If an enemy reaches 60 stacks, the stacks are consumed to release a {Flame Burst}, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies.

While Holy Aura is active twice as many stacks are applied.

The {Flame Burst} scales with the stats of the player or minion that triggers it.

15.name: Holy Aura Boost Duration
15.description: Holy Aura's active duration lasts longer, but Holy Aura's cooldown lasts longer and its passive is disabled during its cooldown.

17.name: Holy Aura Slow Aura
17.description: Activating Holy Aura grants you a chance to slow surrounding enemies each second.

22.name: Holy Aura Ward Boost
22.description: Holy Aura grants you and your allies a burst of ward when activated, but Holy Aura has a longer cooldown.

16.name: Holy Aura Poison Resist And Cleanse
16.description:
Holy Aura grants you and your allies additional poison resistance.
Activating Holy Aura cleanses ailments for you and your allies.

28.name: Holy Aura Flame Burst Area
28.description: Your melee hits apply an additional stack of {Fiery Inquisition} and if you are the one to get the final hit to unleash {Flame Burst} on an enemy, it deals damage in an increased area.

2.name: Rive Increased Damage and Stun Chance
2.description: Rive deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

3.name: Rive Summon Weapon
3.description: When Rive kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy, you have a chance to summon a {Forged Weapon}.

5.name: Rive Void Conversion Double Echo Chance
5.description:
Rive's base physical damage is converted to void. Consequently this damage scales with increases to void damage, but not increases to physical damage or other damage types.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to chance to inflict {Time Rot}.

Swaps Rive's {Physical} tag for a {Void} tag. 

Additionally, your chance to {Echo} with Rive is doubled.

7.name: Rive Mana Restore on Hit
7.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and restores mana if it hits at least one target.

8.name: Rive Hit Damage Especially For Echoes
8.description: Rive deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). This effect is tripled for {Echoes}.

9.name: Rive First Hit Ignite Chance
9.description: Rive's first strike has a chance to ignite enemies.

10.name: Rive Second Hit Ignite Chance
10.description: Rive's second strike has a chance to ignite enemies.

12.name: Rive Third Hit Grants Life Leech
12.description: When you trigger {Flame Drinker's Blade's} effect you also gain an additional buff that causes you to leech a percentage of the damage you deal as health. Unlike the buff from Flame Drinker's Blade, this buff cannot stack.

13.name: Rive Increased Damage to Ignited Targets
13.description: Rive hits deal more damage to ignited targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Rive First and Second Hit Increased Attack Speed
15.description: Rive's first and second strike have increased attack speed.

16.name: Rive Crit Chance and Double Crit Hit Three
16.description: Improves Rive's base critical strike chance. This bonus is doubled for Rive's third strike.

17.name: Rive First Hit Crit Chance
17.description: Rive's first strike grants you increased critical strike chance on hit for 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.

18.name: Rive Third Hit Always Crit
18.description: Rive's third strike has double crit chance and its critical strikes deal more damage, but strikes one and two can no longer critically strike.

19.name: Rive Chance to Armor Shred on First and Second Hit
19.description: Rive's first and second strike have a chance to reduce enemy armor.

21.name: Rive Change Order of Hits
21.description: Changes Rive's sequence of strikes to {1, 2, 1, 2, 3.}

22.name: Rive Third Hit Increased Damage and Stun and Area
22.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and hits in a larger area, and has increased chance to stun enemies.

26.name: Rive Second Hit Increased Damage and Area
26.description: Rive's second strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

28.name: Rive Third Hit Increased Area
28.description: Rive's third strike deals damage in a larger area.

29.name: Rive Leech on Third Hit
29.description: Rive's third strike leeches damage dealt as health.

30.name: Rive Third Hit Increased Damage
30.description: Rive's third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

31.name: Rive Bleed Chance And Duration
31.description:
Rive's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. 

Additionally, bleeds inflicted by Rive's third strike last longer.

4.name: Rive Lacerate
4.description:
Rive's third strike {lacerates} enemies on it.

Lacerated enemies take melee damage over time for 3 seconds, with base damage equal to 300% of your added melee damage. Laceration does not stack.

6.name: Rive Melee Damage per Attribute
6.description:
Rive deals additional melee physical damage per point of Dexterity if you are using a Sword.

Rive deals additional melee void damage per point of Vitality if you are using an Axe.

Rive deals additional melee fire damage per point of Attunement if you are using a Mace.

11.name: Rive Consume Ignite Stacks for Damage
11.description: Rive's third strike consumes all stacks of ignite you applied to enemies it hits, granting you a buff that grants physical penetration per stack consumed, up to a maximum.

20.name: Rive Wave Projectile at High Health and Mana
20.description: Rive's first strike consumes mana to release a wave of energy that passes through enemies.

23.name: Rive Remove Third Hit
23.description: Rive skips its third strike.

27.name: Rive Pull on Second Hit
27.description:
If you have positive mana, Rive's second strike pulls enemies.

Additionally, Rive's hits slow enemies.

32.name: Rive Cull on Hit Three
32.description: Rive's third strike instantly kills enemies below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

24.name: Rive 2h Weapon Stats Multiplier
24.description: If you are using a two handed weapon, stats on that weapon that directly add damage, increase damage or add a chance to apply an ailment on hit, have double effect for Rive.

14.name: Rive Scrap Metal
14.description: Rive hits have more crit chance against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Avalanche Increased Mana Efficiency
5.description: Avalanche costs less mana.

7.name: Avalanche Channel Persists
7.description: Avalance now persists after you stop channeling for a duration equal to how long you spent channeling, up to a maximum.

8.name: Avalanche More Damage
8.description: Avalanche deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Avalanche Upheaval And Stun Chance
10.description:
Avalanche hits have an increased chance to stun enemies.

Additionally, the impact from the large boulders have a chance to create your {Upheaval} towards a nearby enemy.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Upheaval's} mana cost.

11.name: Avalanche Subtracted Mana Cost
11.description:
Avalanche costs less mana.

If it's channeled l it will reduce the channel cost instead.

12.name: Avalanche Increased Damage With A Totem
12.description: Avalanche hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you have at least one active totem.

15.name: Avalanche Chance For Big Boulder
15.description: Small boulders have a chance to be replaced by large boulders.

16.name: Avalanche Increased Boulder Cast Rate
16.description:
Avalanche drops additional small boulders.

If Avalanche is channeled, small boulders drop more frequently instead.

18.name: Avalanche Repeat Boulder Chance
18.description:
Improves Avalanche's base critical strike chance.

When a large boulder critically strikes, it has a chance to drop a small boulder at the same location.

19.name: Avalanche Increased Freeze Chance
19.description: Avalanche hits have an increased chance to freeze enemies.

21.name: Avalanche Chance To Chill Ground
21.description: Avalanche's large boulders have a chance to leave behind {Frozen Ground,} which chills all enemies who stand on it.

22.name: Avalanche Increased Chilling Ground Area
22.description:
{Frozen Ground} affects a larger area.

You and your allies standing on your {Frozen Ground} gain a chance to inflict frostbite on hit.

23.name: Avalanche Increased Damage To Frozen
23.description:
Avalanche hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled against frozen enemies.

24.name: Avalanche Increased Fall and Damage Area
24.description: Avalanche boulders fall in a larger area, and each boulder has a larger area of impact.

25.name: Avalanche Increased Damage Area
25.description: Avalanche boulders have a larger area of impact.

26.name: Avalanche Increased Fall Area
26.description: Boulders fall in a larger area. This reduces your chance to hit single targets.

2.name: Avalanche Channeled
2.description: Avalanche is now channeled, creating 1 large boulder every 1.5 seconds and 5 small boulders every second, but has a channeling cost every second.

3.name: Avalanche Fall Area Reduces
3.description: Small boulders now fall in a smaller area up to a maximum, causing them to hit more precisely at the target location.

6.name: Avalanche Follows You
6.description:
The persisting Avalanche is now cast around you and follows your movement.

The large boulders will automatically target enemies within 6 meters.

9.name: Avalanche Physical Conversion
9.description: Avalanche's base cold damage is converted to physical damage, and freeze rate multiplier bonuses from this tree are converted to increased stun chance.

13.name: Avalanche Storm Totem Synergy
13.description: While in range of a {Storm Totem}, Avalanche hits deal additional lightning damage.

17.name: Avalanche Fissure
17.description:
Large boulders will cause a {Fissure} to open underneath them, dealing physical damage over 4 seconds to enemies who stand on it.

You can have a maximum of 1 {Fissure} at a time.

20.name: Avalanche Cold Conversion
20.description: Avalanche's base physical damage is converted to cold damage, and increased stun chance provided by this tree is converted to freeze rate multiplier.

4.name: Avalanche Earthquake On Third Large Boulder

14.name: Avalanche Chance For Storm Stack
14.description: Boulder hits have a chance to grant you a {Storm Stack}.

27.name: Avalanche Chance to Summon Elemental
27.description:
Large boulders have a chance to form into a {Coldstone Elemental}, which is a melee minion that deals cold and physical damage and decays over time.

You can summon up to 9 {Coldstone Elementals}, and summoning past this maximum will refresh the decay and health of the most decayed one.

28.name: Avalanche Buffs Elementals
28.description: When a {Coldstone Elemental} is hit by a boulder, they regain health and gain {Frenzy} and {Haste} for a short duration.

3.name: Shield Throw Target Allies Grant Armor
3.description: Shield Throw can target and ricochet to allies other than yourself, and when it hits allies they are granted {Steel Defense} for a duration, granting them additional armor.

8.name: Shield Throw Lava Burst Increased Area
8.description: {Lava Burst} deals damage in a larger area and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

9.name: Shield Throw Lava Burst Increased Damage
9.description: {Lava Burst} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Shield Throw Fire Damage And Fire Pen
10.description: Shield Throw deals additional throwing fire damage and penetrate enemy fire resistance.

12.name: Shield Throw Increased Fire Damage
12.description: Shield Throw deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Shield Throw Ignite Chance
13.description: Shield Throw and {Lava Burst} hits have a chance to ignite enemies and ignites it inflicts last longer.

16.name: Shield Throw Less Mana Cost
16.description: Shield Throw costs less mana.

17.name: Shield Throw Colossus Buff On Hit
17.description:
Shield Throw's hits grant you a stack of {Colossus} for 4 seconds. This can stack up to 20 times.

Each stack grants you increased armor and additional physical penetration.

18.name: Shield Throw Leech And Steal Armor
18.description:
Shield Throw leeches a portion of its damage to you.

Additionally you steal armor from enemies you hit for 4 seconds, meaning you reduce their armor and gain additional armor yourself.

19.name: Shield Throw Armor Shred
19.description: Shield Throw's hits shred enemy armor.

21.name: Shield Throw Added Physical Damage
21.description: Shield Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits deal additional throwing damage.

22.name: Shield Throw Added Critical Strike Chance
22.description: Improves Shield Throw's base critical strike chance.

25.name: Shield Throw Stun and Slow Chance
25.description: Shield Throw has a chance to slow and increased chance to stun enemies.

26.name: Shield Throw Bleed And Phys Shred Chance
26.description: Shield Throw's hits have a chance to inflict bleed and shred enemy physical resistance.

27.name: Shield Throw Haste on Cast
27.description: When you use Shield Throw, you are granted {Haste} for a duration.

5.name: Shield Throw Grant Allies Stun Avoidance
5.description: {Steel Defense} also grants allies stun avoidance when Shield Throw hits them.

4.name: Shield Throw Whirlwind Attack on Manifest Armor
4.description:
If your {Manifest Armor} is hit by the shield, it performs a sweeping melee attack.

This attack cannot be triggered when the shield has no ricochets remaining.

6.name: Shield Throw Grant Increased Armor and Elemental and Poison Protection
6.description: The benefits granted by {Steel Defense} scale with your Attunement.

7.name: Shield Throw Cast Lava Burst on Impact
7.description: Whenever Shield Throw ricochets on an enemy it casts {Lava Burst,} a spell dealing fire damage to all enemies near the impact.

11.name: Shield Throw Convert to Fire and Convert Stun to Ignite
11.description:
Shield Throw's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance for Shield Throw. 
Physical resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to fire resistance shred chance for Shield Throw.

20.name: Shield Throw Increased Chain
20.description: Shield Throw ricochets to additional targets and you regain health whenever Shield Throw Ricochets, scaling with your Dexterity.

23.name: Shield Throw Damage Increase from Block
23.description: Shield Throw deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to a portion of your block chance.

24.name: Shield Throw Cannot Block and Damage Increase from Block
24.description: Shield Throw deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to 100% of your block chance, but you have reduced all resistances while Shield Throw is released.

29.name: Shield Throw Critical Strike Multiplier from Block
29.description: Shield Throw has additional critical strike multiplier scaling with your block effectiveness.

14.name: Shield Throw Projectile And Attack Speed
14.description: Shield Throw has increased attack speed and projectile speed.

15.name: Shield Throw Increased Mana Cost and Chain
15.description: Shield Throw ricochets to additional targets, but it costs additional mana.

2.name: Shield Throw Added Cooldown More Damage
2.description: Shield Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Shield Throw has a longer cooldown.

28.name: Shield Throw Frenzy
28.description: Shield Throw's hits grants you the {Frenzy} buff for a short duration.

31.name: Shield Throw Ricochet Bounce To You
31.description: Shield Throw can ricochet between additional targets, including you if there are no other targets.

30.name: Shield Throw Frailty Chance
30.description: Shield Throw's hits have a chance to apply {Frailty}.

33.name: Shield Throw No Cooldown
33.description:
Shield Throw can be thrown while you have a shield out, but shields are smaller and deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This node has no effect if {Siege Breaker} is allocated.

0.name: Reaper Form Root Node
0.description: {Reap} turns into a spinning attack which deals more damage, but has reduced move distance.

2.name: Reaper Form Increased Damage and Reduced Healing
2.description: While in Reaper Form, you deal increased damage but have reduced healing effectiveness.

3.name: Reaper Form Movespeed at Low Health
3.description: You move faster for 4 seconds after using {Reap} while below half health.

4.name: Reaper Form Leech on Reap
4.description: {Reap} deals damage in a larger area and you leech a portion of the damage its hits deal as health.

5.name: Reaper Form Reap Gain Health on Kill
5.description: While in Reaper Form you gain health from kills. This bonus is doubled for kills using {Reap}.

6.name: Reaper Form Lose Health on Kill and Increased Critical Strike Chance
6.description: While in Reaper Form, you deal increased damage and have increased critical strike chance, but lose health when you kill an enemy.

7.name: Reaper Form Health Lost Increases Damage
7.description: {Reap} deal more damage for each percent of health you are missing (multiplicative with other modifiers). You deal increased damage at low health while in Reaper Form.

8.name: Reaper Form Reap Culls Enemies
8.description: {Reap} hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

10.name: Reaper Form Added Necrotic Damage
10.description: While in Reaper Form, you deal additional necrotic damage. This bonus is doubled for {Reap}.

11.name: Reaper Form Increased Critical Multiplier
11.description: While in Reaper Form, your critical strikes deal more damage. This bonus is doubled for {Reap}.

13.name: Reaper Form Reap Increased Travel Distance
13.description: {Reap} moves you further.

15.name: Reaper Form Reap Increased Poison Chance
15.description: {Reap} has a chance to poison enemies, and poisons you inflict while in Reaper Form last longer.

16.name: Reaper Form Poison On Transform
16.description: Entering Reaper Form poisons all nearby enemies. While in Reaper Form, you have a chance to poison enemies that you hit.

17.name: Reaper Form Mark For Death
17.description: While in Reaper Form, you have a chance apply {Mark For Death} to enemies on hit. This chance is doubled for {Reap}.

18.name: Reaper Form Increased Attack Speed and Cast Speed
18.description: You have increased attack, cast speed and movement speed while in Reaper Form.

19.name: Reaper Form Increased Spell Damage
19.description: Gain a stack of {Reaper’s Ascendance} every 5 seconds you spend in Reaper Form, which grants you increased spell damage. You can have up to 25 stacks of Reaper’s Ascendance at a time.

20.name: Reaper Form Faster Spell Damage Buildup
20.description: You gain stacks of Reaper’s Ascendence more frequently.

21.name: Reaper Form Reduced Health Decay
21.description: While in Reaper Form, your health decays more slowly and you deal increased damage over time.

22.name: Reaper Form Armour from Intelligence
22.description: While in Reaper Form, you gain additional armor proportional to your intelligence.

25.name: Reaper Form Ward On Hit
25.description: While in Reaper Form, you have more ward retention. {Reap} grants ward on hit.

26.name: Reaper Form Grant Ward on Transform to Human
26.description: {Reaper’s Blessing} also grants ward when you transform back to your human form.

27.name: Reaper Form Resummon Skeletons
27.description: Entering Reaper Form summons {Skeletons}, unless you are already at your maximum number of Skeletons.

31.name: Reaper Form Increased Reap Healing
31.description: While in Reaper Form you have increased healing effectiveness and leech more of the damage you deal. You gain additional health on hit with {Reap}.

24.name: Reaper Form Protections from Intelligence
24.description: You have more armor and protections if you've recently killed an enemy (last 4 seconds).

34.name: Reaper Form Blood Tether
34.description: While in Reaper Form, you have a chance to retaliate with {Blood Tether} when you are hit.

9.name: Reaper Form Convert Reap to Cold Damage
9.description:
All of {Reap}'s base damage and its added melee damage from intelligence are converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Poison chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} for Reap, and Reap gains a freeze rate equal to four times your intelligence.

Reap loses its {Necrotic} and {Poison} tags and gains a {Cold} tag instead.

30.name: Reaper Form Reap Cast Hungering Souls on Kill
30.description: You have a chance to cast {Hungering Souls} whenever you kill an enemy with {Reap}.

14.name: Reaper Form Convert Reap Poison But No Crit
14.description: Reap poisons enemies. It also gains the {Poison} tag.

23.name: Reaper Form Potion Efficacy
23.description: While in Reaper Form, potions grant twice as much health as normal.

28.name: Reaper Form Grant Ward on Transform to Reaper
28.description: You gain ward when entering Reaper Form.

29.name: Reaper Form Reap Heals Minions
29.description: Hitting minions with {Reap} heals them for the same amount that Reap would heal you if an enemy was hit.

32.name: Reaper Form No Shared Transplant Cooldown
32.description: {Reap} has a much longer cooldown, but no longer shares a cooldown with other traversal skills.

12.name: Reaper Form Physical Conversion
12.description:
All of {Reap}'s base damage and its added melee damage from intelligence are converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage. You have additional physical penetration while in Reaper Form.

All poison related effects from this tree now affect bleed for Reap.

Reap loses its {Necrotic} tag and gains a {Physical} tag instead.

4.nodeName: Bear Form Swipe Lightning Damage For 6 Seconds
4.name: Bear Form Swipe Lightning Damage For 6 Seconds

7.name: Bear Form Damage With Maul And Rampage

8.name: Bear Form Movespeed And Stun With Rampage

9.name: Bear Form Damage With Rampage And Damage While Rampaging

10.nodeName: Bear Form Haste And Ailment Cleanse On Exit
10.name: Bear Form Haste And Ailment Cleanse On Exit

13.nodeName: Bear Form Armor Shred With Rampage And Maul
13.name: Bear Form Armor Shred With Rampage And Maul

15.nodeName: Bear Form Crit Chance With Rampage And Maul Crit Chance In Form
15.name: Bear Form Crit Chance With Rampage And Maul Crit Chance In Form

17.nodeName: Bear Form Cast Storm Lightning While Rampaging
17.name: Bear Form Cast Storm Lightning While Rampaging

18.nodeName: Bear Form Health And Rage On Kill Or Hit Rare Or Boss
18.name: Bear Form Health And Rage On Kill Or Hit Rare Or Boss

21.nodeName: Bear Form Area With Maul And Warcry
21.name: Bear Form Area With Maul And Warcry

22.nodeName: Bear Form Cooldown Recovery Speed With Maul
22.name: Bear Form Cooldown Recovery Speed With Maul

24.nodeName: Bear Form Minion Damage Buff On Maul
24.name: Bear Form Minion Damage Buff On Maul

27.nodeName: Bear Form Damage To Stunned Enemies With Maul And Gain Rage When Hitting Stunned
27.name: Bear Form Damage To Stunned Enemies With Maul And Gain Rage When Hitting Stunned

29.name: Bear Form Slower Rage Decay

6.nodeName: Bear Form Chance To Cast Maelstrom
6.name: Bear Form Chance To Cast Maelstrom

12.nodeName: Bear Form Auto Roar After Rampage
12.name: Bear Form Auto Roar After Rampage

31.nodeName: Bear Form Maul Fury Leap Tree
31.name: Bear Form Maul Fury Leap Tree

32.nodeName: Bear Form Use Upheaval On Maul
32.name: Bear Form Use Upheaval On Maul

34.nodeName: Bear Form Cast Entangling Roots On Maul
34.name: Bear Form Cast Entangling Roots On Maul

0.name: Shatter Strike Root Node
0.description: {Ice Spikes} hits deal more damage and have an increased chance to freeze enemies.

2.name: Shatter Strike Increased Mana Efficiency
2.description: Shatter Strike costs less mana and grants you ward when you attack with it and hit at least one enemy.

3.name: Shatter Strike Chance to Apply Frostbite On Hit
3.description: Shatter Strike has a chance to inflict enemies with {Frostbite}.

4.name: Shatter Strike Frostbite Increased Effectiveness Per Intelligence
4.description: {Frostbite} inflicted by Shatter Strike has additional Cold Penetration.

6.name: Shatter Strike Reduced Attack Speed and Increased Damage
6.description: Shatter Strike deals more damage, but has less attack speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

7.name: Shatter Strike More Damage to High Health Enemies
7.description:
Shatter Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled against enemies at high health.

8.name: Shatter Strike Increased Area and Cold Penetration
8.description: Shatter Strike deals damage in a larger area and penetrates enemy cold resistance.

9.name: Shatter Strike Equipped Swords Increase Crit Multi
9.description: Shatter Strike’s critical strikes deal more damage per equipped sword.

10.name: Shatter Strike Increased Cull Threshold
10.description: Shatter Strike's instant kill on frozen enemies occurs at a higher health threshold.

11.name: Shatter Strike Mana Gain On Cull
11.description: Shatter Strike grants mana when it kills a frozen enemy.

15.name: Shatter Strike Increased Damage and Area
15.description: Shatter Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

17.name: Shatter Strike Increased Attack Speed and Cannot Be Used with Wand or 2H
17.description: Shatter Strike has increased attack speed, but cannot be used if you have a wand or two-handed weapon equipped.

18.name: Shatter Strike Recently Used Increases Cold Damage and Freeze Chance
18.description: You deal more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and are more likely to freeze enemies if you have used Shatter Strike recently (past 4 seconds).

19.name: Shatter Strike Armor Gained On Hit Against Frozen Enemies
19.description:
When you use and hit at least one enemy with Shatter Strike, you gain additional armor for 4 seconds.

This effect is doubled if you hit a frozen enemy.

20.name: Shatter Strike Elemental Protection Gained On Hit Against Frozen Enemies
20.description:
You take less cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 4 seconds after hitting an enemy with Shatter Strike. 

This effect is doubled when hitting a frozen enemy.

21.name: Shatter Strike Ward Gained On Hit Against Frozen Enemies
21.description:
You gain ward when you use Shatter Strike and hit at least one enemy.

This effect is doubled if you hit a frozen enemy.

23.name: Shatter Strike Ice Spikes Increased Damage and Projectile Speed
23.description: {Ice Spikes} deal more damage and move faster, causing them to travel farther.

24.name: Shatter Strike Increased Freeze Rate
24.description: Shatter Strike has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

25.name: Shatter Strike More Damage Against Frozen Enemies
25.description:
Shatter Strike's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled against frozen enemies.

5.name: Shatter Strike Convert Ignite to Frostbite
5.description: Shatter Strike hits convert all stacks of ignite on enemies into {Frostbite}.

12.name: Shatter Strike Knock Back on Arc Collision
12.description: Enemies hit by both of Shatter Strike’s arcs are knocked back.

13.name: Shatter Strike Chill On Hit
13.description: Shatter Strike chills enemies.

14.name: Shatter Strike Haste on Cull
14.description: Shatter Strike grants {Haste} for two seconds when it kills a frozen enemy.

16.name: Shatter Strike Additional Cast and Increased Mana Cost
16.description: Shatter Strike recasts after it finishes, but costs more mana and has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers). You can use other skills during the recasts.

22.name: Shatter Strike Ice Spikes on Attack
22.description: Shatter Strike fires {Ice Spikes} from the edge of its area of effect.

26.name: Shatter Strike Chilled Ground On Cast
26.description: Shatter Strike leaves a patch of {Frozen Ground} for 5 seconds, which chills enemies who walk on it each second.

28.nodeName: Shurikens Critical Strike Chance And Hit Damage
28.name: Shurikens Critical Strike Chance And Hit Damage

29.name: Shurikens Critical Multiplier

7.name: Shurikens Hit Damage Per Ailment

10.nodeName: Shurikens Chakram Damage Per Extra Shuriken
10.name: Shurikens Chakram Damage Per Extra Shuriken

8.name: Shurikens Any Angle

30.name: Shurikens Chakram

6.nodeName: Manifest Weapon More Mana Less Cooldown
6.name: Manifest Weapon More Mana Less Cooldown

7.nodeName: Manifest Weapon More Damage To Bleeding Or Stunned
7.name: Manifest Weapon More Damage To Bleeding Or Stunned

8.nodeName: Manifest Weapon Melee Physical Damage Buff On Hit
8.name: Manifest Weapon Melee Physical Damage Buff On Hit

9.nodeName: Manifest Weapon Armor Buff On Hit
9.name: Manifest Weapon Armor Buff On Hit

10.nodeName: Manifest Weapon Increased Stun Chance On Hit
10.name: Manifest Weapon Increased Stun Chance On Hit

11.nodeName: Manifest Weapon Increased Damage and Cooldown
11.name: Manifest Weapon Increased Damage and Cooldown

2.name: Frenzy Totem Added Duration and Health
2.description: Frenzy Totem has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and lasts longer.

3.name: Frenzy Totem Increased Area
3.description: Frenzy Totem affects allies or enemies in a larger area.

4.name: Frenzy Totem Chance to Cast Eterra
4.description: While in range of your Frenzy Totem, you have a chance to cast {Eterra's Blessing} on a random ally each second.

5.name: Frenzy Totem Stores Damage Taken and Releases as Damage
5.description: Frenzy Totem stores a portion of the damage it receives, releasing it as damage dealt to enemies after taking a percent of its maximum health in damage.

6.name: Frenzy Totem Stores Player Damage Taken
6.description: Frenzy Totem also stores a percentage of the damage taken by you.

7.name: Frenzy Totem Chance to Cast Ice Thorns
7.description: Frenzy Totem has a chance to cast {Ice Thorns} when hit by enemies.

9.name: Frenzy Totem Cast Totem in Direction and Grants Buff
9.description:
Frenzy Totem is no longer summoned at your cursor; instead it is always placed 1 meter in the direction you're facing.

Frenzy Totem costs less mana and grants additional melee damage.

11.name: Frenzy Totem Tether Increased Range
11.description: Frenzy Totem's tether has a higher range.

13.name: Frenzy Totem Tether Crit Multi
13.description: You have additional critical strike multiplier while tethered.

14.name: Frenzy Totem Allies Increased Health Regen
14.description: Allies affected by Frenzy Totem are granted increased health regeneration.

15.name: Frenzy Totem Allies Granted Haste On Hit
15.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem, you and your companions are granted {Haste} for a duration (doubled for companions).

17.name: Frenzy Totem Companions in Range Increased Armor and Protections
17.description: Companions affected by Frenzy Totem have higher physical and elemental resistance.

18.name: Frenzy Totem Reduced Revive Time while In Range
18.description: While affected by Frenzy Totem, you revive downed companions faster.

20.name: Frenzy Totem Grant Allies Chance to Poison
20.description: Allies affected by Frenzy Totem are granted a chance to poison enemies.

22.name: Frenzy Totem Increased Frenzy Effect
22.description: Frenzy Totem's Frenzy buff is more effective.

23.name: Frenzy Totem Increased Damage and Crit and Reduced Protections on Summon
23.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem you gain a temporary buff that grants you more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased melee attack speed, but also increases the damage you take.

24.name: Frenzy Totem Companions Added Physical Damage on Totem Summon
24.description: When you summon Frenzy Totem, your companions are granted additional melee physical damage for 4 seconds.

28.name: Frenzy Totem Wolf Howl Grants Increased Crit Chance
28.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Wolves' howls also grant increased critical strike chance to you and your allies.

29.name: Frenzy Totem Scorpion Poison Nova Increased Area
29.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Scorpion's {Venom Nova} hits in a larger area.

8.name: Frenzy Totem Slows and Shreds Armor
8.description:
Frenzy Totem is now {Sloth Totem,} which will now slow and reduce the armor of enemies instead of granting Frenzy.

Increased effect of frenzy is converted to increased effect of armor shred.

10.name: Frenzy Totem Tether
10.description: You are tethered to the totem while you remain within 5 meters of it, and while tethered you deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Frenzy Totem Only Companions Affected and Increased Effectiveness
16.description: Frenzy Totem's buffs are more effective, but Frenzy Totem now affects only companions.

19.name: Frenzy Totem Heal Allies on Companion Revival
19.description: Whenever you revive a downed companion, Frenzy Totem casts {Healing Nova.}

25.name: Frenzy Totem Refresh Companion Cooldowns on Summon Totem
25.description: Summoning Frenzy Totem refreshes companion ability cooldowns.

26.name: Frenzy Totem Sabertooth Double Frenzy
26.description: While Frenzy Totem is active, your Sabertooth's {Flurry Swipes} casts an additional time when used.

1.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Base Spell Damage
1.description: Skeletal Mages deal additional spell damage.

2.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Sacrifice Wraiths
2.description: Skeletal Mages can cast {Profane Oblation} on your melee Wraiths and Blood Spectres, sacrificing them to deal necrotic damage to surrounding enemies.

3.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Sacrifice Skeletons
3.description: Skeletal Mages can cast {Profane Oblation} on your Skeleton Warriors, Skeleton Rogues, and Skeleton Vanguards, sacrificing them to deal necrotic damage to surrounding enemies.

5.name: Summon Skeleton Mage No Mage or Pyro
5.description: Removes regular Skeletal Mages and Pyromancers from the pool of Skeletal Mages that can be summoned, and your Skeletal Mages deal increased damage.

6.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Stun and Freeze
6.description: Skeletal Mages have an increased chance to stun enemies and an increased freeze rate.

7.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Poison Chance
7.description: Skeletal Mage hits have a chance to poison enemies.

8.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Frenzy On Hit
8.description: Skeletal Mages have a chance to gain {Frenzy} for 3 seconds when they hit an enemy.

10.name: Summon Skeleton Mage No Mages
10.description: Your Skeletal Mages have increased health, but regular Skeletal Mages are removed from the summon pool of Skeletal Mages.

11.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Ignite and Poison
11.description: Ignites and poisons inflicted by Skeletal Mages last longer and have additional Penetration.

12.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Crit Chance
12.description: Improves Skeletal Mages' base critical strike chance and they move faster.

13.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Health On Crit
13.description: Skeletal Mages' critical strikes deal more damage, and when they critically strike they are healed for a percentage of their maximum health.

15.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Health and Leech
15.description: Skeletal Mages leech a portion of the damage they deal as health and have increased maximum health.

17.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Melee Fire Damage
17.description: Death Knight melee hits deal additional fire damage.

18.name: Summon Skeleton Mage DK Projectile Spell
18.description: Death Knights cast {Hungering Souls} with additional projectiles. Hungering Souls has an 8 second cooldown when cast by Death Knights.

20.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Cooldown Recovery Speed
20.description: Skeletal Mages are able to use their abilities more frequently.

21.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Chance For Extra Projectiles
21.description:
Skeletal Mages have a chance to fire 2 additional projectiles. 

Skeletal Mages have an increased area of effect with melee attacks.

23.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Attack and Cast Speed
23.description: Skeletal Mages attack and cast faster (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Ward Regen
24.description: Skeletal Mages' gain ward over time and have a chance to avoid critical strikes.

4.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Cryomancer
4.description:
Adds {Cryomancers} to the pool of Skeletal Mages that can be summoned. Cryomancers deal cold damage and cast {Ice Shard}.

All poison chance gained from this tree is converted to chill chance for Cryomancers.

9.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Pyromancer
9.description:
Adds Pyromancers to the summon pool of Skeletal Mages that can be summoned. Pyromancers deal fire damage and cast {Fireball}.
 
All poison chance gained from this tree is converted to ignite chance for Pyromancers.

14.name: Summon Skeleton Mage More Mages Alpha
14.description: You can summon more Skeletal Mages.

16.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Death Knights
16.description: Adds Death Knights to the summon pool of Skeletal Mages, which uses melee necrotic attacks, and removes all other types of Skeletal Mages from the pool.

19.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Mortar
19.description: Skeletal Mages cast {Necrotic Mortar}, a ranged necrotic spell with a large area of effect. Necrotic Mortar has a 6 second cooldown.

22.name: Summon Skeleton Mage One Mage
22.description: You can only summon one Skeletal Mage, an Archmage, that has significantly more maximum health and damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers), fires twice the number of extra projectiles, and is larger.

26.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Damage Per Mana
26.description: Skeletal Mages deal more damage based on your maximum mana.

27.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Teleportation
27.description: When you directly cast Summon Skeletal Mage you are teleported to the target location. Summon Skeletal Mage now has a cooldown and counts as {Traversal} skill.

28.name: Summon Skeleton Mage Minion Teleportation
28.description: When you teleport using Summon Skeletal Mage some of your other minions are teleported with you.

2.name: Tempest Strike Gladiator Of Lagon Chance On Tempest
2.description: You now have a chance to gain a stack of {Gladiator of Lagon} when you cast a {Tempest}.

3.name: Tempest Strike Freeze Rate Shock Chance And Damage
3.description:
{Frigid Tempest} has a higher chance to freeze enemies.
{Thunder Tempest} has a chance to shock enemies.
{Wind Tempest} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

30.name: Tempest Strike Frigid Tempest Chance On Other Strikes

4.name: Tempest Strike Thunder Tempest Chance On Other Strikes
4.description: You have a chance to also cast {Thunder Tempest} when you attack with cold or physical Tempest Strike.

5.name: Tempest Strike Wind Tempest Chance On Other Strikes
5.description: You have a chance to also cast {Wind Tempest} when you attack with lightning or cold Tempest Strike.

6.name: Tempest Strike Tempest On Non Hits
6.description: If Tempest Strike's melee attack does not hit an enemy you consume a stack of {Gladiator of Lagon} to cast a {Tempest} of the respective type.

7.name: Tempest Strike Double Gladiator Of Lagon Effect
7.description: {Gladiator of Lagon} has double the effect on your totems and {Storm Crows} if you have at least 50 Intelligence.

8.name: Tempest Strike Elemental Penetration Per Minion
8.description: Tempest Strike penetrates enemy physical resistance per active physical minion, penetrates cold resistance per cold minion and penetrates lightning resistance per lightning minion.

9.name: Tempest Strike Regain Health From Endurance Threshold
9.description: Whenever you cast a {Tempest} you also regain a portion of your Endurance Threshold as health.

10.name: Tempest Strike Transformed Tempest Strike
10.description:
While transformed and you use any melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to cast each {Tempest} of a matching damage type.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of Tempest Strike's mana cost.

11.name: Tempest Strike More Damage Per Mana Cost
11.description: Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1 mana cost, but it also costs additional mana.

12.name: Tempest Strike Tempest Totem
12.description: You now create a {Tempest Totem} that casts a {Tempest} of the corresponding strike that created the totem. You are limited to 1 of each type of totem.

13.name: Tempest Strike More Totem Cast Speed
13.description: Your {Tempest Totems} gain a random amount of more cast speed (multiplicative with other modifiers) when summoned.

14.name: Tempest Strike Storm Bolts
14.description:
You now expend {Storm Stacks} when you use Tempest Strike and hit at least one enemy with the melee attack.

{Storm Bolts} cast this way deal more damage.

15.name: Tempest Strike More Damage And Area
15.description: Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

16.name: Tempest Strike Melee Damage Per Axe Or Mace Spell Damage With 2h
16.description: Tempest Strike deals additional melee damage per equipped axe or mace and additional spell damage while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

17.name: Tempest Strike More Melee Damage And Area
17.description:
Tempest Strike deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

These effects are doubled while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

18.name: Tempest Strike Removes Wind Tempest
18.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Wind Tempest}, but it does not remove the physical strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

19.name: Tempest Strike Melee Cold Damage And Freeze Rate
19.description:
Tempest Strike deals additional melee damage per 2 Attunement.

All the melee strikes have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

20.name: Tempest Strike Removes Thunder Tempest
20.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Thunder Tempest}, but it does not remove the lightning strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

23.name: Tempest Strike Mana Recovery On No Tempest
23.description: You recover mana if whenever you use Tempest Strike and it hits an enemy and it doesn't cast a {Tempest}.

24.name: Tempest Strike Removes Frigid Tempest
24.description:
Tempest Strike can no longer cast {Frigid Tempest}, but it does not remove the cold strike from the combo.

Additioanlly, Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

25.name: Tempest Strike Attack Speed And Less Mana Cost
25.description: Tempest Strike has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

26.name: Tempest Strike Elemental Penetration Per Resistance
26.description: Tempest Strike penetrates enemy resistances per your uncapped resistances corresponding to a specific type.

27.name: Tempest Strike Wind Tempest Shared Haste
27.description:
Whenever you cast {Wind Tempest} you and your other allies it touches gain {Haste} for a short duration.

Additionally, Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you have Haste.

28.name: Tempest Strike Tornado Chance
28.description:
Whenever you cast {Wind Tempest} you have a chance to also cast {Tornado}.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of Tornados mana cost.

29.name: Tempest Strike Tornado Buffs
29.description: {Tornados} cast from {Wind Tempest} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

32.name: Tempest Strike Frigid Tempest Chill And Freeze
32.description:
{Frigid Tempest} chills on enemies it hits.

Additionally, Tempest Strike has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

33.name: Tempest Strike Frigid Tempest During Avalanche
33.description: While channeling {Avalanche} you now also cast {Frigid Tempest} every second.

34.name: Tempest Strike Thunder Tempest Shock Chance
34.description:
{Thunder Tempest} shocks enemies it hits.

Additionally, Tempest Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to shocked enemies.

35.name: Tempest Strike Thunder Tempest Around Storm Totem
35.description: Whenever you cast {Thunder Tempest} you also cast it around your nearest {Storm Totem}.

25.name: Spriggan Form Chance For More Thorns From Totems On Spirit Thorns Use
