35.nodeName: Spriggan Form Vines Use Spirit Thorns Instead Of Melee
35.name: Spriggan Form Vines Use Spirit Thorns Instead Of Melee

14.nodeName: Spriggan Form Thorn Shield Only Cast On You
14.name: Spriggan Form Thorn Shield Only Cast On You

1.name: Ring of Shields Additional Shields
1.description: You summon additional shields.

2.name: Ring of Shields Heal Nearby Allies
2.description: Every 6 seconds each Shield heals nearby allies.

3.name: Ring of Shields Grant Allies Armor and Protections on Heal
3.description: When Shields heal allies, they also increase their armor for 4 seconds. This effect does not stack.

4.name: Ring of Shields Grant Allies Added Block Protection on Heal
4.description: When Shields heal allies, they also grant them a non stacking increased block effectiveness buff for 4 seconds.

5.name: Ring of Shields Warpath Makes Shields Spin Faster and Shields Take Less Damage
5.description: While using {Warpath}, your Shields spin faster and take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Ring of Shields Increased Healing
6.description: Shields have increased healing effectiveness.

7.name: Ring of Shields Reduced Mana Cost and Reduced Shield Health
7.description: Ring of Shields costs less mana, but Shields have reduced health.

8.name: Ring of Shields Heal on Shield Death
8.description: You are healed any time one of your Shields dies.

9.name: Ring of Shields Cast Shrapnel on Death
9.description: Shields shatter into {Shrapnel} when they die, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies.

10.name: Ring of Shields Shrapnel Increased Stun Chance
10.description: {Shrapnel} created by your dying Shields has a signficantly increased chance to stun enemies.

11.name: Ring of Shields Added Block Chance on Cast
11.description: You have additional chance to block and a higher block effectiveness if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

12.name: Ring of Shields Player Cannot Take Damage or Move on Cast
12.description: You are invulnerable for 1 second after casting Ring of Shields, but you cannot move or use abilities.

14.name: Ring of Shields Slow Enemies When Hit
14.description: Shields have a chance to slow enemies that hit them.

16.name: Ring of Shields Increased Shield Health and Armor and Protections
16.description: Shields have increased health and additional physical resistance.

17.name: Ring of Shields Added Duration
17.description: Ring of Shields lasts longer.

20.name: Ring of Shields Convert to Fire Damage and Shield Reduced Fire Damage Taken and Ignite Enemies
20.description:
Shields take less fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and have a chance to ignite enemies that hit them. 

If you have the {Collateral Damage} node the base physical damage of the {Shrapnel} it creates is converted to fire damage.

22.name: Ring of Shields Added Damage and Rotate Faster
22.description: Shields deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and shields rotate faster.

23.name: Ring of Shields Added Fire Damage
23.description: You deal additional fire damage with spells and attacks if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

24.name: Ring of Shields Increased Area
24.description: Shields rotate around you at a greater distance.

26.name: Ring of Shields More Additional Shields
26.description: Ring of Shields summons additional Shields, but costs more mana.

28.name: Ring of Shields Increased Melee Fire Damage
28.description: You deal increased melee fire damage if you have cast Ring of Shields recently (last 4 seconds).

13.name: Ring of Shields Position Shields in Front of Player and Increase Area
13.description: While using {Shield Rush}, your Shields form a wall in front of you, increasing the area you hit.

15.name: Ring of Shields Push Enemies
15.description: Shields push enemies away from you every 4 seconds.

18.name: Ring of Shields Potions also Heal Shields
18.description: Consuming a potion also heals your Shields.

19.name: Ring of Shields Reflect Damage
19.description: Shields reflect a percentage of damage taken to attackers.

21.name: Ring of Shields Fire Damage Over Time
21.description: Shields now emanate {Forge Flames}, dealing fire damage over time to surrounding enemies.

27.name: Ring of Shields Plant at Target Location and Increased Health
27.description: Ring of Shields is cast at your target location instead, but Shields no longer follow you. Shields have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and last much longer.

1.name: Forge Strike Increased Critical Chance and Multiplier
1.description: Improves Forge Strike's base critical chance, and critical strikes deal more damage.

2.name: Forge Strike Cooldown Recovery Speed
2.description: Forge Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed and attack speed. The attack speed bonus also applies to your Forged Weapons.

3.name: Forge Strike Generate Ward When Weapon is Forged
3.description: You are granted ward when Forge Strike summons a {Forged Weapon}.

8.name: Forge Strike Increased Damage and Stun Chance
8.description: Forge Strike and {Forged Weapons} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have an increased chance to stun enemies.

9.name: Forge Strike Armor Shred
9.description: Forge Strike hits reduce enemy armor, and armor shred applied by it last longer with increased effect.

11.name: Forge Strike Added Melee Physical Damage On Use
11.description: You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

12.name: Forge Strike Grants Armor
12.description: You have increased armor if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

15.name: Forge Strike Increased Area
15.description: Forge Strike and {Forged Weapons'} hits deal damage in a larger area

17.name: Forge Strike Added Fire Damage
17.description: Forge Strike deals additional melee fire damage and more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Forge Strike Eruption Increased Damage
19.description: {Detonating Ground} hits deal more damage.

20.name: Forge Strike Eruption Ignite Chance
20.description: {Detonating Ground} has a chance to ignite enemies on hit.

21.name: Forge Strike Forged Weapons Added Fire Damage
21.description:
{Forged Weapons} deal additional melee fire damage.

{Forged Weapons} gain the {fire} tag.

22.name: Forge Strike Forged Weapons Increased Duration
22.description: {Forged Weapons} last longer and you can control more forged weapons at once.

24.name: Forge Strike Increased Chance to Forge Weapons
24.description: Forge Strike has a higher chance to summon {Forged Weapons}. This added chance is much higher against bosses and rare enemies.

25.name: Forge Strike Forged Weapons Chance to Explode on Death
25.description: {Forged Weapons} have a much shorter duration, but deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and explode when they expire, dealing fire and physical damage to nearby enemies.

26.name: Forge Strike Bleed Effect
26.description: Bleed inflicted by Forge Strike has additional Physical Penetration and lasts longer.

30.name: Forge Strike More Fire Damage Buff
30.description: You have additional global Fire Penetration if you have used Forge Strike recently (last 4 seconds).

4.name: Forge Strike Forged Weapons Generate Ward and Do Not Move
4.description: {Forged Weapons} no longer move or attack, but generate ward when you are near them.

5.name: Forge Strike Cannot Forge Weapons and Increased Crit Chance
5.description: Improves Forge Strike's base critical chance and its hits inflict bleeding on hit, but your maximum number of {Forged Weapons} is halved.

6.name: Forge Strike Summon Sword
6.description:
Converts Forge Strike into a sword that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike has more attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), cannot crit, and critical strike multiplier from the tree is converted to additional Physical Penetration for Bleed.

Converts to a polearm if you also have the {Spear Forge} node.

7.name: Forge Summon Spear
7.description:
Converts Forge Strike into a spear that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike critical strikes deal significantly more damage, but it hits in a smaller area.

Converts to a polearm if you also have the {Put To The Sword} node.

10.name: Forge Strike Cast at Target
10.description: Forge Strike can now be cast at your target instead of in front of you.

14.name: Forge Strike Increased Stun Chance Vs Rares And Bosses
14.description: Forge Strike hits deal more damage against rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Forge Strike Summon Anvil
16.description:
Converts Forge Strike into an anvil that falls from the sky instead. Forge Strike has an increased chance to stun enemies, and stuns it inflicts lasts longer, but it has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Additionally, when you directly use Forge Strike it deals more physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

18.name: Forge Strike Eruption
18.description: Forge Strike causes {Detonating Ground}, sending out cracks which erupt after 1.5 seconds, dealing melee fire damage and igniting enemies.

23.name: Forge Strike Summon Axe
23.description: {Forged Weapons} now have a chance to become a {Great Axe} on summon, which deal more damage in a larger area, but attack slower.

28.name: Forge Strike No Cooldown
28.description: Forge Strike has no cooldown, but costs additional mana.

29.name: Forge Strike Stun Chance To Damage Over Time
29.description: Ailments inflicted by Forge Strike deal increased damage over time equal to your increased stun chance.

1.name: Soul Feast Increased Cast Speed and Mana Efficiency
1.description: Soul Feast has increased cast speed and costs less mana.

3.name: Soul Feast Increased Area
3.description: Soul Feast deals damage in a larger area and has a chance to apply {Frailty} on hit.

4.name: Soul Feast Reduced Ward Gained and Increased Damage
4.description: Soul Feast deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but {Soul Fragments} grant less ward.

7.name: Soul Feast Mana Efficiency
7.description: Soul Feast costs less mana and can hit more targets.

8.name: Soul Feast Chance to Poison
8.description: Soul Feast's hits have a chance to poison enemies on hit.

9.name: Soul Feast Poisons Player and Gain Poison Chance On Hit
9.description: Casting Soul Feast grant you a chance to poison enemies with all hits for 4 seconds, but also inflicts you with poison. This buff cannot stack.

11.name: Soul Feast Added Ward Gain
11.description: {Soul Fragments} grant additional ward based on your intelligence.

13.name: Soul Feast Chance To Inflict Bleed On Hit
13.description:
Soul Feast has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

Physical ailments inflicted by Soul Feast deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your missing health.

17.name: Soul Feast Damned Grants Chance to Frenzy Minions On Kill
17.description: When you kill a damned enemy with Soul Feast, you have a chance to grant your minions {Frenzy} for 3 seconds.

20.name: Soul Feast Large Enemies Return More Ward
20.description: {Soul Fragments} from bosses or rare enemies grant significantly more ward.

21.name: Soul Feast Large Enemies Return Mana
21.description: {Soul Fragments} from rare or boss enemies also grant you mana. Modifiers to the amount of ward granted by Soul Fragments also apply to the amount of mana gained from this node.

25.name: Soul Feast Increased Soul Return Speed and Chance to Gain Haste
25.description: {Soul Fragments} return to you faster and Soul Feast has a chance to grant you {Haste} for 4 seconds.

6.name: Soul Feast Damned Effect
6.description: Damned inflicted by Soul Feast has additional necrotic penetration.

26.name: Soul Feast Additional Targets
26.description: Soul Feast can hit more targets.

28.name: Soul Feast Armour Shred
28.description:
Poison Chance from all sources is converted to armor shred for Soul Feast and armor shred applied by Soul Feast has increased effect.

The {Diseased Soul} node now inflicts you with armor shred on cast instead of poison.

2.name: Soul Feast Attack in Cone and No Marked for Death
2.description: Soul Feast no longer requires targets to be {Cursed} and no longer has a target limit, but now hits all enemies a small cone in front of you.

12.name: Soul Feast Convert to Physical and Restores Health
12.description:
Soul Feast's base necrotic damage is converted to physical damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

{Soul Fragments} now restore health instead of granting ward. The health restored is equal to the ward you would have been granted.

14.name: Soul Feast Blood Tether
14.description: Soul Feast has a chance to cast {Blood Tether} on enemies it hits.

15.name: Soul Feast Blood Splatter On Kill
15.description: When you kill an enemy with Soul Feast it has a chance to create a {Blood Splatter} around the target.

16.name: Soul Feast Inflict Damned
16.description: Soul Feast has additional chance to inflict damned on hit based on your Intelligence.

10.name: Soul Feast Consume Poison to Shred Armor and Protections
10.description:
Soul Feast consumes poison stacks you applied on the target, granting you more armor (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional poison resistance per stack.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and can stack a maximum number of times.

Poison stacks applied by minions or other party members are not cleansed and are not counted for the buff.

23.name: Soul Feast Chance to Return Large Soul Fragments
23.description: Soul Feast costs less mana and has a chance based on your current mana to draw back {Greater Soul Fragments}, which grant more ward (multiplicative with other modifiers).

18.name: Soul Feast Mark for Death
18.description: If the number of cursed enemies within 15 meters is at or below a threshold shortly after you cast Soul Feast, then a number of enemies within that range are {Marked for Death} to reach that threshold of cursed enemies.

19.name: Soul Feast Ward and Hit Damage per Curse
19.description: For each {Curse} on the target, Soul Feast hits grant more ward and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Soul Feast Spread Poison
22.description:
When you hit a poisoned enemy with Soul Feast it spreads all stacks of your stacks of poison from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres.

Has no effect if you have the {Toxic Craving} node.

27.name: Soul Feast Withering
27.description: Soul Feast inflicts {Withering} on hit, an ailment which increases the curse damage taken.

24.name: Soul Feast Spreads Curses
24.description: Soul Feast has a chance to chill enemies for a duration.

5.name: Soul Feast Infernal Hunger
5.description: Soul Feast is recast a random number of times. The maximum number of recasts depends on your maximum mana, and each recast consumes a percentage of Soul Feast's mana cost.

1.name: Summon Scorpion Dual Armor and Poison Prot
1.description: Your scorpion has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers), additional physical and poison resistance, and increased size.

2.name: Summon Scorpion Poison Chance and Health
2.description: Your scorpion's attacks grant health on hit, and have a higher chance to poison on hit.

3.name: Summon Scorpion Damage Per Poison
3.description: Your Scorpion deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of Poison on the target (up to 30).

4.name: Summon Scorpion Increased Melee Area
4.description: Your Scorpion's melee attacks have increased area of effect, and your Scorpion has increased attack speed.

5.name: Summon Scorpion Bleed Chance
5.description: Your Scorpion's has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, and it deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers)

8.name: Summon Scorpion Baby Damage and Poison
8.description: {Baby Scorpions} deal more damage (damage is multiplicative with other modifiers) and their attacks have a chance to poison enemies.

9.name: Summon Scorpion Baby Spawn On Activation
9.description: Activating your Scorpion's ability summons additional {Baby Scorpions.}

10.name: Summon Scorpion Baby Dodge Rating
10.description: {Baby Scorpions} have more dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Summon Scorpion Increased Baby Move and Attack Speed
11.description: {Baby Scorpions} have increased attack and movement speed.

12.name: Summon Scorpion Ele Res And Inc Area
12.description: Your Scorpion has additional elemental resistance, and its abilities have increased area of effect.

14.name: Summon Scorpion Freeze Rate
14.description: Your Scorpion deals more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

15.name: Summon Scorpion Maelstrom Chance
15.description: Your scorpion has a chance to cast {Maelstrom} whenever you do. Maelstroms cast by your scorpion in this way use your Scorpion's stats, but your Maelstrom tree.

17.name: Summon Scorpion Shock
17.description: Your Scorpion has a chance to {Shock} on hit and deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of shock on the target.

20.name: Summon Scorpion Increased Poison Damage
20.description: Your Scorpion deals more poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Summon Scorpion Increased Venom Nova Effect
22.description: Your scorpion's {Venom Nova} deals damage in a larger area, and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

23.name: Summon Scorpion Venom Nova Pool
23.description: {Venom Nova} leaves behind a {Poison Pool} for 4 seconds, which applies a stack of poison each second to enemies standing in the pool.

24.name: Summon Scorpion Retaliates With Poison Pool
24.description: Your Scorpion has a chance when it is hit to create a {Poison Pool}. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

25.name: Summon Scorpion Pool Gives Poison Chance
25.description: {Poison Pools} grant you and your minions increased attack speed and cast speed and a chance to poison enemies.

6.name: Summon Scorpion Added Melee Damage
6.description: Your Scorpion deals additional melee damage, and its Poison Chance from all sources is converted to Armour Shred Chance.

7.name: Summon Scorpion Baby Scorpions
7.description: Your Scorpion spawns a number of {Baby Scorpions} every 5 seconds. Baby Scorpions have an unlimited duration but can be killed.

13.name: Summon Scorpion Cold Conversion
13.description:
Your scorpion takes less cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

The base physical damage of your scorpion's melee attacks is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to minion cold damage, but not with increases to minion physical damage. These melee attacks now have a {Cold} tag instead of a {Physical} tag.

Your scorpion's melee attacks also gain a chance to freeze, with a freeze rate equal to twice their base damage.

26.name: Summon Scorpion Frostbite
26.description: Your scorpion has a chance to inflict {Frostbite} on hit and its Bleed Chance from all sources is converted to Frostbite Chance.

16.name: Summon Scorpion Lightning Conversion
16.description:
Your Scorpion's activated ability is now {Shock Nova}, a spell that deals lightning damage and applies 3 stacks of {Shock} on hit.

The base physical damage of your scorpion's melee attacks is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage. These melee attacks now have a {Lightning} tag instead of a {Physical} tag.

All sources of poison chance are converted to shock chance for your scorpion, and effects related to poison in this tree instead depend on shock.

18.name: Summon Scorpion Tail Avalanche
18.description:
Your scorpion has a chance on melee hit to cause a large {Avalanche} boulder to land on the target. The Avalanche boulder uses your scorpion's stats, but your Avalanche tree.

This effect can occur a limited number of times per 2 seconds.

19.name: Summon Scorpion Soaks Up Storm Bolts
19.description: Your Scorpion can cast {Frost Thorns}, a cold spell with seeking projectiles.

28.name: Summon Scorpion Crit Chance And Health On Kill
28.description: Your scorpion has additional critical strike chance, and whenever it kills an enemy it restores a percentage of its maximum health.

2.name: Static Increased Moving Charge Rate
2.description: You gain charges faster while moving.

3.name: Static Shock When Hit While Over Threshold
3.description: Enemies that hit you are shocked while you have more than 80 charges.

5.name: Static Added Maximum Charges
5.description: You have a higher maximum amount of charges.

6.name: Static Haste on Discharge
6.description: You gain {Haste} for 1 second per 50 charges when you discharge.

8.name: Static Charges Increase Range
8.description: Discharge has a higher range the more charges you have.

9.name: Static Crit Multi on High Charge Discharge
9.description: Discharge’s critical strikes deal more damage if you have over 100 charges when you discharge.

11.name: Static Added Lightning Damage and Doubled on High Charge
11.description: Discharge deals additional spell lightning damage (doubled if you have at least 80 charges).

12.name: Static Crit Chance
12.description: Improves Discharge’s base critical strike chance.

13.name: Static Hits Additional Enemies Per Charges
13.description: Discharge hits an additional enemy for every 50 charges you have when you discharge.

14.name: Static Added Mana Cost and Lightning Damage Per Charge
14.description: When you directly cast Static, Discharge deals additional lightning damage per charge, but Discharge costs more mana per charge.

15.name: Static Increased Charges Gained When Hit
15.description: You gain more charges when you are hit.

16.name: Static Ward on Discharge
16.description: Discharge grants ward proportional to your charges, but has a longer cooldown.

17.name: Static Additional Enemies Hit
17.description: Discharge hits more enemies.

20.name: Static Zap Additional Enemies
20.description: {Lightning Blast} critical hits have a chance to grant a charge.

21.name: Static Reduced Zap Cost and Increased Zap Critical Chance
21.description: Lightning Blasts from {Overload} have additional critical strike chance and a chance to chain additional times.

23.name: Static Shock on Hit
23.description: Discharge shocks enemies on hit. Each enemy is inflicted with 1 stack of shock for each 50 charges expended, up to a maximum.

24.name: Static Discharges Adds Lightning Damage to Next Attack
24.description: After discharging, your next spell and melee attack deal additional lightning damage.

25.name: Static Discharge Stun Chance
25.description: Discharge now has a chance to stun enemies, with a higher chance based the number of charges you have.

26.name: Static Knockback
26.description: Nearby enemies are knocked back when you discharge.

27.name: Static Charges on Melee Attack
27.description: Your next melee attack grants charges on hit. This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

4.name: Static Double Movespeed Charge and Decay While Immobile
4.description: You gain charges while moving much faster, but charges decay at your movement charge rate if you stop moving for more than 1 second.

7.name: Static Arc Attack
7.description: Discharge has a significantly higher range, but can only hit enemies within a 90 degree arc.

10.name: Static Gain Charges on Crit
10.description: You gain charges for each enemy you critically strike if you have discharged in the last 3 seconds.

18.name: Static Max Charges Resets Cooldown
18.description: Static's cooldown resets when you reach your maximum number of charges.

19.name: Static Casts Zap on Enemies
19.description: While over 80 charges, you expend 10 charges to cast {Lightning Blast} at an enemy within 8 meters every second. This effect consumes Lightning Blast's mana cost.

22.name: Static Zap uses Lightning Bolt
22.description: {Lightning Blasts} from {Overload} consume less of Lightning Blast's mana cost, but expends additional charges.

1.name: Judgement ConGround Increased Healing
1.description: {Consecrated Ground} has increased healing effectiveness.

2.name: Judgement ConGround Increased Duration
2.description: {Consecrated Ground} lasts longer.

4.name: Judgement ConGround Increased Area
4.description: {Consecrated Ground} heals allies and deals damage in a larger area.

6.name: Judgement Eruption Increased Damage and Healing
6.description: {Holy Eruption} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and restore more health.

7.name: Judgement Eruption Cleanses
7.description: {Holy Eruption} cleanses negative ailments, such as ignite and chill, on you and allies. This effect can occur a limited number of times per 10 seconds.

8.name: Judgement Reduce Duration and Increase Healing
8.description: {Consecrated Ground} restores more health, but has a shorter duration.

10.name: Judgement ConGround Increased Damage
10.description: {Consecrated Ground} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Judgement ConGround Shreds Armour
11.description: {Consecrated Ground} has a chance to shred enemy armor each second.

12.name: Judgement BaseHit More Damage Against High Health Enemies
12.description: Judgement hits and {Conscrated Ground} deal more damage against enemies at high health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Judgement BaseHit Added Damage Against Rare and Boss
13.description: Judgement hits deal more hit damage to rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Judgement Increased Damage and Stun Chance
17.description: Judgement deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

19.name: Judgement BaseHit Added Ignite Chance
19.description: Judgement hits have a chance to ignite enemies and ignites applied by Judgement have additional Fire Penetration.

20.name: Judgement Heal On Melee Hit
20.description: Judgement's melee attack heals you and nearby allied players for each enemy it hits. This healing is affected by your increased healing effectiveness.

21.name: Judgement BaseHit Increased Damage Against Ignited
21.description: Judgement hits and {Consecrated Ground} deal more damage against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Judgement BaseHit More Crit Chance Against Ignited
22.description: Judgement hits have more critical strike chance against ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

23.name: Judgement BaseHit Added Critical Strike Multiplier
23.description: Judgement critical strikes deal more damage.

25.name: Judgement Undodgeable
25.description: Judgement's melee attack cannot be dodged and deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your increased healing effectiveness.

3.name: Judgement ConGround Is Aura
3.description: {Consecrated Ground} becomes a {Consecrating Aura} which surrounds you and has a longer duration, but Judgement costs more mana. Judgement deals significantly more damage over time.

5.name: Judgement Eruption
5.description: When {Consecrated Ground} finishes, it casts {Holy Eruption}, dealing fire damage to all nearby enemies and heals you and all your nearby allies for 80 health.

9.name: Judgement ConGround Pulls
9.description: Judgement now pulls in enemies and slows them, but its initial hit no longer deals damage.

14.name: Judgement Consume All Sigils
14.description: Judgement consumes all of your {Symbols of Hope} to deal additional fire damage for each Symbol consumed.

16.name: Judgement No ConGround
16.description: Judgement gains significant physical and fire penetration, but no longer leaves behind {Consecrated Ground}.

18.name: Judgement Casts Smite
18.description: Judgement also casts {Smite} at nearby enemies. Smite consumes mana equal to its mana cost for each cast.

24.name: Judgement Cooldown Recovery
24.description: Judgement has a shorter cooldown and a lower mana cost.

26.name: Judgement Frenzy
26.description: You gain Frenzy for a duration after using Judgement if it hits at least one enemy.

15.name: Judgement Mana Consumed
15.description: Judgement now also consumes a percentage of your current mana and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per mana consumed.

27.name: Judgement Regen After Use
27.description: If you hit at least one enemy with Judgement you gain the {Deliverance} buff, which drastically increases mana regen and health regen.

28.name: Judgement Mana Gain After Use
28.description: While you have the {Deliverance} buff whenever you directly use Vengeance, Rive, or Multistrike and hit at least one enemy you regain additional mana.

29.name: Judgement No Cooldown
29.description: Judgement no longer has a cooldown, but costs substantially more mana and its healing restores less health (multiplicative with other modifiers). Its mana cost now counts as mana consumed for the effect of the {Pious Offering} node.

1.name: Enchant Weapon Increased Attack Speed
1.description: {Active:} You have increased melee attack speed.

2.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Shock Chance
2.description: {Passive:} You have a chance to shock enemies with melee attacks (doubled while active).

3.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Lightning Damage
3.description: {Active:} You deal additional lightning damage with melee attacks, and deal increased lightning damage with melee attacks.

5.name: Enchant Weapon Lightning Bolt Cast Frequency
5.description: {Zap} is cast more frequently.

6.name: Enchant Weapon Fire and Lightning Damage Leech
6.description: {Active:} You leech a portion of the fire and lightning damage you deal with melee attacks as health.

7.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Fire Damage
7.description: {Active:} You deal additional fire damage with melee attacks, and deal increased fire damage with melee attacks.

8.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Ignite Chance
8.description: {Passive:} You have a chance to ignite enemies with melee attacks (doubled while active).

9.name: Enchant Weapon Ignite Duration
9.description: {Passive:} Ignites you inflict last longer (doubled while active).

11.name: Enchant Weapon More Conflagrate Damage
11.description: Ignites consumed by {Conflagrate} deal significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Enchant Weapon Burst of Fire Reduced Cooldown and Increased Damage
13.description: {Fire Burst} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and Fire Burst has a shorter cooldown.

14.name: Enchant Weapon Increased Duration
14.description: Enchant Weapon is active for longer.

16.name: Enchant Weapon Reduced Activation Cost and Increased Melee Elemental Damage
16.description:
{Passive:} Activating Enchant Weapon costs less mana.

{Active:} You deal increased elemental damage with melee attacks.

19.name: Enchant Weapon Add Ice and Cold Damage per Physical Damage on Weapon
19.description: {Active:} You deal additional cold and lightning damage with melee attacks for each 10 physical damage that is on your weapon.

20.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Chill Chance
20.description: {Passive:} You have an increased chance to chill enemies with melee attacks (doubled while active).

21.name: Enchant Weapon Chance To Cast Icicle
21.description: {Active:} Your melee attacks have a chance to cast {Icicles} towards enemies they hit.

23.name: Enchant Weapon Melee Cold Damage
23.description: {Active:} You deal additional cold damage with melee attacks, and deal increased cold damage with melee attacks.

25.name: Enchant Weapon Cleanses
25.description: Activating Enchant Weapon cleanses negative ailments, but costs more mana.

4.name: Enchant Weapon Interval Cast Lightning Bolt At Nearby Enemies
4.description: {Active:} You {Zap} a nearby enemy every 2 seconds, dealing spell lightning damage.

10.name: Enchant Weapon Consume Ignite Stacks
10.description: Activating Enchant Weapon consumes all ignite stacks on nearby enemies, causing their damage to be dealt instantly.

12.name: Enchant Weapon Cast Burst of Fire Against Ignited Targets
12.description: {Active:} Hitting ignited enemies casts a {Fire Burst} towards them. This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

15.name: Enchant Weapon Missing Mana Increases Melee Elemental Damage
15.description: {Active:} You deal increased elemental damage with melee attacks proportional to how much mana you are missing when Enchant Weapon is activated.

17.name: Enchant Weapon Automatic Recast
17.description: Enchant Weapon activates automatically once its cooldown expires.

22.name: Enchant Weapon Icicles Pierce
22.description: {Icicles} now pierce (continue through targets it hits).

24.name: Enchant Weapon Free Cast on Activate
24.description: Activating Enchant Weapon causes your next melee elemental attack to be free.

26.name: Enchant Weapon Nova
26.description: You cast Elemental Nova when you activate Enchant Weapon. You pay Elemental Nova's mana cost in addition to Enchant Weapon.

2.name: Disintegrate Chance to Slow
2.description: Disintegrate has a chance to slow enemies caught within the beam.

4.name: Disintegrate Faster Flame Energy Buildup
4.description: Flame Energy builds up more quickly.

5.name: Disintegrate More Damage
5.description: Disintegrate deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Disintegrate Ward Regen
6.description: You gain ward each second based on your Intelligence while channeling Disintegrate.

11.name: Disintegrate Shock Chance
11.description: Disintegrate has a chance to shock enemies caught within the beam.

14.name: Disintegrate More Lightning Damage Per Mana
14.description: Disintegrate deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your maximum mana.

15.name: Disintegrate Increased Shock Efficacy and Duration
15.description: Shock inflicted by Disintegrate lasts longer and Disintegrate deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of Shock on the target.

16.name: Disintegrate Cast Lightning Blast
16.description:
You have a chance each second to cast {Lightning Blast} at a nearby enemy.

This consumes mana equal to {Lightning Blast's} mana cost.

18.name: Disintegrate Tier Three
18.description: Disintegrate is upgraded to tier 3 after 4 seconds of channeling. Tier 3 grants double the bonuses of tier 2.

19.name: Disintegrate Tier Three Ailment Chance
19.description:
While your Disintegrate is at tier 3 you have a chance to inflict {Spreading Flames} and {Spark Charges} on enemies in the beam each second while channeling.

If Disintegrate is converted to {fire}, the {Spark Charges} are converted to {Spreading Flames}.

If Disintegrate is converted to {lightning}, the {Spreading Flames} is converted to {Spark Charges}.

20.name: Disintegrate Faster Tier Charge
20.description: Disintegrate upgrades to the next Tier faster. This also affects the rate at which you gain stacks of {Lucomancer}.

21.name: Disintegrate Channel More Damage and Damage Taken
21.description: Disintegrate deals more damage while at Tier 2, but also causes you to take more damage while at tier 2 (both multiplicative with other modifiers and each other), and these effects are are doubled at Tier 3.

22.name: Disintegrate Chance to Ignite
22.description: Disintegrate gains a portion of your chance to ignite with fire spells on hit as ignite chance per second.

24.name: Disintegrate Burning Aura
24.description: You have a chance each second to cast {Fire Aura} while channeling Disintegrate.

25.name: Disintegrate Range
25.description: Disintegrate has a longer range.

26.name: Disintegrate Damage And Mana
26.description:
For every 2 seconds you spend channeling Disintegrate, you gain a stack of {Lucomancer}, up to 2 stacks and each stack lasts 4 seconds. Stacks are refreshed when you gain a new one.

Lucomancer grants global more damage to ignited or shocked enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) and global reduced mana cost.

28.name: Disintegrate Reduced Damage Taken
28.description: You take less damage while channeling Disintegrate (multiplicative with other modifiers).

32.name: Disintegrate Flame Energy
32.description: Flame energy builds up on enemies within the beam, causing an explosion that deals fire damage around them after 3 seconds of taking damage.

7.name: Disintegrate Cooldown Recovery
7.description: Your skills recover their cooldowns faster while you are channeling Disintegrate.

8.name: Disintegrate Two Beams
8.description:
Disintegrate now has two beams, and each beam deals damage independently, so enemies caught in both take double damage.

Disintegrate costs more mana per second to channel, and each beam deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Disintegrate Kamehameha
10.description: Disintegrate deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has a delay before casting. This delay is reduced by increased cast speed.

12.name: Disintegrate Lightning Conversion
12.description:
Disintegrate’s base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Disintegrate loses the {fire} tag.

13.name: Disintegrate Restore Mana While Hitting Enemies and Reduce Damage
13.description: Disintegrate no longer costs mana while channeling, but it also deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Disintegrate Tier Two
17.description: Disintegrate is upgraded to tier 2 after 2 seconds of channeling. Tier 2 Disintegrate deals more damage, but costs more mana to channel.

23.name: Disintegrate Fire Conversion
23.description:
Disintegrate’s base lightning damage is converted to fire damage, unless you have the {Electrify} node.

Disintegrate loses the {lightning} tag.

30.name: Disintegrate More Fire Damage Per Intelligence
30.description: Disintegrate deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your Intelligence.

34.name: Disintegrate Orb Every Three Seconds
34.description:
Every 3 seconds of channelling Disintegrate, you cast {Static Orb} or {Volcanic Orb}, chosen randomly.

If Disintegrate is converted to {fire}, you always cast {Volcanic Orb}.

If Disintegrate is converted to {lightning}, you always cast {Static Orb}.

This consumes mana equal to the mana cost of those respective abilities.

35.name: Disintegrate Static Charges
35.description: You gain {Static Charges} each second while channeling Disintegrate.

36.name: Disintegrate Start At Higher Tier
36.description:
If you start channeling Disintegrate while having at least 1 stack of {Lucomancer} it starts at Tier 2.

If you also have the {Amplification} node and at least 2 stacks of {Lucomancer}, Disintegrate starts at Tier 3 instead.

37.name: Disintegrate Fireballs On End
37.description:
When you stop channeling Disintegrate, you cast {Fireball} at nearby enemies twice per second spent channeling, up to a maximum.

This consumes mana equal to {Fireball's} mana cost.

1.name: Manifest Armour Increased Body Armour Effect
1.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your body armor.

3.name: Manifest Armour More Health
3.description: Manifested Armor has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Manifest Armour Health Regen
5.description: Manifested Armor gains additional health regeneration.

7.name: Manifest Armour Reflects Damage
7.description: Manifested Armor reflects a percentage of damage to attackers.

9.name: Manifest Armour Increased Helmet Effect
9.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your helmet.

10.name: Manifest Armour Added Fire Damage
10.description: Manifested Armor deals additional melee and spell fire damage as well as more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Manifest Armour Flamethrower Increased Range and Damage
12.description: {Forgebreath} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

13.name: Manifest Armour Flamethrower Increased Cooldown and Ignites
13.description: {Forgebreath} has additional ignite chance and a shorter cooldown.

14.name: Manifest Armour Ignite Chance
14.description: Manifested Armor's melee attacks have a chance to ignite enemies.

16.name: Manifest Armour Increased Boots Effect
16.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your boots.

17.name: Manifest Armour Chance to Taunt Enemies
17.description: Manifested Armor has a chance to taunt nearby enemies each second.

18.name: Manifest Armour Cannot be Stunned
18.description: Manifested Armor cannot be stunned.

20.name: Manifest Armour Chance To Slow When Hit
20.description: Manifested Armor has a chance to slow attacking enemies when hit.

21.name: Manifest Armour Increased Gloves Effect
21.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect of stats from your gloves.

22.name: Manifest Armour Chance To Inflict Bleed
22.description: Manifested Armor's melee physical attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

23.name: Manifest Armour Physical Damage Over Time
23.description: Manifested Armor deals more physical damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Manifest Armour Chance to Shred Armour
24.description: Manifested Armor's melee attacks have a chance to reduce enemy armor.

25.name: Manifest Armour Reduces Health and Armour and Increases Damage
25.description: Manifested Armor deals more damage, but has less armor (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Manifest Armour Melee Damage Per Chest Armour
2.description: Your Manifest Armor gains melee physical damage equal to a proportion of the armour on your body armour.

4.name: Manifest Armour Shield
4.description: Manifested Armor gains a shield which scales with the stats of your equipped shield.

6.name: Manifest Armour Increased Health Regen From All Items
6.description: Manifested Armor gains increased effect for health regeneration from all items that affect Manifest Armor.

8.name: Manifest Armour Reflects Damage Per Point of Attunement
8.description: Manifested Armor reflects damage back to attackers for an amount equal to your attunement.

11.name: Manifest Armour Flamethrower
11.description: Manifested Armor now also attacks with {Forgebreath}, a fire spell that deals 60 fire damage to all enemies in a cone in front of it. 3 second cooldown.

15.name: Manifest Armour Whirlwind Attack
15.description:
Manifested Armor gains the ability to use {Whirlwind Strike}, a spinning attack which hits all nearby enemies multiple times and travels a short distance. 

This effect has a 4 second cooldown.

19.name: Manifest Armour Charge
19.description: Manifested Armor gains a charge ability, which deals physical damage and knocks back any enemy it passes through. 6 second cooldown.

26.name: Manifest Armour Mace
26.description: Manifested Armor gains a sword which scales with your equipped weapon's stats.

2.name: Maelstrom Increased Area
2.description: Maelstrom deals damage in a larger area.

4.name: Maelstrom More Damage When Cast on Totem
4.description: Maelstrom deals more damage when cast on a totem (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Maelstrom Added Chill Chance
6.description: Maelstrom has a chance to chill enemies each second.

8.name: Maelstrom Reduced Duration and Increased Damage and Increased Tsunami Damage
8.description: Maelstrom and {Tsunami} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Maelstrom stacks have a shorter duration.

9.name: Maelstrom Heal Per Second
9.description: Maelstrom also heals allies in its area of effect each second.

11.name: Maelstrom Reduced Area and Increased Damage
11.description: Maelstrom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area.

12.name: Maelstrom Freeze Rate
12.description: Maelstrom has an increased chance to freeze enemies each second.

14.name: Maelstrom Increased Mana Efficiency
14.description: Maelstrom costs less mana.

15.name: Maelstrom Dodge Rating
15.description: Each stack of Maelstrom grants you increased dodge chance.

17.name: Maelstrom Increased Duration
17.description: Maelstrom stacks have a longer duration.

19.name: Maelstrom Reduced Lightning Attack Stack Requirement
19.description: {Power of The Storm's} stack requirement is reduced.

20.name: Maelstrom Lightning Attacks More Targets
20.description: {Storm Bolt} from the {Power of the Storm} node is cast at additional targets.

21.name: Maelstrom Increased Damage
21.description: Maelstrom deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). This bonus is doubled if you have at least 60 Attunement.

22.name: Maelstrom Stacks on Kill
22.description:
You have a chance on killing an enemy or hitting a boss or rare enemy to cast Maelstrom. 

This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

23.name: Maelstrom Haste At High Stacks
23.description: If you have 6 stacks of Maelstrom or more, you gain {Haste.}

24.name: Maelstrom Frenzy At High Stacks
24.description: If you have 6 stacks of Maelstrom or more, you gain {Frenzy.}

26.name: Maelstrom Stun Buff
26.description: Each stack of Maelstrom grants you an increased chance to stun enemies.

3.name: Maelstrom Cast on Minions
3.description: You can choose to cast Maelstrom on your minions instead of yourself.

5.name: Maelstrom Summon Twisters
5.description:
When your number of Maelstrom stacks reaches 0, you have a chance to summon 2 to 4 {Twisters,} a spell that deals physical damage each second to enemies they pass through.

The number of Twisters is random, and the chance to summon them is multiplied by the highest number of stacks you reached.

7.name: Maelstrom Summon Tsunami
7.description: When your number of Maelstrom stacks reaches 0, you release a {Tsunami,} a cold spell that deals damage multiplied by your highest stack count.

10.name: Maelstrom Single Stack
10.description: Maelstrom deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), has significantly increased healing effectiveness and lasts significantly longer, but you can have only one maximum stack of Maelstrom.

13.name: Maelstrom Unleash
13.description: If you go one second without directly casting Maelstrom you gain a stack of {Lagon's Slumber}. When you next cast Maelstrom directly, all stacks of {Lagon's Slumber} are consumed to cast Maelstrom an additional time per stack.

16.name: Maelstrom Physical Conversion
16.description:
Maelstrom's base cold damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to cold damage.

Chill chance from this tree is converted to slow chance.

Maelstrom can no longer freeze, but each stack of Maelstrom grants global more physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

18.name: Maelstrom Lightning Attack At High Stacks
18.description: While you have 6 or more stacks, you cast {Storm Bolt} at a nearby enemy each second.

28.name: Maelstrom Damage To Frozen
28.description: Maelstrom deals more damage to chilled or frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.nodeName: Summon Raptor Added Elemental Protection and Dodge Rating
2.name: Summon Raptor Added Elemental Protection and Dodge Rating

7.nodeName: Summon Raptor Reduce Cooldown of Other Companions
7.name: Summon Raptor Reduce Cooldown of Other Companions

8.name: Summon Raptor Damage And Area

10.nodeName: Summon Raptor Fire Breath Damage And Cooldown
10.name: Summon Raptor Fire Breath Damage And Cooldown

12.nodeName: Summon Raptor More Damage to Bleeding Enemies
12.name: Summon Raptor More Damage to Bleeding Enemies

13.nodeName: Summon Raptor Haste Chance On Bleeding Death
13.name: Summon Raptor Haste Chance On Bleeding Death

14.nodeName: Summon Raptor More Melee Damage Per Bleed
14.name: Summon Raptor More Melee Damage Per Bleed

15.nodeName: Summon Raptor Bleed Chance on Hit
15.name: Summon Raptor Bleed Chance on Hit

16.nodeName: Summon Raptor Increased Damage Over Time
16.name: Summon Raptor Increased Damage Over Time

17.nodeName: Summon Raptor Blinds and Poison Chance
17.name: Summon Raptor Blinds and Poison Chance

20.nodeName: Summon Raptor More Damage Per Missing Max Health
20.name: Summon Raptor More Damage Per Missing Max Health

1.name: Earthquake Slow Chance
1.description: Earthquake and its {Aftershocks} have a chance to slow enemies in their area of effect.

2.name: Earthquake Increased Area
2.description: Earthquake and its Aftershocks have a larger area of effect.

3.name: Earthquake Damage Against Chilled Or Frozen
3.description: Earthquake and its Aftershocks deal more hit damage to chilled or frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Earthquake Maximum Aftershocks
4.description: Earthquake can cast more maximum possible Aftershocks.

5.name: Earthquake Aftershock Chains
5.description: Aftershocks have a chance when they hit to cast another Aftershock. Maximum of one additional Aftershock.

6.name: Earthquake Aftershocks Cast Snowball
6.description:
Aftershock hits have a chance to have an {Avalanche Boulder} cast on their location, and when this effect triggers it consumes mana.

The {Boulder} is affected by your {Avalanche} Skill Tree.

8.name: Earthquake Slow Duration
8.description: Slows caused by Earthquake and its Aftershocks last longer.

9.name: Earthquake Mana Efficiency And Stun Chance
9.description: Earthquake and its Aftershocks have an increased chance to stun enemies, and Earthquake costs less mana.

10.name: Earthquake Grants Haste And Frenzy
10.description: Casting Earthquake grants you {Haste} and {Frenzy} for a duration.

12.name: Earthquake Aftershock Damage And Duration
12.description: Aftershocks deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and last longer.

13.name: Earthquake Aftershock Blinds Enemies
13.description: Aftershocks blind enemies within their area of effect.

14.name: Earthquake Aftershock Increased Damage And Stun Chance
14.description: Aftershocks deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have an increased chance to stun enemies.

15.name: Earthquake Minimum Aftershocks
15.description: Earthquake can cast more minimum possible Aftershocks. Each enemy can only be targeted by one Aftershock.

16.name: Earthquake Aftershock Increased Area
16.description: Aftershocks have a larger area of effect.

17.name: Earthquake Increased Hit Damage
17.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

18.name: Earthquake Reduced Area And Increased Damage
18.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area.

20.name: Earthquake Removes Aftershocks And Applies Damage To Base Hit
20.description: Modifiers to Aftershock damage on this tree apply to the initial slam, but Earthquake can no longer create Aftershocks.

22.name: Earthquake Armor Shred
22.description: Earthquake's initial slam reduces enemy armor.

23.name: Earthquake Damage Against Rares And Bosses
23.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals more hit damage against rare and boss enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

25.name: Earthquake Increased Hit Damage And Stun Chance
25.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

27.name: Earthquake Lightning Damage
27.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals additional lightning damage, and Earthquake deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

28.name: Earthquake Lightning Storm
28.description:
Casting Earthquake expends Storm Stacks over 0.5 seconds.

{Storm Bolts} triggered this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

31.name: Earthquake Stun Duration
31.description: Stuns caused by Earthquake and its Aftershocks last longer, but Earthquake has a longer cooldown.

32.name: Earthquake Undodgeable
32.description: Earthquake's initial slam can't be dodged.

7.name: Earthquake Aftershocks Cast At Totems
7.description: Aftershocks appear around your totems instead if they are nearby.

11.name: Earthquake Aftershock DOT
11.description: Aftershocks are now damage over time, dealing their normal hit damage each second. Aftershocks last 3 seconds.

19.name: Earthquake Cone Attack
19.description: Using Earthquake directly it now deals damage in a cone which has increased range. Aftershocks also favour targets in the direction Earthquake is cast.

21.name: Earthquake Triple Hit
21.description:
Earthquake's initial slam occurs three times. First with 30% reduced radius and damage, then with 5% reduced radius and damage, then with 30% increased radius and damage.

Earthquake now has a cooldown, and each initial hit consumes mana.

24.name: Earthquake Fire Mode
24.description:
Earthquake's base damage is converted to fire damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Additionally, armor shred chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance.

26.name: Earthquake Spell And Lightning Conversion
26.description:
Earthquake is converted into a spell, and no longer scales with melee damage. Earthquake now deals substantial additional base damage on the initial slam and its base damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increased lightning damage, but not with increased physical damage.

Aftershocks also deal substantial additional spell damage, but their damage is not converted to lightning.

30.name: Earthquake Stun
30.description: Earthquake's initial slam deals more damage and has increased stun chance and stun duration, but Earthquake has a 6 second cooldown.

2.name: Arcane Ascendance Increased Spell Damage
2.description: Arcane Ascendance grants you increased spell damage while active.

3.name: Arcane Ascendance Scaling Spell Damage and Cast Speed
3.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, each hit you take increases your spell damage and cast speed, but drains your mana.

4.name: Arcane Ascendance Increasing Spell Damage
4.description: You are granted increased spell damage each second while Arcane Ascendance is active.

5.name: Arcane Ascendance Increasing Cast Speed
5.description: You are granted increased cast speed each second while Arcane Ascendance is active.

6.name: Arcane Ascendance Chance to Slow Distant Enemies
6.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, spells and attacks have a chance to slow enemies over 5 meters away and you deal more damage to enemies per stack of slow on them.

7.name: Arcane Ascendance Mana Per Kill
7.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, you are granted mana whenever you kill an enemy that is over 5 meters away.

9.name: Arcane Ascendance Haste on End
9.description: You are granted {Haste} for a duration after leaving Arcane Ascendance. The duration is capped at 200% of the time you spent in Arcane Ascendance.

11.name: Arcane Ascendance Cooldown
11.description: Arcane Ascendance has a shorter cooldown.

12.name: Arcane Ascendance Ward on Start
12.description: You gain ward when you activate Arcane Ascendance.

14.name: Arcane Ascendance Freeze Rate
14.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, your spells and attacks that can freeze enemies have a higher chance to do so.

15.name: Arcane Ascendance Knockback
15.description: You knock back all nearby enemies when you enter Arcane Ascendance.

17.name: Arcane Ascendance Lightning Blast Frequency
17.description: Lightning Blast cast by {Superconductor} triggers more frequently.

18.name: Arcane Ascendance Reduced Mana Drain
18.description: Arcane Ascendance drains less mana per second.

19.name: Arcane Ascendance Mana Efficiency
19.description: All of your spells cost less mana while Arcane Ascendance is active, but you cannot regenerate mana while Arcane Ascendance is active.

25.name: Arcane Ascendance Bigger Cast Limit
25.description: You can cast more spells via {Acuity}, but Arcane Ascendance has a longer cooldown.

8.name: Arcane Ascendance Freeze Nearby Enemy On Frozen Kill
8.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, whenever you kill a frozen enemy a nearby enemy is frozen for a duration.

21.name: Arcane Ascendance Chill Distant Enemies
21.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, spells and attacks have a chance to chill enemies over 5 meters away.

22.name: Arcane Ascendance Shock Distant Enemies
22.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, spells and attacks have a chance to shock enemies over 5 meters away.

26.name: Arcane Ascendance Lightning Mark Damage
26.description: {Mark Of Thunder} deals more damage when it is consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

16.name: Arcane Ascendance Lightning Blast
16.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, you automatically cast {Lightning Blast} when you hit an enemy. Lightning Blast uses its skill tree and you lose mana equal to Lightning Blast's cost. This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

24.name: Arcane Ascendance Cast Limit
24.description: Arcane Ascendance now has a 2 second cooldown and no longer drains your mana. You can cast 4 spells before Arcane Ascendance ends automatically. Lasts 12 seconds.

23.name: Arcane Ascendance Lightning Mark On Distant Enemies
23.description: While Arcane Ascendance is active, you {Mark} enemies you hit that are over 5 meters away. When you exit Arcane Ascendance, you consume all marks, dealing lightning damage to affected enemies.

10.name: Arcane Ascendance Temporary Mana
10.description:
Hold down the key for up to 5 seconds. You are immobile and cannot use spells. However long you hold it down is how long Arcane Ascendence lasts.

Arcane Ascendence now allows you to move while using it. Haste from previous node applies after the immobile period.

Your spells now chill, shock, and ignite all enemies.

2.name: Drain Life More Damage
2.description: Drain Life deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Drain Life Necrotic AOE Increased Area And Damage
4.description: {Soul Blast} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

7.name: Drain Life Only Targets Minions And Increased Health Leech
7.description: Drain Life can now only target minions. Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage as health.

8.name: Drain Life Does Not Leech And More Damage
8.description: Drain Life deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the health leech from its base effect and nodes on this tree is removed.

9.name: Drain Life Soul Wisp On Kill Chance
9.description: Drain Life has a chance to summon a {Soul Wisp} when it kills an enemy, a minion that deals necrotic damage to enemies.

12.name: Drain Life Ward On Kill
12.description: You are granted ward when Drain Life kills an enemy.

13.name: Drain Life Fear And Slow Chance
13.description: Drain Life has a chance to slow and fear its targets each second.

15.name: Drain Life Contempt Stacks
15.description:
You gain a stack of {Contempt} when you have channelled on the same enemy for 2 seconds.

Contempt grants more armour (multiplicative with other modifiers) and adds to all resistances. All stacks of Contempt are lost when you stop channelling.

16.name: Drain Life Contempt Stacks Persist
16.description: {Contempt} stacks last for a duration after you stop channelling Drain Life.

18.name: Drain Life Stun Duration
18.description: The stun inflicted by {Stagger} lasts longer and Drain Life deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against bosses and rare enemies.

19.name: Drain Life Reduced Mana Drain
19.description: Drain Life costs less mana per second.

20.name: Drain Life Damned Stacks
20.description: Drain Life applies stacks of {Damned} each second. {Damned} is an ailment that deals necrotic damage over time.

21.name: Drain Life Damned Duration
21.description: {Damned} inflicted by Drain Life lasts longer.

30.name: Drain Life Damage Per Damned Stack
30.description: Drain Life deals 3% more damage per stack of {Damned} on enemies affected by {Damned}, up to a cap (multiplicative with other modifiers).

23.name: Drain Life Increased Health Leech
23.description: Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage as health and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to targets that are on low health.

24.name: Drain Life Increased Leech And Mana Drain
24.description: Drain Life leeches a higher percentage of damage as health, but costs more mana per second.

26.name: Drain Life Duration Of Casted
26.description: {Dark Shackles} lasts longer, but Drain Life costs more mana.

28.name: Drain Life Chill Nearby Enemies
28.description: When a target is killed by Drain Life, you chill enemies in an area around them for a duration.

3.name: Drain Life Necrotic AOE On Kill
3.description: When a target is killed by Drain Life you cast Soul Blast at their location, dealing spell necrotic damage to enemies in an area around them.

6.name: Drain Life Targets Minions And Grants Mana
6.description: Drain Life can now target your minions. You gain 10 mana per second for each minion you are draining.

10.name: Drain Life Poison Conversion
10.description:
Drain Life's base necrotic damage is converted to poison damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

Swaps Drain Life's {Necrotic} tag for a {Poison} tag.

11.name: Drain Life Mana To Health Cost Conversion
11.description: Drain Life no longer costs mana. Instead, it drains a portion of your current health per second while channelling. Nodes that modify mana drain now modify this health drain instead.

14.name: Drain Life Additional Target
14.description: Drain Life can drain an additional target.

17.name: Drain Life Stuns After Duration Channelled
17.description: When Drain Life has channelled on the same target for 2 seconds, it stuns them for 2 seconds.

25.name: Drain Life Casted And Can Move
25.description: Drain Life is now cast instead of channelled. Lasts for 3 seconds. Adds an up-front mana cost, and this cost is affected by modifiers to mana drain, except for the {Blood Pact} node.

27.name: Drain Life Additional Targets And Slows
27.description: {Dark Shackles} can hit up to 10 additional targets, and slows enemies hit each second, but Drain Life costs significantly more mana.

32.name: Drain Life Increased Area
32.description:
You gain ward over time while channelling based on your maximum mana.

Drain Life can affect enemies in a wider area. This does not affect the maximum number of enemies you can drain from at a time.

33.name: Drain Life Area To Ward Retention
33.description: Increased Area stats from this tree and other sources has no effect on Drain Life's area of effect, but instead grants you additional Ward Retention while channelling Drain Life.

22.name: Drain Life Wandering Spirits Do Not Die While Channelling
22.description: If {Wandering Spirits} is active when you start channeling Drain Life it does not expire until you stop channeling.

2.name: Acid Flask Damage
2.description: Acid Flask deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

3.name: Acid Flask Haste
3.description: Acid Flask has a chance to grant {Haste} on use for a short duration.

6.name: Acid Flask Armor Shred Chance
6.description: Acid Flask has a chance to shred enemy armor.

8.name: Acid Flask Added Poison Chance In Pool
8.description: You have a chance to poison enemies while standing in your {Poison Pools}.

9.name: Acid Flask Added Pool Duration
9.description: {Poison Pools} last longer.

14.name: Acid Flask Poison Shred Chance
14.description: Acid Flask has a chance to shred enemy poison resistance on hit.

15.name: Acid Flask Added Poison Chance
15.description: Acid Flask has additional chance to poison enemies on hit.

16.name: Acid Flask Frailty Chance
16.description: Acid Flask has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies hit, causing them to deal less damage.

17.name: Acid Flask Increased Poison Duration
17.description: Acid Flask penetrates poison resistance based on your own uncapped Poison Resistance

18.name: Acid Flask Increased Throwing Speed
18.description: Acid Flask has increased throwing speed.

19.name: Acid Flask Chance To Drop When Hit
19.description:
You have a chance to drop an Acid Flask at your feet when an enemy hits you. 

This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

20.name: Acid Flask Mana Efficiency
20.description: Acid Flask costs less mana and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Acid Flask Slow Chance
21.description: Acid Flask has a chance to slow enemies on hit. Slow caused by Acid Flask lasts longer.

22.name: Acid Flask Fire Damage
22.description: Acid Flask deals additional throwing fire damage.

23.name: Acid Flask Ignite Chance
23.description: Acid Flask has a chance to ignite enemies.

24.name: Acid Flask Critical Strike Chance
24.description: Acid Flask has increased citical strike chance and critical strikes deal more damage.

25.name: Acid Flask Increased Area
25.description: Acid Flask deals damage in a larger area.

26.name: Acid Flask Travel Speed
26.description: Acid Flask travels faster.

29.name: Acid Flask Effacacious Toxins
29.description: {Poison Pools} have a chance to inflict enemies with {Efficacious Toxin} each second, causing them to take increased damage over time.

4.name: Acid Flask Triple Flask Line
4.description:
When you directly use Acid Flask, you now throw 3 Acid Flasks in a line, but Acid Flask costs more mana.

Enemies can only be hit by one flask per throw.

5.name: Acid Flask Triple Flask Fan Mode
5.description: When you directly use Acid Flask, you now throw Acid Flasks in a fan in front of you instead of a line. Flasks travel faster.

7.name: Acid Flask Poison Pool
7.description:
Acid Flask leaves behind a {Poison Pool} for 4 seconds that poison enemies that stand in it and adds a 2 second cooldown per flask thrown.

You can have a maximum of 4 {Poison Pools} active at once.

28.name: Acid Flask Poison Penetration
28.description: Acid Flasks travel faster and always target nearby enemies in front of you.

10.name: Acid Flask Fire Conversion
10.description:
Acid Flask's base damage is converted to fire damage and its hits deal significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Acid Flask can no longer apply poison or create poison pools.

11.name: Acid Flask Fire Shred Conversion
11.description: Converts Armor Shred from all sources that Acid Flask would apply to Fire Resistance Shred.

12.name: Acid Flask Secondary Explosions
12.description: When Acid Flask is thrown directly it causes 3 smaller explosions around the impact location dealing fire damage on hit, but it costs more mana.

13.name: Acid Flask Blind Chance
13.description: Acid Flask has a chance to blind enemies hit for 4 seconds.

30.name: Acid Flask Trap
30.description:
Acid Flask is now thrown as a trap that starts arming and explodes when enemies walk over it.

You can have a maximum of 6 Acid Flask Traps active at once.

1.name: Multishot Mana Efficiency
1.description: Multishot costs less mana.

3.name: Multishot Chance To Shred Armor
3.description: Multishot hits have a chance to apply armor shred on hit.

5.name: Multishot Attack Speed And Haste Chance
5.description: Multishot has increased attack speed and chance to gain {Haste} when you use or trigger Multishot from another skill.

6.name: Multishot More Damage To Close Enemies
6.description: Multishot deals more hit damage to close targets (multiplicative with other modifiers) falling off rapidly, but deals less hit damage to far away targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

8.name: Multishot Fewer Attacks To Double Attack
8.description:
Reduce the amount of attacks to double shoot with Multishot.

Additionally, Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Multishot Increased Attack Speed
9.description: Multishot has increased attack speed.

10.name: Multishot Pierce
10.description: Multishot arrows pierce enemies (continue through enemies hit) up to a limit.

11.name: Multishot Crit Multi
11.description: Multishot's critical strikes deal more damage.

12.name: Multishot More Damage If Stationary
12.description: Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you haven't moved in the past second.

13.name: Multishot Haste After Stationary
13.description: You have a chance to gain {Haste} for 2 seconds when you use Multishot while {Stand My Ground} is activate.

14.name: Multishot Increased Crit Chance
14.description: Multishot has increased critical strike chance.

15.name: Multishot More Arrows And Mana Cost
15.description: Multishot has additional arrows, but costs more mana.

16.name: Multishot More Damage Less Area And Fewer Arrows
16.description:
Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but hits in a smaller cone and can only shoot a maximum of 3 arrows.

Additionally, Multishot hits have a chance to shred enemy armor per arrow before the limit.

17.name: Multishot Chance To Poison
17.description: Multishot hits have a chance to inflict poison.

18.name: Multishot Increased Cone Width
18.description: Multishot hits in a wider cone.

19.name: Multishot Chance To Slow
19.description: Multishot hits have a chance to slow and inflict bleed on enemies.

20.name: Multishot More Damage To Slowed Target
20.description: Multishot deals more hit damage to slowed targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Multishot Slow Duration Based On Dexterity
21.description: Multishot has increased slow and bleed duration per point of Dexterity.

22.name: Multishot Phys Pen
22.description: Multishot penetrates enemy physical resistance.

23.name: Multishot Knockback Chance
23.description:
Multishot hits have a chance to knock enemies on hit.

This effect only works on direct uses and has a 2 second cooldown.

24.name: Multishot No Cost When Out Of Mana
24.description: When you are out of mana Multishot is free to use, but it can't shoot more than a few arrows. Other bonuses still apply.

26.name: Multishot Damage And Travel Speed
26.description: Multishot arrows are shot in a sequence instead of a cone, but costs significantly more mana.

28.name: Multishot Shotgun
28.description: Multishot arrows from the same attack can hit the same target and have an increased chance to stun enemies, but {Multishot} deals significantly less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Multishot Slower Attack And Damage
2.description: Multishot deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) when used directly, but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Multishot Autofire On Other Bow Attack
4.description: Multishot has a chance to be shot when you use another bow attack with increased chance to stun, but it costs significantly more mana.

7.name: Multishot Double Attacks
7.description: When directly using Multishot, every 6th attack is a double shot.

0.name: Ice Barrage Root Node
0.description: Repeatedly casts Ice Shareds in a target direction.

2.name: Ice Barrage Freeze Rate Multiplier
2.description: Ice Barrage hits have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

3.name: Ice Barrage Stackable Cast Speed On Freeze
3.description:
When a target is frozen by Ice Barrage, you are granted increased cast speed for 4 seconds.

This effect can stack a limited number of times.

4.name: Ice Barrage Freeze Rate Multiplier Per Frostbolt
4.description:
Each ice shard released by Ice Barrage has a higher chance of freezing enemies than the previous shard.

This effect resets when Ice Barrage is recast.

5.name: Ice Barrage Ice Nova On Hit Chance
5.description: When Ice Barrage hits an enemy it has a chance to cast {Frost Nova}, a cold spell that damages nearby enemies.

6.name: Ice Barrage More Fire Rate
6.description: Ice Barrage has a faster rate of fire.

7.name: Ice Barrage Ward On Hit Chance
7.description: You have a chance to gain ward on hit with Ice Barrage.

8.name: Ice Barrage More Damage Less Duration
8.description: Ice Barrage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has a shorter duration.

9.name: Ice Barrage Fire Rate Reduced Movement Speed
9.description: Ice Barrage has a faster rate of fire, but you move more slowly while it is active.

12.name: Ice Barrage Shield Duration And Ice Barrage Cooldown
12.description: {Ice Shield} lasts longer, but Ice Barrage has a longer cooldown.

13.name: Ice Barrage Cold Damage And Less Cold Damage Taken With Shield
13.description: While {Ice Shield} is active, you deal more global cold damage and take less cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

14.name: Ice Barrage Stacking Damage
14.description:
Each ice shard released by Ice Barrage deals more damage than the previous shard (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This bonus stacks, but is reset on recasting Ice Barrage.

16.name: Ice Barrage Duration
16.description: Ice Barrage lasts longer.

17.name: Ice Barrage Increased Fire Rate On Rare And Boss
17.description: Ice Barrage hits against bosses and rare enemies grant increased fire rate to the remaining hits. This effect stacks up to a cap.

21.name: Ice Barrage More Cold Damage And Crit Chance
21.description: Ice Barrage deals more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has more critical strike chance.

22.name: Ice Barrage Piercing Chance
22.description: Each ice shard cast by Ice Barrage has a chance to pierce all enemies (continue through enemies hit).

23.name: Ice Barrage Frostbite On Pierce
23.description: Ice Shards that pierce enemies have a chance to inflict them with {Frostbite}.

24.name: Ice Barrage Larger Slower Meaner Frostbolts
24.description:
Ice Barrage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and its ice shards become larger.

Ice Barrage has a slower fire rate, and there is a longer delay between each shard being created and released.

25.name: Ice Barrage Frostbolt Cone
25.description: Ice Barrage now fire 5 ice shards in a cone in front of you, but has a slower fire rate and costs more mana.

26.name: Ice Barrage Wider Cone
26.description: Ice Barrage releases ice shards in a wider cone.

27.name: Ice Barrage Shatter On Hit
27.description: Ice Shards cast by Ice Barrage shatter and deal cold damage in a cone behind the target. This does not work on piercing projectiles.

29.name: Ice Barrage Crit Chance Against Frozen Targets
29.description: Ice Barrage has more critical strike chance against frozen targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

30.name: Ice Barrage More Damage To Frozen Targets
30.description: Ice Barrage hits deal more damage to frozen targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

32.name: Ice Barrage More Ice Burst Damage And Freeze Rate
32.description: Ice shards released via {Ice Burst} have a higher chance to freeze enemies, and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

31.name: Ice Barrage 5 Instant Projectiles
31.description: Ice Barrage instantly fires 5 ice shards in a cone.

10.name: Ice Barrage Ice Shield
10.description:
When you cast Ice Barrage you now also summon an {Ice Shield} in the target direction, a shield that blocks projectiles. Ice Shield lasts 2 seconds.

Ice Barrage has a longer cooldown.

11.name: Ice Barrage Ice Explosion On Shield Death
11.description: When {Ice Shield} expires it explodes, freezing nearby enemies.

15.name: Ice Barrage Increased Fire Rate And Silenced
15.description:
Ice Barrage has significantly increased fire rate, but you become {Silenced}, losing a large amount of mana and other skills costs more mana. 

You regain the lost mana from this use when Ice Barrage ends.

20.name: Ice Barrage Chilling Aura
20.description: Ice Barrage creates a {Chilling Aura} around you. The aura repeatedly applies chill to nearby enemies for a duration. This effect can apply multiple stacks of chill to the same enemy.

19.name: Ice Barrage More Damage But No Homing
19.description: Ice Barrage hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer seek nearby enemies.

28.name: Ice Barrage Only 3 Projectiles More Damage
28.description: Ice Barrage deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown, but now only lasts 1 second and fires 3 projectiles.

2.name: Death Seal Clear On Kill
2.description: When you kill an enemy while sealed, a percentage of all of your delayed damage is cleared.

3.name: Death Seal Wave Shred
3.description: The Wave of Death has a chance to shred necrotic resistance.

4.name: Death Seal Wandering Spirits Duration With Death Seal
4.description: If {Wandering Spirits} is active when you activate Death Seal it is granted additional duration.

5.name: Death Seal Clear On End
5.description: When Death Seal ends, a percentage of all of your delayed damage is cleared.

7.name: Death Seal Wave Of Death On Reap Or Evade
7.description:
You release a Wave of Death when you cast {Reap} or {Evade}.

Death Seal must be on your action bar for this effect to work.

8.name: Death Seal Armor And Protections Per 10 Missing Health
8.description: For the duration of Death Seal, you gain armor and stun avoidance for each 10 health you were missing when Death Seal was activated.

9.name: Death Seal Automatic End On 10 Percent Health
9.description: If you drop below 10% health while you are sealed, Death Seal is released automatically.

12.name: Death Seal Less Poison Damage Taken
12.description: While sealed, you take less poison damage per 10% missing health, up to 50% missing health.

13.name: Death Seal Wave More Damage To Poisoned Targets
13.description: Wave of Death hits deal more damage against poisoned targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

14.name: Death Seal Wave More Damage Per Poison Stack On Target
14.description: Wave of Death hits deal more damage per stack of poison up to a maximum (multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Death Seal Wave Increased Area
15.description: The Wave of Death has increased area of effect and additional critical strike chance.

16.name: Death Seal Wave Increased Damage
16.description: Wave of Death deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Death Seal Wave Leech Based On Active Duration
17.description: Wave of Death hits now leech a portion of the damage they deal as health.

19.name: Death Seal Bone Armor On Seal End
19.description: When you release Death Seal, you are granted {Bone Armor}, which grants less damage taken for the duration that Death Seal was active.

20.name: Death Seal Culling
20.description: Death Seal's waves of death instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold.

21.name: Death Seal Minion Hit By Wave More Deal Damage
21.description: Minions hit by a Wave of Death deal more damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers).

23.name: Death Seal Haste On End
23.description: When you release Death Seal, you are granted {Haste} for 4 seconds.

24.name: Death Seal No Wave Heal Based On Duration
24.description: When you release Death Seal, you recover a percentage of your missing health.

25.name: Death Seal Damned On Self Increased Wave Damage
25.description:
You gain a stack of {Damned} for each second you remain sealed. Waves of Death hits now deal more damage per stack of Damned on you (multiplicative with other modifiers), up to a maximum benefit. 

You are cleansed of all Damned stacks when you release Death Seal.

26.name: Death Seal Duration
