26.description: Death Seal's maximum duration is increased.

28.name: Death Seal Minion Increased Damage And Crit Chance
28.description: When used on a minion, Death Seal also grants it more damage and critical strike chance (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

31.name: Death Seal Hungering Souls Frequency
31.description:
You release {Hungering Souls} more frequently.

Additionally, whenever you cast Reap or Evade, you gain this effect for a percentage of Death Seal's maximum duration. Death Seal must be on your action bar for this effect to occur.

22.name: Death Seal No Health Drain
22.description: Death Seal prevents health loss from effects that continously drain a percentage of your current health.

6.name: Death Seal Wave Of Death Every Second
6.description: You release a Wave of Death each second while sealed and upon activation, in addition to when you release Death Seal, but your waves of death deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Death Seal Above To Below 33 Percent Health
11.description: If your health is above 33% of your maximum when you activate Death Seal, it is reduced to 33% of your maximum health.

18.name: Death Seal Wave Physical Conversion
18.description:
Wave of Death's base damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

All of its effects related to necrotic resistance and necrotic resistance shred are converted to physical resistance and physical resistance shred.

27.name: Death Seal Targets Minions
27.description: Death Seal now targets only minions.

29.name: Death Seal Minion Root And Wave On Death
29.description: Minions targeted by Death Seal are rooted in place for its duration. When Death Seal is released, the minion explodes in addition to releasing the wave of death at its location.

30.name: Death Seal Hungering Souls But Only One Soul
30.description: You now repeatedly cast {Hungering Souls} while you are sealed. Hungering Souls cast this way has a 70% chance to have only 1 projectile.

32.name: Death Seal Cold Conversion
32.description:
The Wave of Death's base damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to necrotic damage.

All of its effects related to necrotic resistance and necrotic resistance shred are converted to cold resistance and cold resistance shred.

1.name: Bone Curse More Damage
1.description: Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Bone Curse Culling
2.description:
Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

3.name: Bone Curse Enemies Explode On Death
3.description: Enemies afflicted with Bone Curse have a chance to explode on death, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but Bone Curse costs more mana.

6.name: Bone Curse More Damage But Falls Off After Hits
6.description: Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but falls off after a few hits.

9.name: Bone Curse Armor Shred
9.description: Bone Curse has a chance to reduce enemy armor.

10.name: Bone Curse Bone Armor On Kill
10.description: If you kill an enemy affected by Bone Curse you have a chance to gain {Bone Armor} for 4 seconds, which grants less damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Bone Curse Heal On Bone Armor
11.description:
When {Marrow Thief} triggers you are also healed. 

The healing scales with healing effectiveness.

12.name: Bone Curse Bleed Chance
12.description: Bone Curse has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

14.name: Bone Curse Cursed Ground
14.description: When you cast Bone Curse, it now also leaves behind {Cursed Ground} for a short duration. Enemies that walk into the Cursed Ground are afflicted with Bone Curse.

15.name: Bone Curse Increased Area
15.description: Bone Curse affects a larger area.

17.name: Bone Curse Reduced Duration Prison Gaps
17.description: Bone Curse has a significantly shorter cooldown, but {Bone Prison} now has gaps.

18.name: Bone Curse Prison Health
18.description: Your {Bone Prison} takes less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

20.name: Bone Curse Mark Duration
20.description: {Mark for Death} lasts longer.

22.name: Bone Curse Single Target Endless
22.description:
Bone Curse deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but now only affects a single target. Bone Curse and Mark for Death have unlimited duration.

This is not compatible with the {Signet of Agony} node.

23.name: Bone Curse Slow On Cast
23.description: Bone Curse slows enemies within its area of effect

25.name: Bone Curse Mana Efficiency Cast Speed
25.description: Bone Curse costs less mana and has increased cast speed.

26.name: Bone Curse Chill Chance
26.description: Bone Curse has a chance to apply chill when the enemy is hit.

27.name: Bone Curse Freeze Rate
27.description: Adds a freeze rate to Bone Curse, granting it a chance to freeze enemies.

28.name: Bone Curse Cast On Minion
28.description:
You may cast Bone Curse on your minions, which grants them more physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but also applies Bone Curse's negative effects. 

This effect lasts 4 seconds and does not stack.

29.name: Bone Curse Reflect On Minions
29.description:
Casting Bone Curse on minions causes them to reflect a flat amount damage to attackers. 

This effect lasts 4 seconds and does not stack.

30.name: Bone Curse Buffs On Bone Golem Increased Effect
30.description: All minion buffs from Bone Curse have 200% increased effect on Bone Golems.

24.name: Bone Curse More Damage Less Duration
24.description: Bone Curse applies {Fear} to enemies within its area of effect, but costs more mana.

4.name: Bone Curse Vanguard On Kill
4.description: Killing an enemy with Bone Curse has a chance to summon a Skeleton Vanguard, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 Skeleton Vanguards by default.

5.name: Bone Curse Bone Erruption
5.description: Shortly after casting Bone Curse, it causes a {Bone Eruption} beneath the target area, causing enemies to take spell physical damage, but Bone Curse Costs more mana.

7.name: Bone Curse Aura But Reduced Area
7.description:
Bone Curse becomes a toggled aura which surrounds you, but it has reduced area and drains your mana over time. You are also inflicted with Bone Curse.

This is not compatible with the {Oppressive Gaze} and {Illusion of Pain} nodes.

8.name: Bone Curse Even More Damage But 1 Hit Fall Off
8.description:
Bone Curse falls off after only 1 hit, but it always crits and deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). Bone Curse now has a cooldown.

This is not compatible with the {Signet of Agony} node.
The duration of {Cursed Limbs} and {Cursed Ground} are significantly reduced.

13.name: Bone Curse Rip Blood On End
13.description: When Bone Curse times out, you cast {Rip Blood} on that enemy, a spell dealing physical damage.

16.name: Bone Curse Bone Prison
16.description:
When you directly cast Bone Curse you summon a {Bone Prison} around the target area, trapping enemies inside. Bone Prison lasts a long time, but can be attacked and destroyed.

Bone Curse has a significantly longer cooldown.

19.name: Bone Curse Mark For Death
19.description:
Bone Curse applies {Mark for Death} for 2 seconds, but costs more mana.

This effect overwrites {Mark for Death's} normal duration.

21.name: Bone Curse Necrotic Conversion
21.description: Bone Curse's base physical damage is converted to necrotic. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.

31.name: Bone Curse On Hit After Cast
31.description:
After directly casting Bone Curse, you also cast Bone Curse on hit for the next few seconds, but Bone Curse costs more mana.
This cast on hit effect can't occur more than once per second.

7.name: Shift Reset Cooldown

8.name: Shift Damage On Next Attack

10.nodeName: Shift Bleed Chance On Next Attack
10.name: Shift Bleed Chance On Next Attack

11.nodeName: Shift Bleed Effect And Duration On Next Attack
11.name: Shift Bleed Effect And Duration On Next Attack

18.nodeName: Shift Always Crit On Next Attack
18.name: Shift Always Crit On Next Attack

19.nodeName: Shift Damage Along Dash With Melee
19.name: Shift Damage Along Dash With Melee

29.name: Shift Slows

30.name: Shift Culls

0.name: Assemble Abomination Root Node
0.description: Hold ability key to channel to increase the area. When you release, combine all of your minions in the area into a single hulking abomination with states based on which minions are consumed.

2.name: Assemble Abomination Stats From Skeletons
2.description:
For each {Skeleton Warrior} absorbed, your abomination deals more melee damage and has more health (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

For each {Skeleton Rogue} absorbed, your abomination has increased attack speed.

For each {Skeleton Archer} absorbed, your abomination has increased area of effect.

Effects such as this which apply per skeleton absorbed can only consider up to 20 skeletons in total.

3.name: Assemble Abomination Crit Chance And Movement Speed
3.description:
Your abomination has additional critical strike chance.

For each {Skeleton Rogue} absorbed, your abomination has increased movement speed.

Effects such as this which apply per skeleton absorbed can only consider up to 20 skeletons in total.

5.name: Assemble Abomination Crit Chance
5.description: Your abomination has increased critical strike chance, but can no longer regenerate health or absorb {Bone Golems}.

7.name: Assemble Abomination More Melee Damage
7.description: Your abomination's melee hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but can no longer absorb {Skeletal Mages}.

11.name: Assemble Abomination More Health And Threat
11.description: Your abomination has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and generates more threat, which increases the likelihood of enemies targeting it.

12.name: Assemble Abomination Reflect And Vanguards
12.description: Your abomination reflects a percentage of damage to attackers, and disassembles into a number of {Skeletal Vanguards} on death.

13.name: Assemble Abomination More Damage
13.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

14.name: Assemble Abomination More Damage Reduced Speed
14.description: Your abomination deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has reduced attack speed.

16.name: Assemble Abomination Health Leech
16.description: Your abomination's hits leech a portion of the damage they deal as health.

17.name: Assemble Abomination Increased Melee AoE
17.description: Your abomination's melee attacks deal damage in a larger area.

20.name: Assemble Abomination Stacking Speed On Kill
20.description: Your abomination gains increased attack speed when it kills an enemy. This effect can occur a limited number of times per 5 seconds.

21.name: Assemble Abomination Health And Devour
21.description: Your abomination has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and restores a larger percentage of its maximum health when devouring other minions.

22.name: Assemble Abomination Max Health On Devour
22.description: Your abomination gains more max health (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 8 seconds each time it devours a minion, up to a limited number of times per 8 seconds.

24.name: Assemble Abomination Nova Frequency And Damage
24.description:
{Eternal Arrow} has a reduced cooldown.

For each {Skeleton Archer} absorbed, Eternal Arrow has additional Recurve chance.

Effects such as this which apply per skeleton absorbed can only consider up to 20 skeletons in total.

26.name: Assemble Abomination More Damage Per Type Consumed
26.description: Your abomination has more health and deals more damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers) for each type of minion absorbed to create it among {Summoned Skeleton}, {Skeletal Mage}, {Wraith}, and {Bone Golem}.

28.name: Assemble Abomination Voltron Attack Cast Speed
28.description: If the abomination was made by absorbing at least 1 of every type of minion mentioned by {Engorgement}, it gains more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), increased attack speed, and increased and movement speed.

30.name: Assemble Abomination More Devouring Souls Per Mage Consumed
30.description:
{Devouring Souls} has a reduced cooldown.

Devouring Souls deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each {Skeletal Mage} absorbed.

Devouring Souls releases an additional soul for each Skeletal Mage absorbed.

31.name: Assemble Abomination Cooldown Recovery And Ability Damage
31.description: Your abomination has increased cooldown recovery speed for its abilities, and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) with abilities that have cooldowns.

33.name: Assemble Abomination Stomp Upgrade
33.description:
{Stomp} has a reduced cooldown.

For each {Bone Golem} absorbed,  Stomp deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased area of effect.

6.name: Assemble Abomination Warrior Attack
6.description:
If a {Skeleton Warrior} or {Skeleton Rogue} is absorbed, your abomination is granted the ability to {Double Strike} with a 6 second cooldown, dealing significant melee damage.

Double Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per Skeleton Warrior or Rogue consumed.

Effects such as this which apply per skeleton absorbed can only consider up to 20 skeletons in total.

29.name: Assemble Abomination Consume Mage Devouring Souls
29.description: If a {Skeletal Mage} is absorbed, your abomination can cast {Devouring Souls}, a spell that releases multiple necrotic projectiles.

15.name: Assemble Abomination Cooldown Recovery With Health Sacrifice
15.description: Your abomination has increased cooldown recovery speed for its abilities, but takes damage equal to a percentage of its maximum health each time it uses an ability with a cooldown.

18.name: Assemble Abomination Consume Wraith Soul Reave
18.description:
If a {Wraith} is absorbed, its melee attack is replaced with {Soul Reave}, which deals melee necrotic damage.

Soul Reave has 200% damage effectiveness compared to the basic melee attack's 150%, and Soul Reave has 15% more radius compared to the basic melee attack.

19.name: Assemble Abomination Consume Golem Stomp
19.description: If a {Bone Golem} is absorbed, your abomination uses {Stomp}, a melee attack that deals physical damage and has a high chance to stun enemies in a large area.

23.name: Assemble Abomination Consume Archer Nova
23.description:
If a {Skeletal Archer} is absorbed, your abomination casts {Eternal Arrow} every 4 seconds, a bow ability that deals physical damage and has 100% chance to Recurve.

Your abomination gains additional bow damage per point of your Intelligence.

32.name: Assemble Abomination Consume Zombie Explosive Attack
32.description: If a {Volatile Zombie} is absorbed, your abomination gains an explosive {Tail Slam} ability.

9.name: Assemble Abomination No Skeletons Buff Nearby Minions
9.description: Channelling Assemble Abomination consumes minions in a larger area.

4.name: Assemble Abomination Poison Aura
4.description:
Your abomination casts {Aura of Rot}, poisoning itself and nearby enemies every second.

For each {Skeleton Rogue} absorbed, your abomination gains additional chance to inflict poison on hit.

Effects such as this which apply per skeleton absorbed can only consider up to 20 skeletons in total.

25.name: Assemble Abomination Dont Devour Zombies
25.description: Your abomination will not devour {Volatile Zombies}, even if they were absorbed to create it.

34.name: Assemble Abomination Sacrifice Instead Of Devour

2.name: Dread Shade Mana Efficiency
2.description: Dread Shade costs less mana and has increased cast speed.

3.name: Dread Shade Armor Protections Faster Decay
3.description: Dread Shade now grants minions armor based on your vitality, but Dread Shade decays your minions faster.

4.name: Dread Shade Additional Shades
4.description: You can control one additional Dread Shade or Infernal Shade at once.

6.name: Dread Shade Minion Frenzy
6.description: Dread Shade now grants frenzy to affected minions for a fixed duration after being cast.

7.name: Dread Shade Minion Haste But Ignites
7.description: Dread Shade now grants the targeted minion {Haste} while it persists, but it also applies a stack of ignite to the targeted minion each second.

8.name: Dread Shade Slower Decay
8.description: Dread Shade drains your minions' health more slowly and all affected minions deal additional necrotic damage with spells and attacks.

10.name: Dread Shade No Decay But Poisons
10.description: Dread Shade no longer decays your minions' health, but instead inflicts a stack of {Everlasting Poison} each second.

12.name: Dread Shade Minion Chance To Crit And Be Crit
12.description: The minion targeted by Dread Shade has additional critical strike chance and critical strike multiplier, but also has additional chance to be critically hit.

16.name: Dread Shade Attack And Cast Speed
16.description: Dread Shade grants affected minions increased attack and cast speed.

17.name: Dread Shade Damned Chance
17.description: Minions affected by Dread Shade have a chance to inflict {Damned} to enemies they hit.

19.name: Dread Shade Area
19.description: Dread Shade affects minions in a larger area.

20.name: Dread Shade More Damage Faster Decay Increased Area
20.description: Dread Shade affects minions in a larger area and grants more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the targeted minion's health decays more quickly.

21.name: Dread Shade Mark For Death On All On Expiration
21.description:
Dread Shade applies {Mark for Death} to nearby enemies and minions when it expires.

Mark for Death is a curse that reduces all resistances by 25%. It cannot stack.

22.name: Dread Shade Sacrifice On Death No Chain
22.description: When any of your minions targeted by Dread Shade dies, it casts {Sacrifice} on additional minions, with each cast consuming mana equal to Sacrifice's mana cost.

23.name: Dread Shade Cast On Enemy No Drain Limited Duration
23.description:
Dread Shade now attaches to enemies instead, still buffing your minions, but Dread Shade now has a duration, and this duration cannot be increased.

This does not buff or drain the health of enemies.

24.name: Dread Shade Affect You And Allies
24.description: You are affected by the beneficial buffs of Dread Shade's aura.

25.name: Dread Shade Doom Brand
25.description: Dread Shade now drains the health of other minions, and marks them with {Doom Brand}. When they die, the brand explodes dealing necrotic spell damage to surrounding enemies.

26.name: Dread Shade Doom Brand Effect
26.description: {Doom Brand} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

27.name: Dread Shade Buff Effect Per Missing Minion Health
27.description: Dread Shade grants increased effect of all its buffs for each 3% of missing health on the targeted minion.

29.name: Dread Shade Spirit Plague On Expiration
29.description: Dread Shade applies {Spirit Plague} to a nearby enemy whenever it expires.

28.name: Dread Shade Infernal Shade Duration Refresh
28.description: When a minion targeted by a Dread Shade dies, you have a chance to summon a {Volatile Zombie}.

9.name: Dread Shade Increased Area Per Minion
9.description: Dread Shade has increased area of effect per active minion when cast, up to a maximum benefit.

13.name: Dread Shade Taunts But Rooted
13.description: Dread Shade now roots the targeted minion and causes it to taunt enemies around it.

14.name: Dread Shade No Aura Buff More Damage
14.description: Dread Shade grants the targeted minion significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Dread Shade no longer buffs other minions.

18.name: Dread Shade Damned In Area To All
18.description: Dread Shade now inflicts {Damned} each second to all enemies and friendly minions in its area.

15.name: Dread Shade Attack And Cast Speed But Blinds
15.description: Dread Shade now increases the attack and cast speed of the targeted minion, but they have less critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers).

30.name: Dread Shade Volatile Zombie On Death
30.description: When a minion targeted by a Dread Shade dies, you have a chance to summon a single {Volatile Zombie} from its corpse.

31.name: Dread Shade Single Shade
31.description: Dread Shade no longer drains the health of the minion it is attached to, but you are limited to one active Dread Shade. Increases to health drain from this tree instead increase damage taken by the minion.

32.name: Dread Shade Poison Conversion
32.description: Dread Shade now increases poison damage instead of necrotic damage, and converts added necrotic damage from the base skill and this tree to chance to poison on hit.

34.name: Dread Shade Damage Over Time
34.description: Dread Shade grants affected minions more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

1.nodeName: Infernal Shade Increased Mana Efficiency and Cast Speed
1.name: Infernal Shade Increased Mana Efficiency and Cast Speed

3.nodeName: Infernal Shade Giant Shade Increased Damage
3.name: Infernal Shade Giant Shade Increased Damage

4.nodeName: Infernal Shade Increased AoE Damage and Mana Cost
4.name: Infernal Shade Increased AoE Damage and Mana Cost

6.nodeName: Infernal Shade Increased Damage While Waiting
6.name: Infernal Shade Increased Damage While Waiting

8.nodeName: Infernal Shade More Damage and Reduced Duration
8.name: Infernal Shade More Damage and Reduced Duration

12.nodeName: Infernal Shade More Damage and Reduced Area
12.name: Infernal Shade More Damage and Reduced Area

16.nodeName: Infernal Shade Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed
16.name: Infernal Shade Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed

22.nodeName: Infernal Shade Increased Damage Per Second
22.name: Infernal Shade Increased Damage Per Second

23.nodeName: Infernal Shade Unlimited Duration On Minions
23.name: Infernal Shade Unlimited Duration On Minions

5.nodeName: Infernal Shade Ground Targetable With Reattach
5.name: Infernal Shade Ground Targetable With Reattach

7.name: Infernal Shade Added Shades

15.nodeName: Infernal Shade Ground Targetable Without Reattach
15.name: Infernal Shade Ground Targetable Without Reattach

2.name: Flurry Increased Attack Speed
2.description: Flurry has increased attack speed.

3.name: Flurry Attack Speed Per Hit
3.description: You have increased attack speed for each hit you dealt with your previous flurry, up to a maximum.

5.name: Flurry More Damage
5.description: Flurry deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifers).

6.name: Flurry Leech
6.description: Flurry leeches a portion of the damage it deals as health.

8.name: Flurry Adrenaline Rush Bleed Chance
8.description: Each stack of {Adrenaline Rush} grants a chance to inflict bleed on hit.

9.name: Flurry Adrenaline Rush Damage vs Bosses
9.description: Eack stack of {Adrenaline Rush} grants Flurry more hit damage against bosses and rare enemies.

10.name: Flurry Adrenaline Rush Increased Duration
10.description: {Adrenaline Rush} lasts longer.

11.name: Flurry Adrenaline Rush Max Stacks
11.description: {Adrenaline Rush} can have multiple stacks.

14.name: Flurry More Damage From Longer Channel
14.description: Flurry deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each second channelled up to a maximum.

15.name: Flurry Channel Resistances
15.description: You have additional physical and elemental resistances while channelling Flurry.

16.name: Flurry Channel Inaccuracy
16.description: If you are using a bow you fire arrows faster, but they are less accurate.

17.name: Flurry Poison Bleed And Shred
17.description:
Flurry's first strike has a chance to inflict poison.
Flurry's second strike has a chance to cause bleed.
Flurry's third strike has a chance to shred physical and poison resistance.

18.name: Flurry Bleed Effectiveness
18.description: Bleed inflicted by Flurry has additional Physical Penetration.

19.name: Flurry More Poison Damage
19.description: Poison inflicted by Flurry has additional Poison Penetration.

21.name: Flurry Waves Range
21.description: The {Force Waves} travel further.

22.name: Flurry Added Crit Chance
22.description: Improves Flurry's base critical strike chance.

23.name: Flurry Increased Crit Multiplier
23.description: Flurry critical strikes deal more damage.

24.name: Flurry Heal On Crit
24.description: Critical strikes restore health. The amount of health gained is increased by Dexterity.

25.name: Flurry Health Gain On Hit
25.description: Flurry grants health when hitting at least one enemy.

26.name: Flurry Mana Gain On Hit
26.description: Flurry grants mana when hitting at least one enemy.

27.name: Flurry Slow On 3 Hits
27.description: Flurry's third strike Slows enemies hit.

28.name: Flurry More Damage Third Hit
28.description: Flurry's first and second strike deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but the third strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Flurry More Damage Over Time
12.description: Flurry strikes an additional time.

13.name: Flurry Channelled
13.description: Flurry is now a channelled ability that costs mana per second to maintain.

29.name: Flurry Multishot
29.description: If you are using a bow, every 6th arrow is replaced with {Multishot}.

7.name: Flurry Chance To Gain Adrenaline Rush
7.description: Flurry strikes have a chance to grant you {Adrenaline Rush}, granting Flurry 5% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and 5% increased attack speed. This lasts for 4 seconds, can stack up to 4 times.

20.name: Flurry Force Wave
20.description: If you are using a melee weapon Flurry now causes {Force Waves} to blast forward with each strike, dealing melee physical damage.

4.name: Flurry Kinetic Burst On Death
4.description: Enemies killed by Flurry have a chance to release a {Kinetic Burst} around the target, dealing physical damage.

0.name: Firebrand Root Node
0.description: A melee attack which grants you a stack of firebrand buff if it hits an enemy. Firebrand buff increases the size of subsequent firebrand attacks and adds melee fire damage.

1.name: Firebrand More Damage
1.description: Firebrand deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Firebrand More Melee Damage Per Stack
2.description: Firebrand deals more melee damage per stack of Firebrand (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Firebrand Shatter Strike Frostbite Chance
4.description: Using {Shatter Strike} consumes stacks of Firebrand to gain {Frostbite} Chance per stack consumed.

5.name: Firebrand Increased Crit Chance Per Stack
5.description: Firebrand has increased melee critical strike chance per stack of Firebrand.

6.name: Firebrand Added Melee Crit Multi Per Stack
6.description: Firebrand has additional melee critical strike multiplier per stack of Firebrand.

8.name: Firebrand Crit Consume
8.description: Consuming stacks of Firebrand with {Incineration} grants bonus critical strike chance and critical strike multiplier per stack.

9.name: Firebrand Added Max Stacks
9.description: Firebrand can have more maximum stacks.

10.name: Firebrand Added Elemental Prot Per Stack
10.description: Firebrand grants additional armor and fire resistance per stack of Firebrand.

12.name: Firebrand Mana Strike Ward If Hit
12.description: Gain ward per stack of Firebrand when you hit at least 1 enemy with {Mana Strike}.

13.name: Firebrand Static Stacks On Hit
13.description: Gain stacks of {Static} if Firebrand hits at least one enemy.

14.name: Firebrand Ward If Hit
14.description: You gain ward when Firebrand hits at least one enemy.

15.name: Firebrand Ward Gain Per Stack
15.description: You gain ward per second per stack of Firebrand.

16.name: Firebrand Increased Duration
16.description: Stacks of Firebrand last longer.

17.name: Firebrand Stacks All Refresh
17.description: You refresh the duration of all stacks of Firebrand when gaining a new stack.

19.name: Firebrand Increased Attack Speed Per Stack
19.description: Firebrand attacks faster per stack of Firebrand, up to a maximum.

21.name: Firebrand Added Spell Crit Multi Per Stack
21.description: Firebrand grants global spell critical strike multiplier per stack of Firebrand.

22.name: Firebrand Flame Wave If Hit
22.description: If Firebrand hits at least one enemy, it consumes 6 mana to cast {Flame Wave}, a spell that deals fire damage in a line.

23.name: Firebrand Added Ignite Chance
23.description: Firebrand has a chance to ignite enemies.

24.name: Firebrand Spreading Flames
24.description:
Firebrand has a chance to inflict {Spreading Flames} when hitting an ignited enemy.

Stacks of Firebrand also grant more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against enemies afflicted by Spreading Flames.

25.name: Firebrand Added Ignite Chance Per Stack
25.description: Each stack of Firebrand grants you global Ignite Chance.

26.name: Firebrand Flame Reave Ignite Chance
26.description: Using {Flame Reave} consumes stacks of Firebrand to gain {Ignite} Chance per stack consumed.

27.name: Firebrand Added Stacks Per Attack
27.description: You gain an additional stack of Firebrand when attacking, but Firebrand costs more mana.

28.name: Firebrand Ward Gain Per Stack Expired
28.description: You gain ward when a stack of Firebrand expires or is consumed.

3.name: Firebrand Triple Strike
3.description: Firebrand now shoots three lines instead of one in a cone in front of you, but costs more mana.

7.name: Firebrand Melee Consume
7.description: Your next melee attack, that is not Firebrand, consumes all stacks of Firebrand and deals more damage per stack consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Firebrand Lightning Conversion
11.description:
Firebrands's base fire damage and added melee fire damage from stacks is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

All ignite chance from this tree is converted to shock chance and effects related to ignite now depend on shock instead.

Swaps Firebrand's {Fire} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

18.name: Firebrand No Attack Speed Scaling
18.description:
Firebrand can have more maximum stacks and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer scales with attack speed. 

Firebrand can still gain attack speed from the {Fulmination} node.

20.name: Firebrand Adaptive Spell Damage Per Stack
20.description: Stacks of Firebrand add spell damage rather than melee fire damage.

0.name: Shield Bash Root Node
0.description:
A melee directional attack that that stuns enemies for 1 second. 100% increased stun chance against non-boss enemies.

1% more damage per 1% block chance (up to 100%, multiplicative with other modifiers).

1.name: Shield Bash Increased Stun Duration
1.description: Stuns caused by Shield Bash last longer.

3.name: Shield Bash Health Gained On Stun
3.description: You are granted health when you stun an enemy with Shield Bash.

4.name: Shield Bash Shield Fragments
4.description:
If Shield Bash is used while you have a shield equipped, it fires shield fragments in a cone in front of you.

While Shield Bash is on cooldown you cannot block.

Only works if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

5.name: Shield Bash Health Gained On Stun Per Strength
5.description: You are granted health per point of Strength, when you stun an enemy with Shield Bash.

6.name: Shield Bash Increased Width
6.description: Shield Bash deals damage in a wider area.

7.name: Shield Bash Frailty
7.description: Shield Bash now applies {Frailty} to enemies hit.

8.name: Shield Bash Fire Damage
8.description:
Shield Bash deals additional melee fire damage.

If Shield Bash has a cooldown, it also deals more fire damage per block chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to 100%.

9.name: Shield Bash Fire Buff
9.description:
Shield Bash causes your next melee or throwing attack to have additional ignite chance and critical strike chance. Excludes channelled skills.

This effect is significantly reduced if Shield Bash does not have a cooldown.

11.name: Shield Bash Block Node
11.description: Shield Bash grant you additional block chance and block effectiveness for a short duration after use.

12.name: Shield Bash Lunge and Rush
12.description:
After you use Shield Rush or Lunge, you Shield Bash in the direction you traveled.

Shield Bash must have a cooldown, be charged and on your action bar for this effect to work.

13.name: Shield Bash Guaranteed Block
13.description:
For 4 seconds after using Shield Bash, you are guaranteed to block a limited number of hits.

Only works if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

14.name: Shield Bash Blind
14.description: Shield Bash now also blinds enemies hit.

16.name: Shield Bash Slow Chance
16.description: Shield Bash now also slows enemies.

17.name: Shield Bash Increased Length
17.description: Shield Bash deals damage in a longer area.

18.name: Shield Bash Potion Chance
18.description: Shield Bash will cause one enemy that was hit to drop a potion if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

19.name: Shield Bash Slow Duration
19.description: Slows caused by Shield Bash last longer.

20.name: Shield Bash Knockback
20.description: Shield Bash now also knocks enemies back, if Shield Bash has a cooldown.

22.name: Shield Bash All Charges
22.description: Using Shield Bash consumes all charges and deals significantly more damage per extra charge consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

23.name: Shield Bash Added Physical
23.description: Shield Bash deals additional melee physical damage.

25.name: Shield Bash Armor Shred
25.description: Shield Bash reduces enemy armor and costs less mana.

26.name: Shield Bash Bleed
26.description: Shield Bash causes enemies to bleed, but costs more mana.

27.name: Shield Bash Increased Physical Per Strength
27.description: Shield Bash deals more physical damage per point of Strength (multiplicative with other modifiers).

29.name: Shield Bash More Damage
29.description: Shield Bash deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

30.name: Shield Bash Stun Chance
30.description: Shield Bash has an increased chance to stun and stuns it inflicts last longer.

2.name: Shield Bash Ring of Shield Wall
2.description: If Shield Bash is used while Ring of Shields is active, the shields form a wall which increases the width of Shield Bash, based on the number of active shields.

10.name: Shield Bash Fire Conversion
10.description:
Shield Bash no longer has a guaranteed stun, but instead applies additional stacks of ignite. All stun duration modifiers from this tree are converted to affect ignite duration instead.

Shield Bash's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage. 

Swaps Shield Bash's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

15.name: Shield Bash Shield Throw Ricochet
15.description: Your next {Shield Throw} can ricochet 5 additional times, after using Shield Bash.

21.name: Shield Bash Charges and Cooldown
21.description: You gain an additional charge of Shield Bash, but it has a longer cooldown.

24.name: Shield Bash No Shield
24.description: Shield Bash no longer requires a shield to use, but costs more mana.

28.name: Shield Bash No Cooldown
28.description: Shield Bash no longer has a cooldown, but costs significantly more mana and no longer has a guaranteed stun or ignite.

32.name: Shield Bash Damage Per Block Effectiveness
32.description: Shield Bash has added melee damage based on your block effectiveness.

34.name: Shield Bash Attack Speed
34.description: Shield Bash has increased attack speed scaling with your block chance up to a maximum.

0.name: Puncture Root Node
0.description: An extended melee stab or piercing bow attack that causes enemies to bleed.

2.name: Puncture Bleed Chance
2.description: Puncture has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

3.name: Puncture More Damage Less Speed
3.description: Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

5.name: Puncture Phys Shred
5.description: Puncture has a chance to shred enemy physical resistance.

6.name: Puncture More Damage Per Second
6.description: Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged.

7.name: Puncture Frenzy On Hit
7.description: Attacking with Puncture and hitting at least one enemy grants {Frenzy} for a short duration.

8.name: Puncture Efficacious Toxin
8.description: Puncture has a chance to apply {Efficacious Toxin} on hit, causing them to take increased damage over time.

9.name: Puncture Poison Chance
9.description: Puncture has a chance to poison on hit.

10.name: Puncture Side Shadows
10.description: Directly using Puncture causes several {Mirages} to briefly appear at either side of you, attacking in the same direction as you.

11.name: Puncture Bleeding Fury Bleed Chance
11.description: Directly using Puncture and hitting at least one enemy grants you {Bleeding Fury}, a buff that grants bleed chance and stacks up to 3 times. Each stack falls off after 3 seconds of not attacking.

12.name: Puncture Bleeding Fury Max Stacks
12.description: {Bleeding Fury} can have more maximum stacks.

13.name: Puncture Armor Shred And Effectiveness
13.description:
Puncture has a chance to shred enemy armor. 

Armor Shred applied by Puncture has increased effect.

14.name: Puncture Shadow Daggers
14.description:
Puncture has a chance to apply a {Shadow Dagger} on hit.

This chance is doubled when you directly use Puncture.

15.name: Puncture More Damage Per Slow
15.description: Puncture deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the target.

16.name: Puncture More Damage Against Slowed
16.description: Puncture hits deal more damage against slowed and {Immobilized} targets (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Puncture Melee Range
19.description: When used with a melee weapon Puncture has increased range.

20.name: Puncture Bow Damage
20.description: When used with a bow, Puncture deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per enemy pierced.

21.name: Puncture More Hit Damage Per Ailment
21.description: Puncture hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per unique negative ailment on the target.

22.name: Puncture Black Arrow Charge
22.description: If you use Puncture with a bow while you have a {Black Arrow}, Puncture charges 100% faster and blinds on hit.

26.name: Puncture Big Hit Consumes Bleed
26.description: Instead of applying bleed, the greater Puncture consumes all stacks of bleed on the target, causing them to deal damage immediately and restoring health per stack consumed.

25.name: Puncture Poison Converted To Bleed
25.description:
Converts poison chance from all sources to bleed chance.

This has no effect if you have {Scalebane}.

24.name: Puncture Every Third Bigger
24.description: Every third Puncture deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and if it is a melee attack it has increased area.

4.name: Puncture Charge Up
4.description:
Puncture can be charged up, causing Puncture with a melee weapon to deal damage in a larger area and causes Puncture with a bow to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged.

After 1 second it releases automatically.

17.name: Puncture Bleed Converted To Poison
17.description:
Converts bleed chance from all sources to poison chance.
Converts physical resistance shred from all sources to poison resistance shred. Poison applied by Puncture has increased duration.

23.name: Puncture Immobilize
23.description: Every 10 seconds, your next Puncture {Immobilizes} enemies on hit, causing them to be unable to move for 1 second.

18.name: Puncture Mana
18.description: Directly using Puncture and hitting at least one enemy restores mana. Puncture also has physical penetration based on your maximum mana.

28.name: Puncture Rapid Strikes
28.description: Every 4 seconds your first few direct uses of Puncture are rapid strikes, which have increased attack speed.

1.name: Decoy Explosion Damage And Area
1.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and explodes in a larger area.

2.name: Decoy All Explosion Damage
2.description: All explosions from Decoy deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Decoy Detonate Mana Cost
6.description: Detonation costs less mana.

7.name: Decoy Freeze Rate
7.description: All explosions have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

8.name: Decoy Max Small Explosion
8.description: Decoy can cause additional small explosions.

9.name: Decoy Duration And Cooldown
9.description: Decoy lasts longer, but has a longer cooldown.

10.name: Decoy Reflect Damage Taken
10.description: Decoy reflects a percentage of damage to attackers.

11.name: Decoy Dodge Rating
11.description: You have additional dodge chance while the decoy exists.

12.name: Decoy Crit Multi From Dodge
12.description: When the decoy expires, for the next 4 seconds you have additional critical strike multiplier equal to your dodge chance while the decoy was active.

14.name: Decoy Ignite Frequency
14.description: The Decoy has increased ignite frequency.

18.name: Decoy Mana Efficiency
18.description: Decoy costs less mana.

20.name: Decoy Sonic Wave Haste
20.description: {Sonic Wave} grants {Haste} to you and your allies hit for a duration.

21.name: Decoy Sonic Wave Armor Shred
21.description: {Sonic Wave} inflicts additional stacks of armor shred, and armor shred it applies lasts longer.

23.name: Decoy Sonic Wave Fire Shred
23.description:
{Sonic Wave} inflicts fire resistance shred instead of armour shred.

If you have taken {Frostfire Powder} it instead inflicts cold resistance shred.

24.name: Decoy Reduced Duration
24.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Decoy has a shorter duration.

26.name: Decoy Final Explosion Ignite
26.description: Decoy's final explosion ignites enemies.

27.name: Decoy Damage And Mana Cost
27.description: Decoy's final explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs more mana.

5.name: Decoy Combo Detonate
5.description:
Decoy becomes a combo ability. The first cast creates the decoy, and the second detonates it. The remote detonation costs mana.

Has no effect if Decoy has additional charges.

3.name: Decoy Small Explosion Chance
3.description: Decoy has a chance to cause a small explosion when hit, up to a maximum of 2 explosions.

4.name: Decoy Cold Explosion
4.description:
All explosions' base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage. Explosions also gain a base freeze rate.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to chill chance and effects related to ignite now depend on chill instead.

13.name: Decoy Ignites Each Second
13.description: The Decoy is on fire and ignites nearby enemies each second, but costs more mana.

15.name: Decoy Ignite Converted To Poison
15.description:
Small explosions are replaced by Acid Flask detonations. The final explosion is replaced by three Acid Flasks ejected from the decoy.
{On Fire} now inflicts poison instead of ignite.

16.name: Decoy Max Charges
16.description: Decoy can store an additional charge.

19.name: Decoy Sonic Wave
19.description: The Decoy emits a {Sonic Wave} when it appears, inflicting {Frailty} and armor shred to nearby enemies.

22.name: Decoy Sonic Wave Fear
22.description: {Sonic Wave} Fears enemies for a duration.

25.name: Decoy Shadow Clone
25.description: Decoy leaves a {Shadow} in its place after detonating.

28.name: Decoy Throws More Decoys
28.description: Throw additional Decoys near the target location. Decoy location is slightly randomised.

0.name: Dancing Strikes Root Node
0.description: A series of fast dash attacks.

2.name: Dancing Strikes Physical Penetration
2.description: Dancing Strikes penetrates enemy physical resistance.

3.name: Dancing Strikes Shadow Daggers
3.description: Dancing Strikes inflicts enemies with {Shadow Dagger}.

4.name: Dancing Strikes Bleed Chance
4.description: Dancing Strikes has a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

5.name: Dancing Strikes Damage Over Time
5.description: You deal more global damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each time you have used Dancing Strikes recently.

7.name: Dancing Strikes Melee Damage Per Poison
7.description: Dancing Strikes deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per poison stacks on the target up to a maximum.

8.name: Dancing Strikes Less Phys More Poison
8.description: Dancing Strikes has a chance to poison enemies, but deals less physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Dancing Strikes Hit Damage Against Ailments
9.description: Dancing Strikes hits deal more damage to bleeding and poisoned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Dancing Strikes Dodge Rating
10.description: Dancing Strikes grants you additional dodge rating for a short duration on use.

11.name: Dancing Strikes Dodge Rating Per Dex
11.description: Dancing Strikes grants you additional dodge rating per point of Dexterity for a short duration on use.

12.name: Dancing Strikes Damage To Bosses
12.description: Dancing Strikes deals more damage to rare enemies and bosses (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Dancing Strikes Third Strike Arena
13.description:
Dancing Strikes' third attack creates a {Fighting Arena} for 4 seconds.

While fighting inside the arena, you and your allies deal more damage and take less damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers). The less damage taken is doubled for you.

14.name: Dancing Strikes Arena Bleed
14.description: You and allies fighting inside the arena have a high chance to cause enemies to bleed.

15.name: Dancing Strikes Dash Distance
15.description: Dancing Strikes deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) but you travel less far between each attack.

16.name: Dancing Strikes Less Damage Over Time
16.description: You take less damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) for a short duration after using Dancing Strikes.

17.name: Dancing Strikes Shadow And Sync Strike
17.description: {Lethal Mirage} and {Synchronized Strikes} deal increased damage for each time you have used Dancing Strikes recently.

18.name: Dancing Strikes Third Strike Heals
18.description: Dancing Strikes' third attack heals you if it hits at least one enemy.

19.name: Dancing Strikes Haste Chance
19.description: Dancing Strikes has a chance to grant you {Haste} for 2 seconds on use.

20.name: Dancing Strikes Shuriken Chance
20.description: Dancing Strikes' second and fourth attack have a chance to throw {Shurikens} in target direction.

21.name: Dancing Strikes Area
21.description: Dancing Strikes deals damage in a larger area.

22.name: Dancing Strikes Shred Armor Chance
22.description: Dancing Strikes has a chance to shred enemy armor.

23.name: Dancing Strikes Rhythm
23.description: When you use Dancing Strikes and hit at least one enemy, you gain a stack of {Rhythm} for a short duration and refresh all existing stacks, granting you global more damage per stack (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Dancing Strikes Rhythm Dodge Rating
24.description: You have increased dodge rating per stack of {Rhythm}.

25.name: Dancing Strikes Rhythm Global Bleed
25.description: You have a global chance to cause enemies to bleed per stack of {Rhythm}.

26.name: Dancing Strikes Rhythm Global Crit Multi
26.description: Your critical strikes deal more damage per stack of {Rhythm}.

27.name: Dancing Strikes Rhythm Damage And Mana
27.description: Each stack of {Rhythm} also grants 5% global more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Dancing Strikes cost more mana.

28.name: Dancing Strikes First Strike Shred
28.description: Dancing Strikes' first attack shreds enemy armor.

29.name: Dancing Strikes Second Strike Shadow
29.description: Dancing Strikes' second attack creates a {Shadow}, but Dancing Strikes costs more mana.

30.name: Dancing Strikes Phys Shred
30.description: Dancing Strikes shreds enemy physical resistance.

31.name: Dancing Strikes Puncture Damage
31.description: Your next {Puncture} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) after using Dancing Strikes.

32.name: Dancing Strikes Shadow Cascade Chance
32.description: Dancing Strikes' first attack has a chance to also attack with {Shadow Cascade}.

6.name: Dancing Strikes Bleed To Poison
6.description: All bleed chance is converted to poison chance with Dancing Strikes. Physical penetration from this tree converted to poison penetration.

0.name: Ballista Root Node
0.description: Summons a ballista that fires fire arrows at nearby enemies.

2.name: Ballista Less Cost And Duration
2.description: Ballista costs significantly less mana, but has a shorter duration.

4.name: Ballista Extra Projectile Chance
4.description: Ballista has a chance to shoot extra projectiles.

6.name: Ballista Faster And Less Damage
6.description: Ballista has more attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

7.name: Ballista Armor Shred Chance
7.description: Ballista has a chance to shred enemy armor.

8.name: Ballista Double Shot Chance
8.description: Ballista has a chance to fire twice in quick succession.

10.name: Ballista Fire Damage And Ignite
10.description: Ballista bolts are lit on fire dealing additional fire damage and have a chance to ignite enemies.

11.name: Ballista Increased Attack Speed
11.description: Ballista has increased attack speed.

12.name: Ballista Arrows Explode On Expiration
12.description: Ballista's bolts now explode on hit dealing fire damage in an area, but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Ballista Explosions Converted To Cold
13.description:
The explosion's base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage. The explosion also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Ignite chance from inside this skill tree is converted to chill chance.

15.name: Ballista More Health And Duration
15.description: Ballista has more health and lasts longer.

16.name: Ballista Slow Chance
16.description: Ballista has a chance to slow enemies.

19.name: Ballista Ailment Chance Applies To Ballista
19.description: Your ailment modifiers also apply to your Ballista, but at a reduced ratio.

20.name: Ballista Gains Attack Speed On Hit
20.description: Ballista gains increased attack speed with each hit.

21.name: Ballista Being Nearby Buffs
21.description: Your Ballistae gain {Frenzy} while you are standing near them.

22.name: Ballista Modifiers Apply To Ballista
22.description: Your damage modifiers also apply to your Ballista, but at a reduced ratio.

23.name: Ballista Slower And More Damage
23.description: Ballista deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Ballista Wider Shield
24.description: Ballista shields are wider.

26.name: Ballista Added Crit Chance
26.description: Improves Ballista's base critical strike chance.

27.name: Ballista Crit Modifiers Applies To Ballista
27.description: Your critical strike chance and critical strike multipliers also apply to your Ballista, but at a reduced ratio.

32.name: Ballista Tripwire
32.description: When you construct a second ballista a tripwire is created between it and the existing ballista. Enemies that cross the tripwire cause both ballistae to explode.

25.name: Ballista More Damage After Potion
25.description: Ballista deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if constructed within 4 seconds of using a potion.

14.name: Ballista Damage And Attack Speed Less Duration

5.name: Ballista Explodes On Death
5.description: Ballista now also explodes when it expires or is destroyed. This explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and hits enemies in a larger area based on your Dexterity.

29.name: Ballista Harpoon
29.description: Every 5 seconds Ballista shoots a {Harpoon Shot}, that sticks into an enemy and pulls them towards the Ballista.

17.name: Ballista Acid Flask Gives Poison Chance
17.description:
Hitting your Ballista with {Acid Flask} gives it a chance to poison enemies and more poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

If {Acid Flask} damage is converted to fire, this is instead ignite chance and more fire damage.

31.name: Ballista Potion Chance
31.description: Ballistae which have hit an enemy have a chance to drop a potion when destroyed, based on the time they existed.

9.name: Ballista Has Shield
9.description: Ballista now has shields in front of it.

18.name: Ballista Placement Speed
18.description: Ballista takes less time to place and has increased attack speed based on your Dexterity.

28.name: Ballista Pierce
28.description: Ballista bolts pierces enemies (continue through targets they hit).

5.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Physical Damage Buff On 4 Hits
5.name: Shadow Cascade Physical Damage Buff On 4 Hits

7.name: Shadow Cascade Bleed Chance

10.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Attack Speed Affects Damage
10.name: Shadow Cascade Attack Speed Affects Damage

11.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Damage Against Bleed And Poison
11.name: Shadow Cascade Damage Against Bleed And Poison

15.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Mana Regain Per Shadow
15.name: Shadow Cascade Mana Regain Per Shadow

18.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Melee Damage Against Low Health
18.name: Shadow Cascade Melee Damage Against Low Health

20.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Damage No Attack Speed
20.name: Shadow Cascade Damage No Attack Speed

24.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Dagger Damage No Melee
24.name: Shadow Cascade Dagger Damage No Melee

8.name: Shadow Cascade Bleed To Poison

14.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Shadow On Kill Chance
14.name: Shadow Cascade Shadow On Kill Chance

16.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Mana Regain With Shadow
16.name: Shadow Cascade Mana Regain With Shadow

19.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Damage With Number Of Shadows
19.name: Shadow Cascade Damage With Number Of Shadows

27.nodeName: Shadow Cascade Damage Per Swords Or Daggers
27.name: Shadow Cascade Damage Per Swords Or Daggers

0.name: Lethal Mirage Root Node
0.description: A circular attack that's also used by your shadow clones. Requires dual wielding.

2.name: Lethal Mirage Added Melee Phys Per Sword Or Dagger
2.description: Lethal Mirage deals additional melee physical damage per equipped sword or dagger.

3.name: Lethal Mirage Physical Penetration
3.description: Lethal Mirage penetrates enemy physical resistance.

6.name: Lethal Mirage Bleed Chance And Effect
6.description: Lethal Mirage has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, and bleed inflicted by Lethal Mirage has additional Physical Penetration.

7.name: Lethal Mirage More Hit Damage Per Bleed
7.description: Lethal Mirage hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target up to a maximum.

8.name: Lethal Mirage More Crit Chance Per Bleed
8.description: Lethal Mirage has more critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of stack of bleed on the target.

10.name: Lethal Mirage Only Strikes Allies
10.description: Lethal Mirage now targets allies rather than enemies.

11.name: Lethal Mirage Self Mirage Form
11.description: When Lethal Mirage ends you gain {Mirage Form} for 1 second per critical strike landed. This can stack up to 6 seconds.

12.name: Lethal Mirage Health And Mana On Kill
12.description: You gain health and mana per kill with Lethal Mirage.

17.name: Lethal Mirage Faster
17.description: Mirages are created faster, causing Lethal Mirage to have a shorter duration.

18.name: Lethal Mirage Cooldown Per Kill
18.description: Reduce Lethal Mirage's cooldown per enemy killed by Lethal Mirage up to a maximum.

19.name: Lethal Mirage More Damage And Melee Leech
19.description: Lethal Mirage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and leeches a portion of the melee damage dealt as health.

20.name: Lethal Mirage Consumes Shadows For Mirages
20.description: Lethal Mirage consumes all active {Shadows} gaining additional Mirages per {Shadow} consumed, resulting in more hits.

21.name: Lethal Mirage More Damage Per Shadow Consumed
21.description: Lethal Mirage deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per {Shadow} consumed.

23.name: Lethal Mirage Smoke Cloud
23.description: The smoke from {Umbral Burst} persists as a cloud blinding enemies and inflicting {Frailty} each second.

24.name: Lethal Mirage Smoke Cloud Makes Allies Uncrittable
24.description: Allies within the smoke cloud avoid critical strikes.

25.name: Lethal Mirage Smoke Cloud Converted To Poison
25.description: The smoke cloud is converted to a poison cloud causing enemies to be poisoned each second, but no longer inflicts {Frailty}.

26.name: Lethal Mirage Longer Poison
26.description: Poisons caused by Lethal Mirage last longer.

27.name: Lethal Mirage Haste On Use
27.description: You gain {Haste} when you reappear.

32.name: Lethal Mirage Less Mirage Added Crit Chance
32.description: Improves Lethal Mirage's base critical strike chance, but it has fewer Mirages, resulting in fewer hits.

9.name: Lethal Mirage Can Strike Allies
9.description: Lethal Mirage can now also hit allies granting them the {Mirage Form} buff for 4 seconds, granting bleed chance and additional dodge rating.

14.name: Lethal Mirage Additional Mirages 1
14.description: Lethal Mirage gains an additional Mirage, resulting in more hits.

15.name: Lethal Mirage Chance To Leave Shadow
15.description: Mirages have a chance to leave behind a {Shadow}.

22.name: Lethal Mirage Smoke Burst On Reappear
22.description: When you reappear Lethal Mirage releases a burst of smoke blinding enemies and inflicts them with {Frailty}.

28.name: Lethal Mirage Additional Mirages 2
28.description: Lethal Mirage gains an additional Mirage, resulting in more hits.

29.name: Lethal Mirage Shadow Cascade Chance
29.description: Mirages have a chance to use {Shadow Cascade} in addition to their normal attack.

31.name: Lethal Mirage Cull And Cannot Bleed
31.description:
Lethal Mirage instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health), but can no longer inflict bleed.

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

30.name: Lethal Mirage Shadow At Disappear Location
30.description:
Lethal Mirage creates a {Shadow} at the location you disappear from.

This {Shadow} is not consumed by the {Shadow Eater} node.

4.name: Lethal Mirage Lightning
4.description:
Lethal Mirage deals additional melee lightning damage and its base physical damage is converted to Lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Physical penetration from this tree is converted to lightning penetration.

All bleed and poison chances are converted to shock chance.

Swaps Lethal Mirage's {Physical} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

0.name: Detonating Arrow Root Node
0.description:
Requires a bow.

Fires an arrow that attatches itself in a target then explodes after 0.6 seconds. Added bow damage is converted to lightning damage.

2.name: Detonating Arrow Reduced Arm Time And Crit Chance
2.description: Detonating Arrow has increased critical strike chance and it has reduced arming time.

3.name: Detonating Arrow Crit Multi And Crit Vulnerability
3.description: Detonating Arrow critical strikes deal more damage and it has a chance to apply {Critical Vulnerability} to enemies, making them easier to critically strike.

6.name: Detonating Arrow Explosion Area
6.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area.

7.name: Detonating Arrow Shock Chance And Less Hit Damage
7.description: Detonating Arrow has a chance to shock enemies, but the explosion hit deals less hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

8.name: Detonating Arrow Consume Mana More Damage
8.description: Detonating Arrow consumes a portion of your current mana to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to the mana consumed.

9.name: Detonating Arrow Explosion Area And Damage
9.description: The explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

11.name: Detonating Arrow Plus Charges
11.description: You can store an additional charge of Detonating Arrow.

14.name: Detonating Arrow Freeze Rate
14.description: Detonating Arrow has a higher chance based on your uncapped Cold Resistance.

15.name: Detonating Arrow Less Movespeed With Arrow
15.description: Detonating Arrow causes enemies to have less movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each arrow attached.

16.name: Detonating Arrow More Arming Time
16.description: Detonating Arrow has a longer arming time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

17.name: Detonating Arrow Damage Increased Arming Time
17.description: Detonating Arrow deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a longer arming time. The explosion deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second the arrow spent arming.

18.name: Detonating Arrow Less Elemental Resist
18.description: Detonating Arrow causes enemies to have less elemental resistance while they have at least 1 arrow attached.

19.name: Detonating Arrow Explosion Hit Damage Per Missing Health
19.description: The explosion hit deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 5% health the enemy is missing.

20.name: Detonating Arrow Damage Less Explosion Radius
20.description: The explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Detonating Arrow Damage Per Second Charged
22.description: Detonating Arrow deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second charged up.

23.name: Detonating Arrow Shock Chance
23.description: Detonating Arrow has a chance to shock enemies.

24.name: Detonating Arrow Homing
24.description: Detonating Arrow now slightly seeks out targets.

27.name: Detonating Arrow Attack Speed Shock Duration
27.description: Detonating Arrow has increased attack speed and shock applied by this skill last longer.

29.name: Detonating Arrow Chain Lightning Pen Shock Chance
29.description: {Lightning Tendrils} penetrate a portion of enemy lightning resistance and have a chance to shock enemies.

4.name: Detonating Arrow Cone And Reduced Arm Time
4.description: Detonating Arrow now explodes on impact in a cone behind the target rather than a circle, but no longer has an arming time.

5.name: Detonating Arrow Fire Conversion
5.description:
The explosion base lightning damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to shock now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for a {Fire} tag.

10.name: Detonating Arrow More Explosion Area Damage And Stun Chance
10.description: Detonating Arrow now has a cooldown, but when you directly use it, it deals more damage in a significantly larger area (both multiplicative with other modifiers), and has an increased chance to stun.

12.name: Detonating Arrow First Arrow Explodes
12.description: If an enemy has an attached Detonating Arrow and gets hit again, it explodes the first arrow immediately.

13.name: Detonating Arrow Cold Conversion
13.description:
Detonating Arrow's base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage. It also gains a base freeze rate.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to chill chance.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag. 

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow is converted to fire with {Dragon Arrow}.

21.name: Detonating Arrow Charge Up To Pierce
21.description: Detonating Arrow can now be charged up for up to 2 seconds, causing it to pierce a number of enemies (continue through targets it hits) per 0.5 seconds charged up.

30.name: Detonating Arrow Poison Conversion Less Hit Damage
30.description:
The explosion now poisons enemies on hit, but its hits deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Detonating Arrow's base damage is convered to Physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

Swaps Detonating Arrow's {Lightning} tag for {Poison} and {Physical} tags.

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow is converted to fire or cold with {Dragon Arrow} or {Frostfang Arrow}.

26.name: Detonating Arrow Damage And Area With Existing Arrow
26.description:
When you hit an enemy with Detonating Arrow that already has an arrow attached to them, the explosion deals more damage in a larger area (multiplicative with other modifiers). 

{Suckerpunch Arrow} will not attach an additional Detonating Arrow.

28.name: Detonating Arrow Lightning Chain
28.description:
The explosion causes {Lightning Tendrils} to chain out to other nearby targets. This can't hit enemies hit by the explosion.

This has no effect if Detonating Arrow's damage is converted.

32.name: Detonating Arrow No Mana Cost
32.description: Detonating arrow no longer costs mana and instead restores mana when you directly use it and hit at least one enemy. However it now only has a small chance of exploding.

34.name: Detonating Arrow Damage Over Time
34.description: Ailments inflicted by Detonating Arrow deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Smoke Bomb Slows Each Second
2.description: Applies slow to enemies within the smoke cloud each second.

4.name: Smoke Bomb Armor Shred
4.description: Applies armor shred to enemies within the smoke cloud each second.

6.name: Smoke Bomb Bow Poison
6.description: You have a chance to poison enemies with bow attacks while inside the smoke cloud.

8.name: Smoke Bomb Slow And Armor Shred Frequency
8.description: Smoke Bomb has a chance to shred enemy armor each second within the smoke cloud.

10.name: Smoke Bomb Increased Duration
10.description: The smoke cloud lasts longer.

11.name: Smoke Bomb Blinds And Crit Chance With Bow
11.description: Your bow attacks have improved base critcal strike chance and blind enemies while you are inside the smoke cloud.

12.name: Smoke Bomb Smoke Blades
12.description: You and allies are granted {Smoke Blades} each second for 4 seconds while inside the smoke cloud, granting you additional melee and throwing damage. This effect can stack.

13.name: Smoke Bomb Smoke Blades Leech
13.description: {Smoke Blades} now also causes melee and throwing attacks to leech a portion of the damage you deal as health.

17.name: Smoke Bomb Increased Starting Area
17.description: The smoke cloud covers a larger area.

19.name: Smoke Bomb Frailty By Initial Hit
19.description: The initial burst applies {Frailty} to enemies, causing them to deal less damage.

22.name: Smoke Bomb Allies Ailment Cleansing
22.description: The initial burst also cleanses negative ailments on allies.

24.name: Smoke Bomb Mana From Consumed Shadows
24.description: The initial burst consumes all {Shadows} inside the smoke to grant you and allies mana per {Shadow} consumed this way.

26.name: Smoke Bomb Early Fire Smoke
26.description: Leaving the smoke cloud early causes it to immediately catch fire and end.

29.name: Smoke Bomb Dusk Shroud
29.description: You are granted a stack of {Dusk Shroud} each second for 2 seconds while you are in the smoke cloud, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

30.name: Smoke Bomb Dusk Shroud Frequency
30.description: The smoke cloud grants stacks of {Dusk Shroud} more frequently.

31.name: Smoke Bomb Dusk Shrould To Allies
31.description: The smoke cloud now also grants {Dusk Shroud} to allies for 2 seconds while inside the smoke cloud.

32.name: Smoke Bomb Cloud Growth
32.description: The smoke cloud has a larger area and grows faster.

34.name: Smoke Bomb Puncture And Shurikens Bleed
34.description: {Puncture} and {Shurikens} have a chance cause enemies to bleed if used inside the smoke cloud.

7.name: Smoke Bomb Targeted Bomb With Bow
7.description: While using a bow you now shoot an arrow that detonates the Smoke Bomb at the target location.

5.name: Smoke Bomb Poison Shred Conversion
5.description: Armor shred applied by Smoke Bomb is converted to poison resistance shred.

9.name: Smoke Bomb Shadow Dagger On Slow
9.description: Smoke Bomb has a chance to inflict a stack of {Shadow Dagger} whenever it applies slow.

14.name: Smoke Bomb Create Shadow Chance
14.description: The smoke cloud has a chance to create a {Shadow} each second at a random location inside the smoke cloud.

15.name: Smoke Bomb Crimson Shroud On Kill
15.description: You are granted a stack of {Crimson Shroud} on kill while inside the smoke cloud, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken for 4 seconds. This stacks up to 3 times.

18.name: Smoke Bomb Backflip On Use
18.description:
You backflip away from target direction when you use Smoke Bomb. Smoke Bomb now counts as movement skill.

During Smoke Bomb's movement you are immune to Damage.

21.name: Smoke Bomb Ailment Cleansing
21.description: The initial burst cleanses negative ailments on you.

25.name: Smoke Bomb Fire Smoke At End
25.description: The smoke cloud catches fire at the end of its duration, igniting enemies inside the cloud.

27.name: Smoke Bomb Shadow Cascade At End
27.description: You use {Shadow Cascade} when the smoke cloud ends.

28.name: Smoke Bomb Explodes Decoys
28.description: Your {Decoys} inside the smoke cloud automatically explode when the smoke cloud ends.

20.name: Smoke Bomb Silver Shroud
20.description: The initial burst grants you a stack of {Silver Shroud}, causing you to dodge the next hit and gain ward per stack.

23.name: Smoke Bomb Heal From Consumed Shadows
23.description: The initial burst consumes all {Shadows} inside the smoke to grant you and allies health per {Shadow} consumed this way.

16.name: Smoke Bomb Traversal
16.description: You regain health on kill while inside the smoke cloud.

2.name: Hail Of Arrows More Area
2.description: Hail of Arrows deals damage in a larger area

3.name: Hail Of Arrows Dusk Shroud Chance
3.description: You have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} each second for 2 seconds while inside the area, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

4.name: Hail Of Arrows Dusk Shroud To Allies
4.description: Hail of Arrows now also grants a stack of {Dusk Shroud} to allies each second for 2 seconds while inside the area.

6.name: Hail Of Arrows Barrage Crit Chance
6.description: Improves {Barrage of Arrows'} base critical strike chance.

7.name: Hail Of Arrows Barrage Immobilize And Slow
7.description: {Barrage of Arrows} immobilizes enemies for a short duration. Rare enemies and bosses are slowed instead.

8.name: Hail Of Arrows Frailty Chance
8.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies each second.

9.name: Hail Of Arrows Armor Shred Chance
9.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to shred enemy armour each second.

10.name: Hail Of Arrows Crit Vulnerability
10.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to inflict enemies with {Crit Vulnerability} each second.

11.name: Hail Of Arrows Damage Against Ignited
11.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage to ignited enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Hail Of Arrows Damage Less Radius
13.description: Hail of Arrows deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but in a smaller area (multiplicative with other modifiers).

14.name: Hail Of Arrows Bow Leech
14.description: Hail of Arrows leeches a portion of the bow damage it deals as health.

16.name: Hail Of Arrows Damage
16.description: Hail of Arrows deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

32.name: Hail Of Arrows Bow Damage Against Stunned
32.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage to stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). This does not affect ailment damage.

17.name: Hail Of Arrows Less Duration Reduced Mana Cost
17.description: Hail of Arrows costs less mana, but has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Hail Of Arrows Reduced Mana Cost And Cooldown
19.description: Hail of Arrows costs less mana and has a shorter cooldown, but has a longer delay before the arrows fall.

20.name: Hail Of Arrows Bleed Chance
20.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to cause enemies to bleed each second.

21.name: Hail Of Arrows Bow Damage Per Bleed
21.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage per stack of bleed on the enemy, up to a maximum. This does not affect ailment damage.

23.name: Hail Of Arrows Slow Chance
23.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to slow enemies each second.

25.name: Hail Of Arrows Freeze Rate Chill Duration
25.description: Hail of Arrows has increased chance to freeze enemies each second and has increased chill duration.

26.name: Hail Of Arrows Increased Duration
26.description: Hail of Arrows lasts longer.

27.name: Hail Of Arrows Bow Damage Per Second
27.description: Hail of Arrows deals more bow damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) over its duration scaling up to a maximum. This does not affect damaging ailments.

28.name: Hail Of Arrows More Duration One Hail
28.description:
Hail of Arrows lasts significantly longer (multiplicative with other modifiers), but you can only have one Hail of Arrows active at a time. 

Using Hail of Arrows again causes the old instance to stop.

31.name: Hail Of Arrows Poison Chance
31.description: Hail of Arrows has a chance to poison enemies each second.

5.name: Hail Of Arrows Barrage And Mana Cost
5.description: Hail of Arrows now also shoots a {Barrage of Arrows} on use dealing bow physical damage, but costs more mana. This does not scale with damage over time.

12.name: Hail Of Arrows Fire Damage Conversion
12.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to bleed now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

This has no effect if Hail of Arrows is converted to cold with {Crystal Arrows} or to poison with {Acid Rain}.

18.name: Hail Of Arrows Less Duration More Charges
18.description: You can store additional charges of Hail of Arrows, but it has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Hail Of Arrows Advancing Rectangle
22.description: Hail of Arrows now fall in a forward advancing rectangle area rather than a circle.

24.name: Hail Of Arrows Cold Conversion
24.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies each second.

All slow chance from this tree is converted to chill chance and effects related to slow now depend on chill instead.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Cold} tag.

This has no effect if Hail of Arrows is converted to poison with {Acid Rain}.

29.name: Hail Of Arrows Channeled
29.description:
Hail of Arrows is now channeled and can be retargeted while you are channelling. It costs less initial mana, but rapidly drains your mana.

Channelled Hail of Arrows' delay is halved, and increases to its delay are halved.

30.name: Hail Of Arrows Poison Conversion
30.description:
Hail of Arrows' base physical damage is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Swaps Hail of Arrows' {Physical} tag for a {Poison} tag.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

2.name: Cinder Strike Ignite Chance and Duration
2.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to ignite enemies and ignites inflicted by the first attack have increased duration.

4.name: Cinder Strike Blind Or Frailty
4.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to blind enemies while using a bow and a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies while using a melee weapon.

5.name: Cinder Strike First Strike Area And Damage
5.description: Cinder Strike's first attack deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

7.name: Cinder Strike Second And Third Increased Attack Speed
7.description: Cinder Strike's second and third attacks have increased attack speed.

8.name: Cinder Strike Blind Converted To Critical Vulnerability
8.description: Blind chance from all sources is converted to {Critical Vulnerability} chance for Cinder Strike.

9.name: Cinder Strike Crit Multi Doubled For First
9.description: Cinder Strike deals more critical strike damage. This bonus is doubled for the first attack.

10.name: Cinder Strike Mana Efficiency
10.description: Cinder Strike costs less mana.

12.name: Cinder Strike Explosive Flask Damage
12.description: {Volatile Flask} deals more explosion damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Cinder Strike Explosion On Kill
13.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to cause an explosion on kill. This counts as a {Volatile Flask} explosion.

14.name: Cinder Strike Base Fire Damage Per Ignited Enemy
14.description: Cinder Strike hits deals additional fire damage for each ignited enemy you have hit recently up to a maximum.

15.name: Cinder Strike More Crit Chance Per Ignite
15.description: Cinder Strike's first attack has more critical strike chance (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of ignite on the target up to a maximum.

16.name: Cinder Strike Fire DoT Per Dexterity
16.description: Cinder Strike deals increased fire damage over time per point of Dexterity.

17.name: Cinder Strike Ignite Conversion
17.description: Poison chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance for Cinder Strike.

18.name: Cinder Strike Fire Damage Buff
18.description: If you use and hit at least one enemy with Cinder Strike you are granted {Oil Coating} granting you increased fire damage. This effect can stack and lasts 4 seconds.

19.name: Cinder Strike Fire Buff Ignite Effect And Fire Pen
19.description:
If you have at least 3 stacks of {Oil Coating} you are granted additional fire penetration.

This effect is doubled for ignites inflicted by Cinder Strike.

20.name: Cinder Strike Fire Buff Limit But Regain Health And Mana
20.description: {Oil Coating} is limited to 5 stacks. If you would gain another stack you instead regain health and mana.

21.name: Cinder Strike Fire Buff Dodge And Fire Res
