21.description: You have additional chance to dodge and additional fire resistance per stack of {Oil Coating}.

22.name: Cinder Strike Fire Buff Elemental Damage
22.description: {Oil Coating} now grants you increased elemental damage rather than just fire damage.

23.name: Cinder Strike Fire Buff Fire Throwing Damage
23.description: {Oil Coating} now also grants additional throwing fire damage.

24.name: Cinder Strike Fire Shred Chance
24.description: Cinder Strike has a chance to shred enemy fire resistance.

26.name: Cinder Strike More Burning Daggers Less Mana Use
26.description: {Burning Daggers} from all sources deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and Burning Daggers from {Molten Arsenal} consume less mana.

28.name: Cinder Strike Burning Daggers From Shadows
28.description: All your {Shadows} now also throw 5 {Burning Daggers} in a cone in front of them when you do. This consumes all active {Shadows}.

29.name: Cinder Strike Damage
29.description: Cinder Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers and its hits deal additional fire damage.

6.name: Cinder Strike Only First Strike
6.description: Cinder Strike now only has the first attack and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs significantly more mana.

11.name: Cinder Strike Explosive Flask On First Strike
11.description: When you use Cinder Strike and hit with its first attack it has a chance to throw a {Volatile Flask} at a nearby target.

25.name: Cinder Strike Burning Dagger
25.description: If you use and hit at least one enemy with Cinder Strike it consumes 8 mana granting you a {Burning Dagger} that circles you for a second before launching at the nearest enemy.

27.name: Cinder Strike Burning Dagger Cone
27.description: You now also throw 5 {Burning Daggers} in a cone in front of you on Cinder Strike's first attack.

0.name: Dark Quiver Root Node
0.description:
Requires a bow.

Summons 7 {Black Arrows} which rain from the sky over 4 seconds, granting bonus damage to your next bow attack when retrieved.

2.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Give Damage Over Time
2.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased damage over time to your next bow attack.

3.name: Dark Quiver Arrow Pickup Gives Crimson Shroud
3.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you a stack of {Crimson Shroud} for a short duration, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken. This stacks up to 3 times for a short duration.

5.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Restore Health
5.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} restores health.

6.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Give Dusk Shroud
6.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you a stack of {Dusk Shroud} for 4 seconds, granting you glancing blow chance and dodge rating. This effect can stack.

9.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Give Bow Phys Damage
9.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants additional physical damage to your next bow attack.

10.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Give Crit Chance
10.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased critical strike chance to your next bow attack.

4.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant Phys Shred Chance
4.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants a chance to shred enemy physical resistance to your next bow attack.

8.name: Dark Quiver Frenzy On Pickup
8.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants you the Frenzy buff, granting you 20% increased attack and cast speed for a short duration.

13.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant More Damage But Consume Mana
13.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to your next bow attack, but consume additional mana.

15.name: Dark Quiver Cinder Strike Culling
15.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Cinder Strike} to instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

16.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Restore Mana
16.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} restores mana.

19.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant Poison Chance And Poison Pen
19.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants additional poison penetration and poison chance to your next bow attack.

20.name: Dark Quiver More Arrows
20.description: Additional {Black Arrows} are summoned, but the arrows are summoned at the same frequency causing {Dark Quiver} to have a longer duration.

21.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant Elemental Damage
21.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants increased elemental damage to your next bow attack.

22.name: Dark Quiver Elemental Bow Attack Ailments
22.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants a chance to freeze, shock or ignite enemies, depending on the element, to your next bow elemental attack.

24.name: Dark Quiver Slows Enemies On Pickup
24.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} slows nearby enemies for a short duration.

26.name: Dark Quiver Arrow Frequency
26.description: {Black Arrows} are summoned more frequently. This does not cause more arrows to be summoned and also causes {Dark Quiver} to have a shorter duration.

27.name: Dark Quiver Instant Arrows
27.description: You instantly summon a number of {Black Arrows} on use. The rest are spread out over the normal duration.

31.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant Ballista Attack Speed
31.description:
Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants active {Ballistae} increased attack speed while they are alive.

This effect stacks up to 4 times.

32.name: Dark Quiver Ballistae Always Crit With 4 Arrows
32.description: {Ballistae} that have been buffed by at least 4 {Black Arrows} always critically strike.

11.name: Dark Quiver Multishot Pierce
11.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Multishot} to pierce additional enemies (continue through targets they hit).

12.name: Dark Quiver Flurry Base Crit
12.description: Using a {Black Arrow} improves your next {Flurry's} base critical strike chance.

14.name: Dark Quiver Cinder Strike Reset On Pickup
14.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} resets the combo of {Cinder Strike}.

17.name: Dark Quiver Consume Shadows For More Damage
17.description:
Using a {Black Arrow} consumes all active {Shadows} to grant your next bow attack more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per {Shadow} consumed.

Consuming at least 3 {Shadows} grants significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

18.name: Dark Quiver Puncture Bleed Chance And Phys Pen
18.description: Using a {Black Arrow} grants {Puncture} additional physical penetration and bleed chance.

23.name: Dark Quiver Detonating Arrow Area
23.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Detonating Arrow} to deal damage in a significantly larger area.

25.name: Dark Quiver Knockbacks Enemies On Pickup
25.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} knocks nearby enemies back 4 meters.

28.name: Dark Quiver Passive Arrow Generation
28.description: Using a bow attack grants you a chance to summon a {Black Arrow} at a random nearby location. This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

29.name: Dark Quiver Hail of Arrows Damage From Crit
29.description: Using a {Black Arrow} causes your next {Hail of Arrows} to deal increased damage over time equal to twice your critical strike chance.

30.name: Dark Quiver Arrows Grant Permanent Ballista Phys Damage
30.description:
Picking up a {Black Arrow} grants active {Ballistae} additional bow physical damage while they are alive.

This effect stacks up to 4 times.

7.name: Dark Quiver Shadow On Pickup
7.description: Picking up a {Black Arrow} creates a {Shadow} at the arrow's location.

34.name: Dark Quiver Heartseeker Recurve Chance
34.description: Using a Black Arrow grants your next {Heartseeker} additional {Recurve} chance.

0.name: Synchronized Strike Root Node
0.description:
Requires a melee weapon.

Jump forward and strike in an area in front of you while shadows appear and simultaneously strike on either side of you.

1.name: Synchronized Strike Increased Area
1.description: Synchronized Strike deals damage in a larger area.

2.name: Synchronized Strike Shadow Damage Within 4 Seconds
2.description: {Shadows} created within 4 seconds of using Synchronized Strike deal increased damage.

4.name: Synchronized Strike Bleed And Physical Shred Chance
4.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to cause enemies to bleed and a chance to shred enemy physical resistance.

5.name: Synchronized Strike Crimson Shroud On Use
5.description: Using Synchronized Strike grants you {Crimson Shroud} for a short duration, granting you bleed chance and less damage over time taken. This stacks up to 3 times for a short duration.

7.name: Synchronized Strike More Damage
7.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

8.name: Synchronized Strike More Damage To Low Health
8.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage to enemies on low health.

9.name: Synchronized Strike Leech
9.description: Synchronized Strike leeches a portion of the damage it deals as health.

10.name: Synchronized Strike Haste On Kill
10.description: You gain {Haste} for a short duration when you kill an enemy with Synchronized Strike.

11.name: Synchronized Strike Culling
11.description:
Synchronized Strike instantly kills enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

12.name: Synchronized Strike Crit Chance Buff On Kill
12.description: You are granted increased critical strike chance for 4 seconds on kill with Synchronized Strike. This effect can stack.

13.name: Synchronized Strike Damage Per Sword Poison Per Dagger
13.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per equipped sword and has a chance to poison enemies per equipped dagger.

14.name: Synchronized Strike Base Crit Chance
14.description: Improves Synchronized Strike's base critical strike chance.

15.name: Synchronized Strike Crit Multi
15.description: Synchronized Strike deals more critical strike damage.

16.name: Synchronized Strike Crit Vulnerability
16.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to inflict enemies with {Critical Vulnerability}.

17.name: Synchronized Strike Armor Shred Chance And Effect
17.description: Synchronized Strike has a chance to shred enemy armor. Armor shred applied by Synchronized Strike has increased effectiveness.

18.name: Synchronized Strike Shadow Dagger
18.description: Synchronized Strike inflicts enemies with a {Shadow Dagger}.

19.name: Synchronized Strike Consume Shadows For Ward And Increased Area
19.description: Synchronized Strike consumes existing {Shadows} to deal damage in a larger area and grant you ward per {Shadow} consumed.

21.name: Synchronized Strike Mana Efficiency
21.description: Synchronized Strike costs less mana.

22.name: Synchronized Strike Attack Speed Buff
22.description: You are granted increased attack speed for 3 seconds if Synchronized Strike hits at least one enemy.

25.name: Synchronized Strike Shadows Restore Health
25.description: {Shadows} created within 4 seconds of using Synchronized Strike restore health on creation.

27.name: Synchronized Strike No Shadows Big Damage
27.description: Synchronized Strike deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but will no longer generate any {Shadows} other than the one created by {Dark Passage}.

28.name: Synchronized Strike Always Crit On Hight Health Targets
28.description: Synchronized Strike always critically hits enemies on high health.

3.name: Synchronized Strike More Shadows And Mana Cost
3.description: Synchronized Strike creates 2 additional {Shadows}, but costs significantly more mana. This can exceed your normal maximum number of {Shadows}.

6.name: Synchronized Strike More Damage But Expire
6.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but {Shadows} from Synchronized Strike expire after attacking. They also do not cause existing {Shadows} to expire and do not trigger {on shadow creation} or {on shadow expiration} effects.

20.name: Synchronized Strike Existing Shadows Shadow Cascade
20.description:
Synchronized Strike causes existing {Shadows} to use {Shadow Cascade} on use, rather than being consumed immediately. 

This effect consumes a portion of mana per active Shadow.

23.name: Synchronized Strike Shadows Jump Inward
23.description: The {Shadows} now jump inward towards the target rather than outward, but Synchronized Strike costs more mana.

24.name: Synchronized Strike Early Attack More Damage
24.description: Synchronized Strike deals more damage, but the {Shadows} now attack from where you teleport from, rather than where you arrive.

26.name: Synchronized Strike Disappear Added Cooldown
26.description: You now disappear instead of teleporting to the target and a {Shadow} is created in your place, but Synchronized Strike has a longer cooldown.

0.name: Surge Root Node
0.description: Quick fixed distance dash which hits all enemies in the path with a lightning melee attack.

1.name: Surge Shock And Stun Chance
1.description: Surge shocks enemies and has an increased chance to stun.

2.name: Surge Increased Damage Area
2.description: Surge deals damage in a larger area.

4.name: Surge Spark Charge On Hit
4.description: Surge has a chance to apply a {Spark Charge} on enemies.

5.name: Surge Shock And Spark Charge Effect Per Sword
5.description:
Shock applied by Surge has increased duration per equipped sword.

{Spark Charges} applied by Surge deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per equipped sword.

6.name: Surge Added Melee Lightning Damage
6.description: Surge deals additional melee lightning damage.

7.name: Surge More Damage Per Movement Speed
7.description: Surge deals more damage per 1% of movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Surge Increased Duration
9.description: Surge has increased duration, causing you to move slower.

10.name: Surge More Lightning Damage Per Static
10.description: Surge deals more lightning damage per 4 {Static Charges} you have when you use Surge (multiplicative with other modifiers).

11.name: Surge Static Charges On Use
11.description: Gain {Static Charges} when you use Surge.

12.name: Surge Static Charges On Hit
12.description: You gain {Static Charges} on hit with Surge.

14.name: Surge Base Crit And Ward On Crit
14.description: Improves Surge's base critical strike chance and you gain ward on crit with Surge.

16.name: Surge Ward If Hits At Least One
16.description: You gain ward if Surge hits at least one enemy.

17.name: Surge Ward Per Hit
17.description: You gain ward on hit with Surge.

19.name: Surge Cold Damage Wave
19.description: Surge causes a {Tidal Wave} to continue past the arrival point, dealing spell cold damage and chills enemies.

20.name: Surge Freeze Rate Multi And More Cold Damage
20.description: Surge has a higher chance to freeze enemies and deals more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Surge Lightning Blast On Arrival
21.description: You now cast {Lightning Blast} on arrival with Surge. This uses Lightning Blast's mana cost.

24.name: Surge Max Dormant Energy Stacks
24.description: While Surge is on cooldown, using a melee attack and hitting at least one enemy grants you a stack of {Dormant Energy} up to a maximum. Using Surge again consumes all stacks to deal more damage per stack (multiplicative with other modifiers).

25.name: Surge Ward Per Dormant Energy Consumed
25.description: Consuming stacks of {Dormant Energy} grants you ward per stack consumed.

26.name: Surge Fire Aura Per Dormant Energy Consumed
26.description: You have a chance to cast {Fire Aura} when you consume a stack of {Dormant Energy}.

28.name: Surge Flame Reave On Arrival
28.description: Surge causes a {Flame Reave} to continue past the arrival point, a melee attack dealing fire damage in a cone in front of you. This effect costs Flame Reave's mana cost as well.

30.name: Surge Reduced Distance and More Damage
30.description: Surge deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) but you travel a shorter distance.

3.name: Surge Immobilize On Hit
3.description: Surge {Immobilizes} enemies hit for a short duration.

8.name: Surge Damage Immunity
8.description: You are invulnerable while Surging.

13.name: Surge Casts Static On Arrival
13.description: You cast {Static} on arrival with Surge.

15.name: Surge Increased Travel Distance
15.description: You travel further with Surge.

18.name: Surge Cold Conversion
18.description:
Surge's base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and effects related to shock now depend on Frostbite instead.

Swaps Surge's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

22.name: Surge Lightning Blast While Travelling
22.description: You now cast {Lightning Blasts} while travelling with Surge. This uses Lightning Blast's mana cost.

23.name: Surge Zigzag
23.description: Surge now moves you in a zig zag motion rather than a straight line and deals more spell lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

27.name: Surge Fire Conversion
27.description:
Surge's base lightning damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to lightning damage. 

Shock chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to shock now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps Surge's {Lightning} tag for a {Fire} tag.

Has no effect if you have the {Glacial Assault} node.

0.name: Warcry Root Node
0.description: Unleash a mighty roar that stuns and knocks back nearby enemies.

2.name: Warcry Increased Area
2.description: Warcry affects a larger area.

3.name: Warcry Ally Increased Crit Chance
3.description: You and allies affected by Warcry gain increased crit chance for 4 seconds.

6.name: Warcry Ally Increased Cold Damage
6.description: You and allies affected by Warcry deal increased cold damage for 4 seconds.

7.name: Warcry Ally Cold Minion Increased Crit Chance
7.description: You and your cold minions affected by Warcry gain increased crit chance and additional chill chance for 4 seconds.

8.name: Warcry Frostbite Chance
8.description: Warcry inflicts stacks of {Frostbite} to affected enemies.

9.name: Warcry Frozen Targets Take Increased Damage
9.description: Enemies frozen by Warcry take increased damage from hits.

10.name: Warcry Frailty Chance
10.description: Warcry applies one stack of {Frailty} to affected enemies for a short duration.

11.name: Warcry Wolf And Scorpion Ailment Chance
11.description: For 4 seconds after using Warcry, your {Wolves} have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and your {Scorpion} has a chance to poison enemies.

13.name: Warcry Heal On Use
13.description:
Warcry now also restores your health. 

The amount of healing is increased by healing effectiveness and is doubled if used while on low health.

15.name: Warcry Cleanses Ailments
15.description: Warcry now cleanses negative ailments on you.

16.name: Warcry Heal Affects Allies
16.description:
Warcry now also restores ally health for the same amount as from {Breath of Eterra}. 

The amount of healing is increased by healing effectiveness and is doubled if used while on low health.

17.name: Warcry Haste On Hit
17.description: If Warcry hits at least one enemy, you gain {Haste} for 1 second.

18.name: Warcry Increased Haste Duration And Mana Efficiency
18.description: Warcry costs less mana and {Haste} gained from {Hastily Advance} lasts longer.

19.name: Warcry Gain Frenzy With Haste
19.description: You gain {Frenzy} for the same duration as you have Haste from {Hastily Advance}.

21.name: Warcry Increased Fear Duration
21.description: Fear inflicted by Warcry lasts longer and each stack of the {Berserk} buff from the Berserker node now also causes you to deal more damage to Feared enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

24.name: Warcry Berserk Increased Melee Damage And Max Stacks
24.description: {Berserk} has increased duration and additional maximum stacks.

26.name: Warcry Berserk Increased Attack Speed
26.description: {Berserk} now also grants you increased attack speed per stack of Berserk up to a maximum.

27.name: Warcry Increased Knockback Distance
27.description: Warcry knocks enemies further back.

30.name: Warcry Deals Physical Spell Damage
30.description: Warcry now hits enemies and deals spell physical damage.

31.name: Warcry Added Bleed Chance
31.description: Warcry causes enemies to bleed.

32.name: Warcry Half Cooldown No CC
32.description: Warcry now has a cooldown of 5 seconds which cannot be reduced by stunning or freezing enemies, but Warcry no longer has a guaranteed stun, freeze, or fear.

4.name: Warcry Crits Can Recast
4.description:
While Warcry is on cooldown, your critical strikes have a chance to use Warcry for you. 

This effect can only happen once per direct Warcry use, and it will reset the cooldown.

5.name: Warcry Cold Conversion
5.description:
Warcry now freezes enemies instead of stunning them, but it no longer knocks enemies back.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and effects related to bleed now depend on Frostbite instead.

14.name: Warcry Maelstrom On Use
14.description:
You now cast {Maelstrom} when you use Warcry. 

Maelstrom cast this way costs less mana.

12.name: Warcry Damage Immunity On use
12.description: You are invulnerable for 1 second after using Warcry.

22.name: Warcry Berserk
22.description:
You gain the {Berserk} buff for 1.5 seconds when you use Warcry, granting you additional melee damage.

While you have Berserk, you gain additional stacks of Berserk on melee hit up to a maximum, and melee hits refresh all stacks.

25.name: Warcry Berserk Applies To Raptor And Bear
25.description: {Berserk} now also affects your Raptor and Bear.

20.name: Warcry Fear Instead Of Stun
20.description: Warcry now fears enemies for 2 seconds instead of stunning them.

33.name: Warcry Totem
33.description: You now place down a totem for 3 seconds that repeatedly uses Warcry instead of you, but Warcry costs more mana.

28.name: Warcry Pull Instead Of Knockback
28.description: Warcry now pulls enemies instead of knocking them back.

29.name: Warcry Taunts
29.description: Warcry now also taunts affected enemies for a short duration.

1.name: Volatile Zombie Leap Attack
1.description: Zombies now leap towards their targets, up to a maximum distance.

2.name: Volatile Zombie Damage And Movespeed
2.description: Zombies deal more damage and have more movement speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

3.name: Volatile Zombie Slow And Powerful
3.description: Zombies deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and the Zombies' health decays slower, but they also move slower.

4.name: Volatile Zombie Giant
4.description: You now summon a single large zombie with more health, that deals more damage in a larger area (all multiplicative with other modifiers), but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

7.name: Volatile Zombie Marrow Shards On Death
7.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Marrow Shards} from the Zombie towards a nearby enemy.

Marrow Shards does not cost health when cast this way.

8.name: Volatile Zombie Vomit
8.description: Zombies will now {Vomit} on enemies before exploding, dealing physical and poison damage over time. Zombies lose 33% of their maximum health per second while vomiting.

9.name: Volatile Zombie Mark For Death
9.description: The explosion applies {Mark for Death} to enemies hit, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

10.name: Volatile Zombie More Zombies Per Cast
10.description: You summon additional Zombies per cast, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana and has additional cooldown duration.

12.name: Volatile Zombie Poison Chance
12.description: The explosion has a chance to poison enemies.

14.name: Volatile Zombie Explosion Area
14.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area.

15.name: Volatile Zombie Explosion Area And Skeleton Vanguard On Death
15.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area and when a Zombie dies it creates a {Skeleton Vanguard}, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

17.name: Volatile Zombie Corpse Parasites On Death
17.description: When a Zombie dies it creates {Corpse Parasites} for 4 seconds, but Volatile Zombie costs more mana.

18.name: Volatile Zombie Big Explosion No Movement Or Leap
18.description: The explosion deals damage in a larger area, but Zombies no longer move.

19.name: Volatile Zombie Chance To Sacrifice On Death
19.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Sacrifice} on another nearby minion.

Sacrifice cast this way costs less mana.

20.name: Volatile Zombie Less Mana Cost Faster Summoning Speed
20.description: You summon Zombies faster and Volatile Zombie costs less mana.

21.name: Volatile Zombie You Heal From Zombie Max Health
21.description:
You are healed for a portion of the Zombies' maximum health when they explode. 

The amount healed is affected by your increased healing effectiveness.

22.name: Volatile Zombie Fire Conversion
22.description:
The explosion's base physical damage and {Vomit}'s base physical and poison damage are converted to fire. Consequently their damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical or poison damage.

Poison chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance and effects related to poison now depend on ignite instead.

23.name: Volatile Zombie Necrotic Conversion
23.description: The explosion's base physical and fire damage and {Vomit}'s base physical damage are converted to necrotic. Consequently their damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical or fire damage.

24.name: Volatile Zombie Culling
24.description:
Zombies instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

25.name: Volatile Zombie Fear
25.description: The explosion now fears enemies for a short duration.

26.name: Volatile Zombie Infernal Shade On Nearby Enemy On Death
26.description:
When a Zombie dies you have a chance to cast {Infernal Shade} on an enemy near the zombie.

Infernal Shade cast this way costs less mana.

27.name: Volatile Zombie Speed On Lower Health
27.description: Zombies have increased movement speed per point of missing health, but their health decays faster.

28.name: Volatile Zombie More Hit Damage To Rares And Bosses
28.description: The explosion's hit deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) against bosses and rare enemies.

29.name: Volatile Zombie Stun Chance
29.description: The explosion has an increased chance to stun enemies.

6.name: Volatile Zombie Vomit Armor Shred Chance
6.description: {Vomit} has a chance to shred enemy armor each second.

11.name: Volatile Zombie Vomit More Damage
11.description: You now summon Zombies in a wide line that walk towards the target. When one of them explode, they all explore.

16.name: Volatile Zombie Vomit Poison Chance
16.description: [Skeleton Warriors] from the [node name] node have a chance to be summoned as a [Skeletal Mage] instead.

31.name: Volatile Zombie Autocast On Other Minion Death
31.description: When a minion dies you have a chance to cast Volatile Zombie at its location, expending its mana cost.

32.name: Volatile Zombie You Gain Ward From Zombie Max Health
32.description: {Necromantic Fervor} now grants ward rather than health. The amount of ward gained is not affected by increased healing effectiveness.

0.name: Summon Storm Crow Root Node
0.description: Summons a Volatile Zombie which shambles towards an enemy and explodes.

1.name: Summon Storm Crow Cast And Movement Speed
1.description: Storm Crows have increased cast speed, movement speed and more health (multiplicative with other modifiers).

2.name: Summon Storm Crow Armor Shred
2.description: Storm Crows hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

3.name: Summon Storm Crow Damage Per Crow
3.description: Storm Crows deal more damage per active crow (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Summon Storm Crow Armour Shred Chance And Effect Per Stat
4.description: Storm Crows hits have a chance to shred enemy armor per point of strength, and armor shred they apply has increased effectiveness per point of strength.

5.name: Summon Storm Crow Melee Hits Grant More Damage
5.description: Your melee hits have a 20% chance to grant active Storm Crows more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

6.name: Summon Storm Crow Shock Chance And Lightning Resist
6.description: Storm Crows have a chance to shock enemies and have additional lightning resistance.

7.name: Summon Storm Crow Activated Ability More Damage And Increased Stun Chance
7.description: {Crowstorm} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has an increased chance to stun enemies.

9.name: Summon Storm Crow Area And Shock
9.description: {Crowstorm} deals damage in a larger area and has a chance to shock enemies it hits.

10.name: Summon Storm Crow Cold Conversion
10.description:
Storm Crows' base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and effects related to shock now depend on Frostbite instead.

11.name: Summon Storm Crow Freeze Rate Multiplier
11.description: Storm Crows have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

12.name: Summon Storm Crow More Spell Damage Per Shock
12.description: Storm Crows deal more spell damage per stack of shock on the target (multiplicative with other modifiers), up to a maximum.

13.name: Summon Storm Crow Lightning Damage Modifiers Apply To Crows
13.description: Your increases to lightning damage also apply to your Storm Crows, but at reduced effectiveness.

14.name: Summon Storm Crow Lightning Attack Chance To Chain
14.description: Storm Crows' basic lightning spell has a chance to chain to up to 2 additional targets.

15.name: Summon Storm Crow Damage And Crit Chance
15.description: Storm Crows deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased critical strike chance.

16.name: Summon Storm Crow Crit Multi
16.description: Storm Crows' critical strikes deal more damage.

17.name: Summon Storm Crow Melee Hits Grant Crit Chance
17.description: Your melee hits have a 20% chance to improve active Storm Crows' base critical strike chance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

18.name: Summon Storm Crow Lightning Attack More Damage From Moving
18.description: Storm Crows' basic lightning spell deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each second they spent moving since their previous attack, up to a maximum duration.

19.name: Summon Storm Crow Single Crow More Powerful
19.description: You can now only have 1 Storm Crow, it deals more damage, has more health (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and is larger.

20.name: Summon Storm Crow Lightning Attack More Damage But Consumes Mana
20.description: Storm Crows' basic lightning spell deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but now consumes your mana.

21.name: Summon Storm Crow Aspect Of The Crow Chance
21.description: Storm Crow hits have a chance to grant you a stack of {Aspect of the Crow} for 8 seconds, granting you additional melee and spell lightning damage per stack.

22.name: Summon Storm Crow Other Companions Gain Lesser Aspect
22.description: Your non-crow companions gain {Aspect of the Crow} when you do, but it has 50% reduced duration on them.

23.name: Summon Storm Crow Heals Other Companions
23.description:
Storm Crows fly to your companions below half health to heal them. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

The amount of healing is increased by healing effectiveness.

24.name: Summon Storm Crow Heal Grants Ward
24.description:
{Goodberries} now also grants the companion ward. 

The amount of ward gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

25.name: Summon Storm Crow Heal Cooldown Recovery Speed
25.description: Storm Crows are able to use {Goodberries} more frequently.

26.name: Summon Storm Crow Heals You
26.description: Storm Crows can now also fly to and heal you with {Goodberries}.

27.name: Summon Storm Crow Wisdom Of The Storm Every 10 Seconds
27.description:
Every 10 seconds Storm Crows cast {Wisdom of the Storm} on its nearest ally, granting it {Aspect of the Crow}. 

This effect has 50% reduced duration on minions.

28.name: Summon Storm Crow Intelligence Per Crow
28.description: You are granted additional Intelligence per active Storm Crow.

29.name: Summon Storm Crow Wisdom Only On Totems
29.description: {Wisdom of the Storm} no longer has a cooldown, but can now only target totems.

8.name: Summon Storm Crow Dodge Rating
8.description: Storm Crows have additional dodge chance and increased dodge chance.

31.name: Summon Storm Crow Cooldown And Damage
31.description: {Crowstorm} deals more damage per contributing Crow (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown.

30.name: Summon Storm Crow Teleport
30.description:
When you directly cast {Crowstorm} you and your crows are teleported to the target location if it is accessible.

Crowstorm now counts as a {Traversal} skill.

2.name: Void Cleave Ignite Chance
2.description:
Void Cleave hits ignite enemies and half of its base damage is converted to fire, meaning that this half of the damage scales with increases to fire damage but not with increases to void damage.

Ignite inflicted by Void Cleave gains additional fire penetration based on your increased void damage.

Void Cleave gains the {fire} tag.

3.name: Void Cleave Fire Conversion
3.description:
All of Void Cleave's base void damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to void damage.

Additionally your next non-channeled fire attack or spell after Void Cleave deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Void resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to fire resistance shred and effects related to void resistance shred now depend on fire resistance shred instead.

Void Cleave loses the {void} tag.

4.name: Void Cleave Molten Infusion To Minions
4.description: When you use Void Cleave and hit at least one enemy, your minions gain a stack of {Molten Infusion} for 4 seconds, granting them additional melee fire damage and a chance to ignite enemies.

5.name: Void Cleave Molten Infusion Effect From Direct Hits
5.description: Minions only gain a stack of {Molten Infusion} when you directly hit them with Void Cleave, but {Molten Infusion} has significantly increased effect.

6.name: Void Cleave Travel Distance And Damage
6.description: You can travel farther with Void Cleave and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

7.name: Void Cleave More Damage After Warpath
7.description: After channelling {Warpath} for at least 2 seconds your next Void Cleave within 1 second deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

8.name: Void Cleave More Area And Damage
8.description: Void Cleave deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in an increased area.

9.name: Void Cleave Base Crit And Cannot Be Dodged
9.description: Improves Void Cleave's base critical strike chance and it cannot be dodged.

10.name: Void Cleave Melee Damage To High Health Enemies
10.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies on high health.

11.name: Void Cleave Crit Chance And Crit Vulnerability
11.description: Void Cleave hits apply {Critical Vulnerability} and Void Cleave has increased critical strike chance.

12.name: Void Cleave Crit Multi And Mana On Crit
12.description: Void Cleave critical strikes deal more damage and you gain mana with Void Cleave critical strikes.

13.name: Void Cleave Next Erasing Strike Crit
13.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next {Erasing Strike} is always a critical strike.

14.name: Void Cleave Melee Void Damage Tripled For Echoes
14.description:
Void Cleave deals additional melee void damage. 

This effect is tripled for echoed Void Cleaves.

15.name: Void Cleave More Melee Void Damage To Low Health Enemies
15.description: Void Cleave deals significantly more melee void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies on low health.

16.name: Void Cleave Slow Chance And Increased Stun Chance And Duration
16.description: Void Cleave hits slow enemies, have increased stun chance and increased stun duration.

17.name: Void Cleave Cooldown Recovery Speed
17.description: Void Cleave has a shorter cooldown.

18.name: Void Cleave Void Res Shred
18.description: Void Cleave hits shred enemy void resistance.

19.name: Void Cleave Cast Abyssal Echoes
19.description:
You cast {Abyssal Echoes} after using Void Cleave.

Abyssal Echoes cast this way uses its mana cost.

20.name: Void Cleave Time Rot On Hit
20.description: Void Cleave hits inflict enemies with {Time Rot}.

21.name: Void Cleave Ravaging Aura Duration Per Enemy Hit
21.description: When you use Void Cleave you gain {Ravaging Aura} for a short duration scaling with the amount of enemies hit up to 10.

22.name: Void Cleave Ravaging Aura More Damage And Area
22.description: {Ravaging Aura} deals additional spell void damage and has an increased area of effect.

23.name: Void Cleave Ravaging Aura Leech
23.description: {Ravaging Aura} leeches a portion of the damage it deals as health.

24.name: Void Cleave Next Throwing Attack Inflicts Stacks Of Time Rot
24.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next throwing attack inflicts enemies with {Time Rot}.

25.name: Void Cleave Damage Per Time Rot On Enemy
25.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of {Time Rot} on the target.

26.name: Void Cleave Armor Shred And Armor Shred Effect And Duration
26.description: Void Cleave hits shred enemy armor and {Armor Shred} applied by Void Cleave has increased effect and duration.

27.name: Void Cleave Next Throwing Attack Added Void Damage
27.description: If Void Cleave hits at least one enemy your next throwing attack deals additional void damage.

28.name: Void Cleave Added Charges Added Mana Cost
28.description: You can store an additional charge of Void Cleave, but Void Cleave costs more mana.

29.name: Void Cleave More Melee Damage Per Bleed Or Ignite
29.description: Void Cleave deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed up to a maximum.

30.name: Void Cleave Physical Damage Applies To Fire
30.description: Your increases to physical damage also apply to fire damage for Void Cleave.

32.name: Void Cleave Extended Range
32.description: You can travel much further with Void Cleave (multiplicative with other modifiers), but it has a longer cooldown and now counts as a {Traversal} skill.

2.name: Multistrike Stack Duration And Melee Physical Damage
2.description: Armament stacks last longer and grant you additional melee physical damage per stack.

3.name: Multistrike Armor And Block Effect Stack Buff
3.description: You have additional armor and block effectiveness per stack of Armament.

4.name: Multistrike Consume Stacks At 0 Mana To Restore Mana
4.description: When you drop below 0 mana, you consume all stacks of Armament to restore mana per stack.

5.name: Multistrike Additional Sword At 0 Stacks
5.description: When you have 0 stacks of Armament you have an additional sword when using Multistrike, as if you had 1 stack.

6.name: Multistrike Smites Instead Of Swords
6.description:
Each additional sword is replaced with {Smite}.

Smite cast this way costs its full mana cost per cast.

7.name: Multistrike Multistrike On Block With Cooldown
7.description:
You have a chance to retaliate with Multistrike swords on block. 

This effect has a 1 second cooldown and doesn't include the initial strike.

8.name: Multistrike Additional Swords For Echoes
8.description: Multistrike attacks repeated by your {Echoes} have additional swords.

9.name: Multistrike Initial Strike More Damage
9.description: The initial strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Multistrike More Damage Per Armor
10.description: Multistrike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 30 armor, up to a maximum.

11.name: Multistrike Forge Strike Consumes Stacks To Summon Weapons
11.description: Directly using {Forge Strike} consumes all stacks of Armament to summon additional {Forged Weapons} per stack.

12.name: Multistrike Chance To Summon Weapon At Max Stacks
12.description: Multistrike has a chance to consume a stack of Armament while at maximum stacks to summon a {Forged Weapon}.

13.name: Multistrike Double Strike And Axes
13.description: You now strike twice with Multistrike, but the full attack takes significantly longer. Each additional sword is now replaced with an axe that strikes its target twice.

14.name: Multistrike Base Crit
14.description: Improves Multistrike's base critical strike chance.

15.name: Multistrike Consume Mana To Refresh All Stacks At Positive Mana
15.description: When you create more additional swords than there are nearby enemies, each remaining sword can consume mana to strike the nearest enemy, even if it was hit by the initial attack.

16.name: Multistrike Attack Speed
16.description: Multistrike has increased attack speed.

17.name: Multistrike More Damage At Max Stacks
17.description: Multistrike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you are at maximum stacks of Armament.

18.name: Multistrike Physical Penetration
18.description: Multistrike penetrates enemy physical resistance.

19.name: Multistrike Bleed Chance Per Stack
19.description: Multistrike hits have a chance to inflict bleed on enemies per stack of Armament.

20.name: Multistrike Melee Damage Per Stack Of Bleed
20.description: Multistrike deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed up to a maximum.

21.name: Multistrike Stabs With Spears Instead Of Swords
21.description:
Each additional sword is replaced with a spear, which stabs in an elongated area rather than a slash. This has no effect if swords are already converted to axes.

Additionally, Multistrike's critical strikes deal more damage while wielding a spear.

22.name: Multistrike Stikes Within Larger Area
22.description: Multistrike deals damage in a larger area and its created swords can strike enemies further away.

23.name: Multistrike Strike Another Target On Kill
23.description:
If a sword kills an enemy it will create an additional sword to strike another enemy.

This effect cannot be triggered from additional swords created this way.

24.name: Multistrike Maximum Stacks
24.description: You can have an additional maximum stack of Armament.

25.name: Multistrike Maximum Stacks Less Attack Speed Per Stack
25.description: You can have an additional maximum stack of Armament, but Multistrike has less attack speed per stack (multipicative with other modifiers).

26.name: Multistrike Consume All Stacks At Max Stacks To Use Forge Strike
26.description: While at maximum stacks of Armament and positive mana, attacking with Multistrike will consume all stacks and 40 mana to use {Forge Strike}.

27.name: Multistrike Additional Sword At Max Stacks With 2h Weapon
27.description: Multistrike has an additional sword while you are at maximum stacks of Armament and wielding a two-handed weapon.

28.name: Multistrike Void Cleave Consumes Stacks For More Damage
28.description: {Void Cleave} consumes all stacks of Armament to gain more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased area per stack consumed.

2.name: Javelin Bleed And Slow Chance
2.description: Javelin hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and have a chance to slow.

4.name: Javelin More Hit Damage Per Distance
4.description: Javelin hits deal more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to enemies the farther away they are, up to a maximum of 15 meters.

5.name: Javelin Added Damage While Stationary For 1 second
5.description: Javelin gains physical and lightning penetration for each second you have been standing still up to a maximum duration.

7.name: Javelin Added Throwing Lightning Damage
7.description: Javelin deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits deal additional lightning damage.

9.name: Javelin Lightning Conversion
9.description:
Javelin's base physical damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Ignite and bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Electrify} for Javelin and effects related to bleed or ignite now depend on Electrify instead.

Physical resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to lightning resistance shred chance and effects related to Physical resistance shred now depend on lightning resistance shred instead.

Swaps Javelin's {Physical} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

10.name: Javelin Lightning Damage Over Time
10.description: Javelin has a chance to {Electrify} enemies on hit. Electrify applied by Javelin has additional Lightning Penetration.

11.name: Javelin Splits Instead of Piercing
11.description: When Javelin hits an enemy it now splits into additional piercing lightning spears which aim towards enemies close to the target, but Javelin itself can no longer pierce and it costs more mana.

12.name: Javelin More Hit Damage To High Health
12.description:
Javelin hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled against enemies on high health.

13.name: Javelin More Hit Damage Per Enemy Pierced
13.description: Javelin hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) up to a maximum, for each enemy pierced.

14.name: Javelin Critical Chance
14.description: Improves Javelin's base critical strike chance and its critical strikes deal more damage.

15.name: Javelin Armor Shred Chance
15.description: Javelin hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

16.name: Javelin Reduced Mana Cost And Less Damage
16.description: Javelin costs less mana.

17.name: Javelin Next Melee Costs Less Mana
17.description: Directly using Javelin causes your next melee attack to costs less mana.

18.name: Javelin Next Judgement Or Forge Strike More Damage
18.description: Directly using Javelin and hitting an enemy causes your next {Judgement} or {Forge Strike} to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Javelin Damage And Attack Speed
19.description: Javelin deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased attack speed.

20.name: Javelin Ignite Chance
20.description: Javelin hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

21.name: Javelin Rain
21.description: You now throw Javelin into the air causing 4 javelins to rain down at target location dealing damage in an area, but it costs more mana.

22.name: Javelin Rain Is Flag
22.description:
Now only 1 Javelin rains down at the target location, it deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and persists for 4 seconds, but has a cooldown.

It has a {Battle Standard} attached granting you and other allies in its radius increased damage and added endurance threshold based on your attunement.

23.name: Javelin Flag Healing Aura
23.description: The {Battle Standard} now heals allies around it each second. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness.

24.name: Javelin Flag Duration
24.description: The {Battle Standard} now lasts longer, but is still limited to one standard.

25.name: Javelin Flag Enemy Can Pick Up
25.description: If an enemy walks over the {Battle Standard} it captures it and carries the flag until it expires.

26.name: Javelin Flag Casts Smite
26.description: The {Battle Standard} now casts {Smite} at targets nearby every 1.5 seconds.

27.name: Javelin Flag Smite Frequency And Crit Chance
27.description: The {Battle Standard} casts {Smite} more frequently and Smite cast this way has improved base critical strike chance.

28.name: Javelin Flag Reactivate To Lunge
28.description:
Javelin is now a combo ability, the first part throws down the {Battle Standard} and the second part causes you to {Dash} to the flag.

Javelin's cooldown is now longer.

29.name: Javelin Rain Added Javelins And Mana Cost
29.description: Additional Javelins rain down, but Javelin costs more mana.

33.name: Javelin More Damage Over Time
33.description: Javelin deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Javelin Attack Speed For Damage
6.description: Javelin deals more damage, but has less attack speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

31.name: Javelin Holy Trail And Cooldown
31.description: Javelin now leaves behind a {Holy Trail}, that deals fire and lightning damage to enemies each second, heals you and your allies each second and lasts for 6 seconds, but Javelin now has a cooldown. The amount of health gained is increased by healing effectiveness

32.name: Javelin More Fire And Lightning Damage
32.description: Javelin deals more fire and lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you have a chance to ignite and electrify enemies with melee attacks while Javelin is on cooldown.

35.name: Javelin Alternate Trail Scaling
35.description: {Holy Trail} gains additional spell damage based on your increased healing effectiveness.

8.name: Javelin Frailty And Phys Shred Chance
8.description: Javelin hits have a chance to apply {Frailty} per point of Strength and a chance to shred enemy physical resistance per point of Dexterity.

34.name: Swarmblade Form Attack And Cast Speed
34.description: You have increased attack and cast speed while in Swarmblade form.

2.name: Swarmblade Form Bleed Chance
2.description: Your Armblade Slash, Dive and {Locust} hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.

3.name: Swarmblade Form Consume Bleeds To Buff Locusts
3.description:
When you create a {Locust Swarm} with Swarm Strike you consume all stacks of bleed from enemies hit by it, causing the {Swarm} to deal increased damage in a larger area per stack of bleed consumed.

The increased area scales up to a maximum.

4.name: Swarmblade Form Poison Chance
4.description: Yours and your {Locusts'} hits have a chance to poison enemies.

5.name: Swarmblade Form More Locusts From Hives
5.description: You can control additional {Locusts} and your Hives contain additional {Locusts}.

6.name: Swarmblade Form More Hives And Charges
6.description: Hives release {Locusts} more frequently and if you have an active {Locust Swarm} it also releases Locusts every second.

7.name: Swarmblade Form To Spriggan
7.description:
After using Summon Hive, Human Form is now replaced with {Cleanse Hives}, which releases all {Locusts} from up to 2 Hives, replaces them with {Healing Totems} and transforms you to {Spriggan Form}.

This requires you to have Spriggan Form unlocked.

8.name: Swarmblade Form Health And Rage On Locust Spawn
8.description: When a {Hive} releases a {Locust} you regain health and {Rage}.

9.name: Swarmblade Form Attack Own Hives To Release Locusts
9.description: Your Armblade Slash can now hit your own Hives which causes them to release {Locusts}.

10.name: Swarmblade Form Cold Conversion
10.description:
The base damage of Swarm Strike, {Locust Swarm}, and Dive is converted to cold, and {Locusts'} base melee damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. These attack all also gain a chance to freeze enemies.

Poison chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance while in Swarmblade Form.

Your {Locusts'} Poison chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance.

11.name: Swarmblade Form Freeze Rate Per Attunement
11.description: You and your {Locusts} have a higher chance of freezing enemies per point of Attunement.

12.name: Swarmblade Form Hives Cast Thorns As Totems
12.description: Your Hives now cast {Thorns} as if they were {Thorn Totems}, rather than releasing {Locusts}. They can cast thorns a limited number of times equal to the number of Locusts they would have released.

13.name: Swarmblade Form Dodge And Armor
13.description: You and your {Locusts} have a higher chance to dodge and additional armor while in Swarmblade Form.

14.name: Swarmblade Form Cast Maelstrom On Dash
14.description:
You cast {Maelstrom} a number of times when you Dive. 

This consumes a portion of Maelstrom's mana cost as {Rage}.

15.name: Swarmblade Form Rage Gained On Dodge
15.description: You gain {Rage} when you dodge.

16.name: Swarmblade Form Dodge Rating To Armor
16.description: All of your dodge rating is converted to armor while in Swarmblade Form.

17.name: Swarmblade Form Increased Spin Area
17.description: Your Swarm Strike, {Locust Swarm} and your {Locusts'} melee attacks all deal damage in a larger area.

18.name: Swarmblade Form Leech From Locusts
18.description: Your {Locust Swarm} leeches a portion of the damage it deals as health to you.

20.name: Swarmblade Form Locusts Increased Duration
20.description: {Locust Swarm} has more duration and Swarm Strike hits deal more damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

21.name: Swarmblade Form To Werebear
21.description:
After using Swarm Strike, Human Form is now replaced with {Angered Swarm}, which adds 4 seconds to the duration of your {Locust Swarm} and transforms you to {Werebear Form}.

This requires you to have Werebear Form unlocked.

22.name: Swarmblade Form Companions Use Ability On Spin
22.description: A random active companion uses its active ability after you directly use Swarm Strike.

23.name: Swarmblade Form Locusts Buff Per Locust
23.description: Your {Locust Swarm} deals more damage per {Locust} consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers) and while the Locust Swarm is active you have additional chance to poison on hit per {Locust} consumed.

24.name: Swarmblade Form Melee Physical Damage For You And Locusts
24.description: You and your {Locusts} deal additional melee physical damage while in Swarmblade Form and your {Locust Swarm} deals additional melee physical damage per active {Locust} consumed when you use Swarm Strike.

25.name: Swarmblade Form Crit Chance For You And Locusts
25.description: You and your {Locusts} have improved base critical strike chance while in Swarmblade Form.

27.name: Swarmblade Form Rage Gain On Crits
27.description: You regain {Rage} when you or your {Locusts} critically hit.

28.name: Swarmblade Form Slashes Use Serpent Strike
28.description:
Your {Serpent Strike} tree now applies to Armblade Slashes, and it does not require a spear.

This effect does not include the base additional poison chance or increased poison duration from Serpent Strike.

29.name: Swarmblade Form Gain Health Or Rage On Kill Or Hit
29.description: You regain health and {Rage} when you or your {Locusts} kill an enemy or when you hit a rare enemy or boss.

30.name: Swarmblade Form Consume Stacks To Cast Tornado
30.description:
You gain a stack of {Howling Cascade} when you use Armblade Slash and hit at least one enemy. Reaching 6 stacks consumes them to cast {Tornado}.

This consumes Tornado's mana cost.

31.name: Swarmblade Form Reduce Stacks To Proc Tornado
31.description: Reduce the maximum stacks of {Howling Cascade} required to cast {Tornado}, and tornadoes cast via Howling Cascade deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

32.name: Swarmblade Form Slash Combo To Summon Locusts
32.description: When you use Armblade Slashes you now summon a {Locust} instead of doing a melee attack.

35.name: Swarmblade Form Swarm Minion Damage
35.description: {Locust Swarm} now scales with your minion damage rather than your damage.

26.name: Swarmblade Form Hive Spawn Fewer Locusts And They Are Better
26.description: You can only control half as many {Locusts}, but they have significantly more health, deal significantly more damage in a larger area (all multiplicative with other modifiers) and are larger.

36.name: Swarmblade Form Dive And Swarmstrike Damage Plus Rage On Hit
36.description: Swarm Strike and Dive deal more damage and you regain {Rage} on hit with both skills.

0.name: Upheaval Root Node
0.description: Sunders the ground in a line in front of you, dealing damage to enemies along the path.

30.name: Upheaval Creates Totem
30.description:
You now create an {Upheaval Totem} that attacks with Upheaval from it rather than yourself. You are limited to 1 of these totems. Upheaval now has a cooldown and costs significantly more mana.

Upheaval Totems last 8 seconds.

2.name: Upheaval Earth Shattering On Hit
2.description: When you directly use Upheaval and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Earth Shattering} up to a maximum, causing your next {Fury Leap} or {Earthquake} to consume all stacks to gain additional physical penetration and increased area per stack consumed.

3.name: Upheaval 3 Lines
3.description:
Upheaval now splits up into 3 fault lines in front of you, but Upheaval costs additional mana. Enemies can only be hit by 1 Fault Line at a time.

Upheaval Totems now have 50% less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

4.name: Upheaval 5 Lines
4.description: Upheaval now travels in 5 fault lines in a star around you.

5.name: Upheaval Cold Conversion
5.description:
Upheaval's base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Upheaval has a chance to freeze enemies on hit.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to {Frostbite} chance and slow chance from all sources is converted to chill chance.

6.name: Upheaval Shockwave On Enemy Hit
6.description: When Upheaval hits an enemy it has a chance to release a {Shockwave}, a melee physical subskill. The Shockwave cannot hit enemies already hit by Upheaval and vice versa.

7.name: Upheaval Reduced Mana And Armor Shred
7.description: Upheaval costs less mana and has a chance to shred enemy armor.

8.name: Upheaval Cannot Miss Added Crit
8.description: Improves Upheaval's base critical strike chance and it cannot be dodged.

9.name: Upheaval Crit Multi
9.description: Upheaval critical strikes deal more damage.

10.name: Upheaval Thorn Totem Consumption
10.description: Creating an Upheaval Totem consumes all active {Thorn Totems} to grant it more damage per totem consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers). You can now create an additional maximum Upheaval totem and you have an additional charge.

11.name: Upheaval Max Totems
11.description: You can now create an additional maximum Upheaval Totem and you have an additional charge.

12.name: Upheaval More Melee Damage To Frozen
12.description: Upheaval deals additional melee cold damage, and also deals more melee damage to frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Upheaval Freeze Rate
13.description: Upheaval has additional freeze rate and has additional chance to inflict Frostbite on hit.

14.name: Upheaval Shatter On Frozen Kill
14.description: You cast {Shatter} on enemies you kill with Upheaval, a spell subskill dealing cold damage in an area.

15.name: Upheaval Additional Lines
15.description: Upheaval now creates additional fault lines and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but costs more mana.

16.name: Upheaval Bleed And Slow Chance
16.description:
Upheaval hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and have a chance to slow them.

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon.

17.name: Upheaval Increased Area
17.description: Upheaval deals damage in a wider area.

18.name: Upheaval Earth Armor On Hit
18.description: When you use Upheaval and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Earth Armor} for 6 seconds up to a maximum amount of stacks, granting you additional armor and endurance threshold per stack of Attunement.

19.name: Upheaval Consumes Earth Armor To Cast Maelstrom
19.description: While you have {Earth Armor}, if you fall below 6 stacks of {Maelstrom} you consume all stacks of Earth Armor to cast Maelstrom once per stack consumed.

20.name: Upheaval Increased Range
20.description: Upheaval travels further.

21.name: Upheaval No Attack Speed Scaling More Damage
21.description: Upheaval deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer scales with increases to attack speed.

22.name: Upheaval Phys And Cold Pen Doubled With 2H
22.description:
Upheaval penetrates enemy physical and cold resistance.

This effect is doubled while using a two handed weapon.

23.name: Upheaval Area Bleed Or Damage From Weapon
23.description: Upheaval has increased area while using a mace, additional bleed chance while using an axe and additional cold penetration while using a staff.

24.name: Upheaval More Damage And Stun Chance
24.description: Upheaval deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a higher chance to stun enemies.

25.name: Upheaval More Damage To Closer
25.description: Upheaval deals more melee damage to enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on how close they are to you, up to a maximum.

26.name: Upheaval Frailty Chance and Phys Pen Less Range
26.description: Upheaval hits have a chance to apply {Frailty} to enemies and it penetrates enemy physical resistance, but travels a shorter distance.

27.name: Upheaval Shockwave On Totem Hit
27.description: When Upheaval hits your totems it has a chance to release a {Shockwave} from the totem.

28.name: Upheaval Buff On Totem Hit
28.description: Upheaval hits grant your totems increased armor and more damage (each stack multiplicative with each other and other modifiers) for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 4 times.

29.name: Upheaval Shatters Totems
29.description: Upheaval and {Shockwave} hits from the {Sundering Strikes} node now {Shatter} totems, releasing shards of rock and debris dealing spell physical damage and heals you per point of Attunement.

32.name: Upheaval Totem Duration
32.description: Upheaval Totems last longer, and they deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

1.name: Umbral Blades Dusk Shroud Chance
1.description: You have a chance to gain {Dusk Shroud} when you use Umbral Blades and hit at least one enemy.

2.name: Umbral Blades Only 1 Blade
2.description: You now throw just one large Umbral Blade with each throw that deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased radius.

3.name: Umbral Blades Bladestorm
3.description:
Blades in the ground now create a {Bladestorm} that hovers and spins in midair at the target location for 4 seconds, hitting nearby enemies 3 times per second.

You can have up to 3 active Bladestorms, but each enemy can only take damage from one at a time.

Bladestorms have 40% less chance to inflict {Shadow Daggers} from {Lethal Darkness}.

4.name: Umbral Blades Bladestorm Duration And Area
4.description: {Bladestorms} last longer and deal damage in a larger area.

5.name: Umbral Blades Bladestorm Seeks Enemies
5.description: {Bladestorms} slowly seek out enemies.

6.name: Umbral Blades Shadow Dagger If Dagger Equipped
6.description: Umbral Blades hits inflict a stack of {Shadow Dagger} on hit, while using a dagger.

7.name: Umbral Blades More Damage Per Dusk Shroud
7.description:
Umbral Blades deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of {Dusk Shroud} on you, up to 20. 

This effect is doubled while inside the area of {Smoke Bomb}.

8.name: Umbral Blades Shadows Leave Umbral Blade
8.description: Whenever one of your {Shadows} expire they now also leave behind an Umbral Blade.

10.name: Umbral Blades Attack Speed And Ward On Recall
10.description: Umbral Blades has increased attack speed and you gain ward on hit with recalled blades.

11.name: Umbral Blades Recalled Blades Go To Enemies Instead
11.description: Recalling the blades now sends each blade toward a different nearby enemy instead of to you, but recalled blades no longer pierce.

12.name: Umbral Blades Recalled Blades Pierce Chance
12.description: Recalled blades now have a chance to pierce enemies (pass through enemies it hits).

13.name: Umbral Blades No Recall Shift Recalls
13.description:
You can now only recall blades by using {Shift}, rather than the combo itself.

You regain mana for each blade recalled.

14.name: Umbral Blades Less Damage More Recall Damage
14.description: Recalled blades deal more damage, but blades thrown out deal less damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Umbral Blades Recall Slow And Bleed Chance
15.description: Recalled blade hits have a chance to slow enemies and a chance to cause them to bleed.

16.name: Umbral Blades Recall More Hit Damage Per Slow And Bleed
16.description: Recalled blade hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the target and per bleed on the target, up to a maximum.

17.name: Umbral Blades Haste Chance When Recalling And Bleed Chance
17.description:
Umbral Blades hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. 

When your blades are recalled you have a chance to gain {Haste} for 1 second.

18.name: Umbral Blades Bleed Converted To Poison
18.description:
Converts bleed chance from all sources to poison chance for Umbral Blades and effects related to bleed now depend on poison instead. 

If you have the {Explosive Blades}, the explosion hit poisons enemies, but deals 80% less damage and it no longer deals any fire damage.

19.name: Umbral Blades Extra Blade On Throw 2
19.description: You now throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the second throw.

20.name: Umbral Blades Extra Blade Every 2 Seconds
20.description: Every 2 seconds you throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the next throw.

21.name: Umbral Blades Added Throwing Physical Damage
21.description: Umbral Blades deals additional throwing physical damage.

22.name: Umbral Blades Throw 3 Added To Combo
22.description: You now throw a third time with Umbral Blades with 4 blades before recalling the blades.

23.name: Umbral Blades Throw 3 Has Extra Blades
23.description: You now throw additional blades with Umbral Blades on the third throw.

24.name: Umbral Blades Cold Conversion
24.description:
Umbral Blades base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage. It also has a chance to freeze enemies.

Swaps Umbral Blades' {Physical} tag for a {Cold} tag.

25.name: Umbral Blades Freeze Rate And Chill Chance
25.description: Umbral Blades hits have additional freeze rate and have a chance to chill enemies.

26.name: Umbral Blades Stops At Cursor Location
26.description: Umbral Blades now stop if they reach the target location, and you have increased attack speed with Umbral Blades.

27.name: Umbral Blades Explosive Blades
27.description:
Blades in the ground now arm after 0.5 seconds, but can no longer be recalled and Umbral Blades has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers). If enemies walk over them the blades will cause a {Shard Explosion}, a subskill dealing physical and fire damage in an area.

Blades expire and explode after 3 seconds if no enemies walk over them.

28.name: Umbral Blades Explosive Blades Area And More Damage Per Second
28.description: The {Shard Explosion} deals damage in a larger area and deals more damage per second the blade has remained on the ground (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

1.name: Glyph Of Dominion Explosion More Damage Per Slow
1.description: The {Glyph} explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of slow on the target.

2.name: Glyph Of Dominion Explosion Mana Efficiency And More Damage
2.description: Glyph of Dominion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana.

3.name: Glyph Of Dominion Can Place Two Glyphs
3.description: You can now place down up to two Glyphs of Dominion, but Glyph of Dominion costs more mana. When the first {Glyph} explodes the second one does too. The second explosion deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) the further it is from the first one up to a maximum.

4.name: Glyph Of Dominion Expands Slower
4.description: Glyph of Dominion expands slower and lasts a longer (both multiplicative with other modifiers). This increases the time before it reaches its full size to detonate.

5.name: Glyph Of Dominion Expands Faster
5.description: Glyph of Dominion expands faster and lasts a shorter duration (both multiplicative with other modifiers). This decreases the time before it reaches its full size to detonate.

6.name: Glyph Of Dominion Expands Faster Per Missing Mana
6.description: Glyph of Dominion expands faster and lasts a shorter duration (both multiplicative with other modifiers) per amount of missing mana. This decreases the time before it reaches its full size to detonate.

7.name: Glyph Of Dominion Delay Before Explosion
7.description: After Glyph of Dominion its full size it now has a short delay before it detonates.

8.name: Glyph Of Dominion Adds Cooldown Gains Damage Per Rune
8.description: Glyph of Dominion now has a cooldown, which is refreshed whenever you directly cast {Runic Invocation}. It also deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per rune from {Runic Invocation}, without consuming them.

9.name: Glyph Of Dominion Consumes Runes
9.description:
Glyph of Dominion now consumes the {Runes} from {Runic Invocation} on cast to gain additional effects per {Rune} you have. 

{Rah Rune}: Glyph deals more damage in a larger area per {Rune} of this type.
{Gon Rune}: Glyph detonates additional times during the delay per {Rune} of this type.
{Heo Rune}: Glyph inflicts stacks of Frostbite per second per {Rune} of this type.

10.name: Glyph Of Dominion Added Charges
10.description: Glyph of Dominion has additional charges and all charges are refreshed whenever you directly cast {Runic Invocation}.

11.name: Glyph Of Dominion Delay Casts Elemental Nova And Fire Aura
11.description: You cast {Elemental Nova} in the middle of the {Glyph} if you stand inside it when the delay from {Doom Scribe} starts and you gain stacks of {Fire Aura}.

12.name: Glyph Of Dominion Damage Over Time Accelerates
12.description: Glyph of Dominion's damage over time part deals more damage for each second it is active (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Glyph Of Dominion More Damage Per Armor Shred
13.description: While standing on your {Glyph} you and your allies deal more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of Armor Shred on the enemy, up to a maximum of 14 stacks.

14.name: Glyph Of Dominion More Damage Over Time
14.description: Glyph of Dominion deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Disintegrate Damage And Ward
15.description: {Disintegrate} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and grants you ward per second if you start channelling it while standing on your {Glyph}.

16.name: Glyph Of Dominion Increased Area
16.description: Glyph of Dominion deals damage in a larger area.

17.name: Glyph Of Dominion Casts On Self And Grants Ward
17.description: Glyph of Dominion is now cast at your current location and it grants you and your allies ward per second per your uncapped resistance while standing on your {Glyph}.

18.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Resistances
18.description: You and your allies gain additional resistances while standing on your {Glyph}.

19.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Static Charges
19.description: After casting Glyph of Dominion you gain {Static Charges} at an accelerating rate while standing still, until your {Glyph} detonates.

20.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Haste And Cleanses
20.description:
Whenever you or your allies enters your Glyph of Dominion it cleanses ailments and grants the {Haste} buff for a short duration.

Leaving and re-entering the same {Glyph} does not cause this effect to trigger again.

21.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Shock Chance
21.description: You and your allies gain additional Shock chance while standing on your {Glyph}.

22.name: Glyph Of Dominion Constantly Stuns
22.description: Normal and Magic enemies have a chance to be stunned every half second while on your {Glyph}.

23.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Lightning Blast Chains
23.description: Your {Lightning Blast} now chains while you are standing on your {Glyph}, but consumes mana when cast this way while you are at positive mana.

24.name: Glyph Of Dominion Grants Increased Area
24.description: You and your allies gain increased area to spells and attacks while standing on your {Glyph}.

25.name: Glyph Of Dominion Fire Conversion
25.description:
{Glyph of Dominion's} base lightning damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to ignite for Glyph of Dominion and effects related to shock now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps {Glyph of Dominion's} {Lightning} tag for a {Fire} tag.

Ignite chance is halved for minions and other allies.

26.name: Glyph Of Dominion Constantly Ignites
26.description: Glyph of Dominion ignites enemies on the {Glyph} every half second.

27.name: Glyph Of Dominion Ignite Frequency Per Ignite Chance
27.description: The ignite frequency from {Burning Symbol} is increased by your chance to ignite.

1.name: Frost Wall Frostbite Through Wall
1.description: Frost Wall has a chance to inflict a stack of Frostbite to enemies inside the wall every 0.25 seconds.

2.name: Frost Wall Lightning Blast Pylon
2.description:
One of Frost Wall's {Pillars} now casts {Lightning Blast} at nearby enemies when you first pass through the wall.

This effect consumes mana equal to {Lightning Blast's} mana cost.

3.name: Frost Wall Auto Lightning Blast Pylons
3.description:
Frost Wall's outer {Pillars} cast {Lightning Blast} at nearby enemies every other second.

This effect consumes mana equal to {Lightning Blast's} mana cost.

4.name: Frost Wall Lightning Blast Pylons Frequency
4.description: After Frost Wall has existed for a short duration, its outer {Pillars} cast {Lightning Blast} more often, up to a maximum, every time an enemy passes through the wall.

5.name: Frost Wall Empowers Runic Invocation
5.description:
After you pass through your Frost Wall your next {Runic Invocation} or {Glyph of Dominion} cast within 5 seconds is empowered. 

An empowered spell cast this way, costs less mana (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it also deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each second the wall has existed, before you walk through it.

6.name: Frost Wall Cleanses
6.description: Frost Wall now cleanses negative ailments on you and your allies when they first pass through the wall.

7.name: Frost Wall More Damage And Freeze Rate Multi
7.description: Frost Wall deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a higher chance to freeze enemies.

8.name: Frost Wall Ward And Mana On Pass Through
8.description:
Frost Wall now grants you and your allies ward and mana when they first pass through the wall.

These effects are doubled if the wall is placed at least 2 meters away from you.

9.name: Frost Wall Haste And Frenzy
9.description:
Frost Wall now grants the {Haste} and {Frenzy} buffs for a short duration, up to a maximum, when you and your allies when they first pass through the wall.

The maximum duration is equal to Frost Wall's age plus 1 second.

10.name: Frost Wall Explodes
10.description: Frost Wall now creates three {Runic Detonations} shortly after you pass through it, dealing spell cold damage to nearby enemies.

11.name: Frost Wall Explosion More Damage And Area
11.description: The {Runic Detonations} from {Runic Conclusion} intensify, destroying the wall in the process and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

12.name: Frost Wall Explosion More Area And Damage From Direction
12.description: The {Runic Detonations} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area if you are facing away from the wall when the detonations occur.

13.name: Frost Wall Flame Ward On Pass Through
13.description:
You now cast Flame Ward on you or your allies (excluding their minions) that pass through your Frost Wall, if it has existed for at least 0.2 seconds.

Frost Wall now has a cooldown, which it shares with Flame Ward. Using one will put the other on cooldown.

14.name: Frost Wall Empowered After 15 Seconds
14.description: If you haven't cast Frost Wall in the past 15 seconds, it has no mana cost and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

15.name: Frost Wall Increased Area And Duration
15.description: Frost Wall is larger and lasts longer.

16.name: Frost Wall More Damage To Chilled Enemies With Wall
16.description: You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to chilled enemies while you have an active Frost Wall.

17.name: Frost Wall More Damage From Duration
17.description:
Frost Wall deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second the wall has existed.

This does not affect ailments or subskills.

18.name: Frost Wall Moves And Mana Gain
18.description: When you cast Frost Wall while having an existing wall active with more than half its duration remaining, the existing wall is moved to the new target location instead of being replaced and you gain mana equal to half the Frost Wall’s mana cost.

19.name: Frost Wall Spell Damage Per Freeze Multi
19.description: Frost Wall deals additional spell damage equal to a portion of your freeze rate multiplier.

20.name: Frost Wall Increased Freeze Duration And Damage To Frozen
20.description:
Frost Wall's initial freeze has increased duration, and the wall deals more damage over time to frozen enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This does not affect ailments or subskills.

21.name: Frost Wall Ward On Pass Through
21.description: You are granted ward whenever enemies pass through the wall for the first time.

22.name: Frost Wall Ward On Pass Through From Enemy Health
22.description: Whenever an enemy passes through the wall for the first time, and after it has existed for 0.2 seconds, you gain ward equal to a small portion of the enemy's maximum health, up to a maximum amount of ward per enemy.

23.name: Frost Wall Fire Conversion
23.description:
{Frost Wall's} base cold damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to cold damage.

For Frost Wall, chill chance from all sources is converted to {Ignite}, and Frostbite chance from all sources is converted to {Fire Resistance Shred}.

Swaps {Frost Wall's} {Cold} tag for a {Fire} tag.

24.name: Frost Wall Brands Enemies With Big Fire Damage
24.description:
Frost Wall now inflicts Brand of Trespass to enemies inside the wall. This Brand does not stack, but deals a large amount of fire damage over time.

Brand of Trespass deals more damage equal to your ignite chance.

25.name: Frost Wall Fireball On Pass Through
25.description:
