Whenever an enemy passes through your Frost Wall, you have a chance to cast {Fireball} towards them.

This effect consumes mana equal to {Fireball's} mana cost.

26.name: Frost Wall Lightning Conversion
26.description:
{Frost Wall's} base cold damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to cold damage.

For Frost Wall, chill chance from all sources is converted to {Slow}, and Frostbite chance from all sources is converted to {Shock}.

Swaps Frost Wall's {Cold} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

27.name: Frost Wall Casts Runebolts Matching Wall Type
27.description:
Frost Wall now casts {Runebolt} in the original target direction the Wall was cast. The element of the bolts match the element of the Wall, regardless of {Runebolt's} tree.

This effect consumes 2 mana per projectile and does not cast if you are at negative mana.

28.name: Frost Wall Runebolt Frequency
28.description: Frost Wall casts {Runebolt} more often.

2.name: Flame Rush Mana Efficiency And CDR With Fire Res
2.description: Flame Rush costs less mana and has a shorter cooldown. These effects are doubled if you have enough uncapped fire resistance.

3.name: Flame Rush Damage Per 40 Current Mana
3.description: Flame Rush deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 40 current mana.

4.name: Flame Rush No Channel But Casts Glyph Of Dominion
4.description:
Flame Rush now casts {Glyph of Dominion} at the target location instead of channeling and Flame Rush ends when reaching the Glyph.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of {Glyph of Dominion's} mana cost.

5.name: Flame Rush Creates Volcanic Orb
5.description:
Flame Rush now casts {Volcanic Orb} that is attached to you and only detonates when you end Flame Rush, alongside any other active {Volcanic Orbs}.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of {Volcanic Orb's} mana cost.

6.name: Flame Rush Less Damage Taken
6.description:
You take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) during Flame Rush.

This effect is doubled against damage over time effects.

7.name: Flame Rush All Buffs Stick Around After
7.description: All buff effects from the Flame Rush tree persist afterwards for a portion of the time equal to the duration you spent in Flame Rush.

8.name: Flame Rush Ward Per Second
8.description: You gain ward per second during Flame Rush and you gain a burst of ward when Flame Rush ends.

9.name: Flame Rush Lightning Conversion
9.description:
{Flame Rush's} base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

{Fire Resistance Shred} chance from all sources is converted to {Lightning Resistance Shred} for Flame Rush and effects related to Fire Shred now depend on Lightning Shred instead.

Swaps {Flame Rush's} {Fire} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

10.nodeName: Flame Rush Casts Static Orb In Opposite Direction
10.name: Flame Rush Casts Static Orb In Opposite Direction

11.name: Flame Rush Cold Conversion
11.description:
{Flame Rush's} base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

{Lightning Resistance Shred} chance from all sources is converted to {Cold Resistance Shred} for Flame Rush and effects related to Lightning Shred now depend on Cold Shred instead.

Swaps {Flame Rush's} {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

13.name: Flame Rush Brand Of Subjugation
13.description: Flame Rush now inflicts {Brand of Subjugation} to enemies you pass through. The Brand does not stack but deals a large amount of cold damage over time and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per your chance to chill.

14.name: Flame Rush Frenzy After Travel
14.description: You are granted the {Frenzy} buff for a short duration when you end Flame Rush.

15.name: Flame Rush Auto Cast Runic Invocation
15.description:
You cast {Runic Invocation} when you exit Flame Rush, if you have it on your action bar.

This effect consumes mana equal to a percentage of {Runic Invocation's} mana cost.

16.name: Flame Rush Boosted After Fireball Cast
16.description: Casting {Fireball} and then using Flame Rush in the same direction within 2 seconds causes that Flame Rush to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area and grants you mana on cast.

17.name: Flame Rush Casts Runic Burst With Fireball During Rush
17.description: Whenever you hit an enemy with {Fireball} during Flame Rush it causes a {Runic Burst} around the target.

18.name: Flame Rush Fire Shred On Pass Through
18.description: Flame Rush now applies {Fire Resistance Shred} on enemies it passes through.

19.name: Flame Rush Consumes Ignites To Gain Ward
19.description:
Whenever you pass through an ignited enemy you gain ward and consume all your ignite stacks on that enemy. 

Consuming your ignite stacks this way grants you ward per your ignite stack on them, but they don't deal their remaining damage.

20.name: Flame Rush Consumes Ignites To Deal Their Damage Instantly
20.description:
Whenever you pass through an ignited enemy with Flame Rush, instead of gaining ward per stack of ignite on the enemy and consuming your ignite stacks without dealing damage, you lose 12 ward per stack of ignite and the ignite stacks instantly deal their remaining damage on the enemy.

If you do not have enough ward for this effect, a percentage of your remaining health is consumed instead, up to a maximum. Ignite stacks consumed this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per point of intelligence.

21.name: Flame Rush Increased Travel Speed And Distance
21.description: You travel faster and further with Flame Rush.

22.name: Flame Rush More Damage And Area
22.description: Flame Rush deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

23.name: Flame Rush More Area And Double Crit When Pass Through Frost Wall
23.description: Whenever you pass through a {Frost Wall} during Flame Rush it causes the explosion to deal damage in a much larger area and its chance to critically hit is doubled.

24.name: Flame Rush Creates Rune Embers During Rush
24.description: Every 0.4 seconds during Flame Rush you create a {Rune Ember}, up to a maximum. Every 0.25 seconds while not in Flame Rush you fire a {Rune Ember} at a nearby enemy if you have any.

25.name: Flame Rush Rune Embers Damage
25.description: {Rune Embers} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

26.name: Flame Rush Creates Additional Rune Embers On Cast
26.description: Casting Flame Rush creates additional {Rune Embers}.

27.name: Flame Rush Rune Embers Pierce
27.description: {Rune Embers} now pierce enemies.

28.name: Flame Rush Increased Rune Embers Frequency And Embers On Kill
28.description: You now have a chance to create a {Rune Ember} on kill during Flame Rush and you create {Rune Embers} faster during Flame Rush.

2.name: Runic Invocation More Damage Per Rune Consumed
2.description: Frost Claw deals additional spell damage based on your added melee damage.

3.name: Runic Invocation Leap Backwards On Cast
3.description: Frost Claw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its explosion deals damage in a larger area. These bonuses are doubled if you have at least 1200 ward.

4.name: Runic Invocation Leap Forward
4.description: Directly casting Frost Claw costs less mana and you have a chance to regain mana when you cast it.

5.name: Runic Invocation Autocast From First 2 Runes
5.description:
Frost Claw's base cold damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to cold damage. 

Chill chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance.

Swaps Frost Claw's {Cold} tag for a {Fire} tag.

6.name: Runic Invocation Autocast From First Rune
6.description:
Frost Claw's base cold damage is converted to lightning, unless it has already been converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to cold damage. 

Frostbite chance from all sources is converted to shock chance.

Swaps Frost Claw's {Cold} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

7.name: Runic Invocation Mana Efficiency And Ward Per Rune
7.description: Frost Claw hits have a chance to {Slow} and {Chill}.

8.name: Runic Invocation Cast Speed And Mana Gained As Ward
8.description: You have increased cast speed with Frost Claw.

9.name: Runic Invocation Next Non Channel Cast Is Empowered
9.description: Frost Claw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and its hits have a chance to inflict {Frostbite}.

10.name: Runic Invocation Auto Cast Chance From Other Skills Consuming Runes
10.description: Frostbite, chill, slow, ignite, and shock inflicted by Frost Claw last longer.

11.name: Runic Invocation Area
11.description:
You have a chance to cast {Elemental Nova} when Frost Claw's projectiles reach the target.

This consumes mana equal to Elemental Nova's mana cost and cannot trigger if you are out of mana.

12.name: Runic Invocation Rah Rune Boost
12.description: Frost Claw has a higher chance to freeze based on its critical strike chance.

13.name: Runic Invocation Grants Passive Buffs With Runes
13.description: If you have an active {Ice Barrage} when you hit an enemy with Frost Claw, that Ice Barrage fires faster for the rest of its duration, up to a maximum.

14.name: Runic Invocation Runic Energy Stacks Every Second
14.description:
You have a chance to cast {Ice Barrage} in the target direction when you cast Frost Claw.

This consumes mana equal to Ice Barrage's mana cost and cannot trigger if you are out of mana.

15.name: Runic Invocation Proc Random Skill From Bar With 12 Runic Energy
15.description:
When you directly cast Runic Invocation with at least 12 {Runic Energy} you also proc a random equipped non-channeling skill of the same element as each of the {Runes} consumed.

This effect consumes these skills' mana costs and puts them on cooldown (excluding movement skills and skills that are currently on cooldown).

These skills are cast at 0.24 second intervals after the {Invocation}.

16.name: Runic Invocation Chance To Repeat Per Runic Energy
16.description:
When you are hit by an enemy you have a chance to retaliate with Frost Claw.

When you cast Frost Claw by any method you gain Ward.

17.name: Runic Invocation Gain Runic Energy When Rune Combination Changes
17.description: When you cast Frost Claw you gain ward based on its Freeze Rate Multiplier.

18.name: Runic Invocation More Max Runic Energy But Bonuses Halved And Runic Energy Per Mana Spent
18.description:
When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to cast Frost Claw towards it, or at another nearby enemy if the hit killed the original target.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of Frost Claw's mana cost.

19.name: Runic Invocation Runic Energy Stacks Faster Until Invocation Repeat
19.description: Each unique {Invocation} you directly cast causes {Runic Energy} to accumulate faster until you repeat an {Invocation}.

20.name: Runic Invocation Heo Rune Boost
20.description: Gain a stack of Frozen Sleeper every second up to a maximum. When you cast Frost Claw it consumes all stacks to gain cold penetration per stack and release an {Ice Spiral} for each stack.

21.name: Runic Invocation Cooldown Costs No Mana More Damage
21.description: When you cast {Ice Spirals} there is a chance that the number of projectiles will be doubled and they'll all deal double damage.

22.name: Runic Invocation Gain Runes Depending On Skills On Bar In Sequence
22.description: For each active {Ice Spiral}, Glacier gains increased area and additional cold penetration, and Snap Freeze gains increased area and freeze duration.

23.name: Runic Invocation Cooldown Recovery
23.description: Runic Invocation has a shorter cooldown.

24.name: Runic Invocation Reduce Cooldown Without Casting Invocation With 3 Runes
24.description:
Directly casting Frost Claw causes it to recast from the target location to a location 4 meters behind it. The second can hit the same enemies as the first cast.

Frost Claw costs additional mana.

25.name: Runic Invocation Blink Traversal
25.description:
The second cast from {On Through The Snow} causes a third cast. The third cast can hit the same enemies as the first and second casts.

Frost Claw costs additional mana.

26.name: Runic Invocation Spell Damage And Cast Speed Buff Per Rune Consumed
26.description:
The second cast from {On Through The Snow} targets a random enemy that is 3 to 9 meters away from the original target location.

Frost Claw costs additional mana.

27.name: Runic Invocation Gon Rune Boost
27.description:
When the second cast from {On Through The Snow} is released, Frost Claw is also cast back towards you.

Frost Claw's mana cost is increased.

28.name: Runic Invocation More Damage Per Type Of Rune Consumed
28.description:
Frost Claw has 2 additional projectiles allowing it to hit enemies in a wider area on the way to the target.

Frost Claw costs additional mana.

29.name: Runic Invocation Ward Per Int From Only Different Runes
29.description:
Frost Claw no longer creates a burst of damage at the target, but its projectiles are now staggered and they can all hit the same target.

Frost Claw's mana cost is increased, it no longer has the {Area} tag and it has a lowered base freeze rate.

30.name: Runic Invocation Autocast Elemental Nova But Adds Mana Cost
30.description: Frost Claw has a lower mana cost and it deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to frozen enemies, but its projectiles are slower.

32.name: Runic Invocation Faster Runes from Channel
32.description: Frost Claw's projectiles are faster and it costs less mana.

34.name: Runic Invocation Penetration Per Intelligence
34.description: Runic Invocation penetrates elemental resistances per point of Intelligence.

1.name: Runebolt Cast Speed And Haste Chance
1.description: Runebolt has increased cast speed and it has a chance to grant you the {Haste} buff for a short duration.

2.name: Runebolt More Cold Damage
2.description: Runebolt deals more cold damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

3.name: Runebolt Convert Lightning To Cold
3.description:
The {Lightning Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to {Chill} for Runebolt and effects related to shock now depend on chill instead.

Swaps the {Lightning Bolt's} {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

4.name: Runebolt Convert Fire To Cold
4.description:
The {Fire Bolt's} base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to {Chill} for Runebolt and effects related to ignite now depend on chill instead.

Swaps the {Fire Bolt's} {Fire} tag for a {Cold} tag.

5.name: Runebolt More Lightning Damage
5.description: Runebolt deals more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

6.name: Runebolt Convert Cold To Lightning
6.description:
The {Cold Bolt's} base cold damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to cold damage.

Chill chance from all sources is converted to {Shock} for Runebolt and effects related to chill now depend on shock instead.

Swaps the {Cold Bolt's} {Cold} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

7.name: Runebolt Convert Fire To Lightning
7.description:
The {Fire Bolt's} base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to {Shock} for Runebolt and effects related to ignite now depend on shock instead.

Swaps the {Fire Bolt's} {Fire} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

8.name: Runebolt More Fire Damage
8.description: Runebolt deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Runebolt Convert Lightning To Fire
9.description:
The {Lightning Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance from all sources is converted to ignite for Runebolt and effects related to shock now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps the {Lightning Bolt's} {Lightning} tag for a {Fire} tag.

10.name: Runebolt Convert Cold To Fire
10.description:
The {Cold Bolt's} base cold damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to cold damage.

{Frostbite} chance from all sources is converted to ignite for Runebolt and effects related to {Frostbite} now depend on ignite instead.

Swaps the {Cold Bolt's} {Cold} tag for a {Fire} tag.

11.name: Runebolt Random And Chance To Double Cast
11.description:
Runebolt now randomly selects the element with each cast rather than by combo order. 

Directly casting Rune Bolt now has a chance to double cast if the previous cast was a different type. The chance is based on the amount of {Glyph of Chaos} you have in your crafting inventory.

12.name: Runebolt Extra Projectiles
12.description: Runebolt has a chance to shoot additional projectiles in a volley in front of you.

13.name: Runebolt Extra Projectiles In Glyph
13.description: Runebolt's chance to shoot extra projectiles from the {Arcane Overcharge} node and the amount of projectiles are doubled while standing in a {Glyph of Dominion}.

14.name: Runebolt Cone And Auto Target
14.description: Runebolt now shoots in a cone and the projectiles seek out enemies.

15.name: Runebolt Health Ward Or Mana
15.description: Directly casting Runebolt and hitting at least one enemy grants you health if it was a {Fire Bolt}, ward if it was a {Lightning Bolt} and mana if it was a {Cold Bolt}.

16.name: Runebolt Tri Elemental
16.description:
If your last three direct casts were all Runebolt, then any further cast of it becomes tri-elemental (fire, lightning and cold). Tri-elemental Runebolt deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and applies all the effects of the {Attuned Recovery} node.

Once you directly cast another skill, Runebolt loses all of these effects.

17.name: Runebolt Empowered By Frost Wall
17.description: When Runebolt passes through a {Frost Wall} it is intensified dealing more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and gains increased projectile speed.

18.name: Runebolt Armor Shred Chance
18.description: Runebolt hits have a chance to shred enemy armor.

19.name: Runebolt Physical Damage Per Highest Strength
19.description: Runebolt deals additional physical damage per point of strength of you or your nearby ally with the highest amount of strength.

20.name: Runebolt Creates Or Shoots From Runestone
20.description:
Directly casting Runebolt now creates a {Runestone} in front of you if you do not currently have one nearby instead of casting a Runebolt. If you have a nearby {Runestone}, directly using Runebolt now casts two bolts from the {Runestone} towards the target.  

After several seconds {Runestone} consumes mana to explode.

21.name: Runebolt Chance From Channelling Runestone
21.description: Every second while channeling a skill, your nearest {Runestone} has a chance to cast Runebolt towards your target.

22.name: Runebolt Explodes
22.description: Runebolt now explodes when it reaches its target location or when hitting enemies or obstacles, dealing damage of the corresponding element in an area.

23.name: Runebolt Explosion Area Per Resistance
23.description: The explosion from {Devastator} deals damage in a larger area per uncapped resistance of the corresponding element.

24.name: Runebolt Mana Gain
24.description: Directly casting Runebolt and hitting at least one enemy has a chance to grant you mana.

25.name: Runebolt Grants Rune Weave
25.description: Casting Runebolt and hitting at least one enemy grants you a stack of {Runeweave} up to a maximum.

26.name: Runebolt Rune Weave More Elemental Damage Per Armor Shred
26.description: Each stack of {Runeweave} also grants you more elemental damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of armor shred on the target up to a maximum.

27.name: Runebolt Rune Weave Runic Invocation Crit Chance
27.description: Each stack of {Runeweave} also grants your {Runic Invocation} additional critical strike chance.

28.name: Runebolt Ailment Chance From Rune Type
28.description:
Runebolt gains additional effects for each unique {Rune} you have. Multiple {Runes} of the same type does not stack the effect.

{Rah Rune}: Runebolt has a chance to ignite enemies.
{Gon Rune}: Runebolt has a chance to shock enemies.
{Heo Rune}: Runebolt has a chance to inflict {Frostbite} on enemies.

29.name: Runebolt Reversed Combo
29.description: Runebolt's combo is now cast in a reversed order.

30.name: Runebolt Randomizes Runes
30.description: Casting Runebolt now randomizes the runes of your {Runic Invocation}.

31.name: Runebolt Casts In Sequence Of Runic Invocation
31.description: Runebolt is now cast in a sequence with the same order of your most recent {Runic Invocation}

32.name: Runebolt Imbued Runestone
32.description:
If you have 3 {Runes} from {Runic Invocation} when you create a {Runestone}, the {Runes} are consumed to instead create an {Imbued Runestone} that fires three bolts. An {Imbued Runestone's} explosion has 100% more area of effect and damage.

This effect has a 20 second cooldown. When you cast {Runic Invocation} the remaining cooldown is reduced by 20% per {Rune} in the {Invocation}.

2.nodeName: Frost Claw Spell Damage per Melee Damage
2.name: Frost Claw Spell Damage per Melee Damage

7.name: Frost Claw Slow and Chill

8.name: Frost Claw Cast Speed

12.nodeName: Frost Claw Freeze per Crit Chance
12.name: Frost Claw Freeze per Crit Chance

13.nodeName: Frost Claw Ice Barrage RoF on Hit
13.name: Frost Claw Ice Barrage RoF on Hit

14.nodeName: Frost Claw Ice Barrage Chance on Cast
14.name: Frost Claw Ice Barrage Chance on Cast

17.nodeName: Frost Claw Ward Gain Per Freeze Rate
17.name: Frost Claw Ward Gain Per Freeze Rate

18.nodeName: Frost Claw Cast on Melee Hit
18.name: Frost Claw Cast on Melee Hit

29.name: Frost Claw All Projectiles Hit

30.name: Frost Claw Slow Projectiles

1.name: Chaos Bolts Projectile Speed And Cast Speed
1.description: Chaos Bolts has increased cast speed, and its projectiles travel faster.

6.name: Chaos Bolts Damned Chance
6.description: Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to inflict enemies with damned.

2.nodeName: Chaos Bolts Necrotic To Physical Conversion
2.name: Chaos Bolts Necrotic To Physical Conversion

7.name: Chaos Bolts Reduced Mana Cost
7.description: Chaos Bolts costs less mana, but now consumes a portion of your current health and ward on cast.

8.name: Chaos Bolts More DoT From Missing Health
8.description: Chaos Bolts deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to a portion of your missing health.

9.name: Chaos Bolts Ailment Chance Transfers To Minions
9.description:
Hitting your minions with Chaos Bolts grants them any damned, ignite, bleed or frostbite chance that Chaos Bolts gains from this tree.

This buff lasts 10 seconds, and does not stack.

10.name: Chaos Bolts Extends Cthonic Fissures
10.description:
Directly casting Chaos Bolts extends the duration of your active {Cthonic Fissures} and {Infernal Shades}. 

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

11.name: Chaos Bolts More Hit Damage From Ailments
11.description: Chaos Bolts' hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to damned, ignited, bleeding and frostbitten.

12.name: Chaos Bolts Ignite Chance
12.description: Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to ignite enemies.

13.name: Chaos Bolts Fire To Cold Conversion
13.description:
Chaos Bolts' base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage. It now has a chance to freeze enemies.

Ignite chance from all sources are converted to frostbite chance for Chaos Bolts.

Swaps Chaos Bolts' {Fire} tag for a {Cold} tag.

14.name: Chaos Bolts Chill Chance And Double Damage Chance
14.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to chill enemies. 

Additionally, Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance to deal double hit damage to chilled enemies.

15.name: Chaos Bolts More Physical DoT And Freeze Rate Multi From Cold Res
15.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a higher chance to freeze enemies per 1% uncapped cold resistance.

Additionally, Chaos Bolts deals more physical damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 4% uncapped cold resistance.

16.name: Chaos Bolts Explosion Area Chance
16.description: Chaos Bolts explosions have a chance to deal damage in a much large area.

4.name: Chaos Bolts Fear And Increased Spread
4.description: Chaos Bolts' hits now have a chance to fear enemies, but the projectiles target a wider area.

17.name: Chaos Bolts Added Projectiles And Mana Cost
17.description: Chaos Bolts releases additional projectiles, but it has a higher mana cost.

18.name: Chaos Bolts Chance To Consume Mana
18.description: Chaos Bolts' projectiles have a chance to consume additional mana causing it to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

19.name: Chaos Bolts Mana Consumption Buffs Minions
19.description:
Whenever mana is consumed by the {Mana Anarchy} node, your minions gain additional spell damage based on your maximum mana and they also gain increased cast speed.

This buff lasts 13 seconds.

20.name: Chaos Bolts One Large Projectile
20.description:
Chaos Bolts no longer shoots multiple projectiles, but now instead shoots one large projectile causing it to deal more damage (multiplicative with other multipliers) in a larger area. 

These effects scale with the amount of projectiles Chaos Bolts would have shot.

21.name: Chaos Bolts Explodes Zombies
21.description: Chaos Bolts' hitting one of your {Volatile Zombies} causes it to instantly explode. Zombies exploding this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

22.name: Chaos Bolts Explodes Zombies Poison Chance
22.description: {Volatile Zombies} exploding from the {Volatile Kindling} node deal even more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area and poisons enemies.

23.name: Chaos Bolts Destructive Intensity
23.description:
Whenever you cast Chaos Bolts you gain a stack of {Destructive Intensity} up to a maximum.

Each stack reduces the target area and improves Chaos Bolts base critical strike chance.

If you go 2 seconds without gaining a stack, all stacks are lost.

24.name: Chaos Bolts More Damage To Cursed
24.description: Chaos Bolts deals more damage and its hits deal more damage to {Cursed} enemies (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

25.name: Chaos Bolts Chance To Harvest
25.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance per Dexterity to cause you to attack with {Harvest} from the location of enemies hit, hitting them and enemies around them.

This effect can occur a maximum of 3 times per second.

26.name: Chaos Bolts Mana And Health Gain From Cursed
26.description: Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies regain health and mana.

27.name: Chaos Bolts Recast Chance From Cursed
27.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies has a chance to cause you to recast Chaos Bolts from their location towards another nearby enemy, consuming a portion of its mana cost. 

The recast has a minimum range of 5 meters, and will not cast at enemies within that range.

28.name: Chaos Bolts Chance To Rip Blood
28.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits have a chance per Intelligence to cast {Rip Blood} at target enemies.

This effect can occur a maximum of 2 times per second.

29.name: Chaos Bolts Refreshes Curses
29.description: Chaos Bolts hits refreshes the duration of your {Curses} on them and grants you health per curse.

30.name: Chaos Bolts Casts Bone Curse On Cursed Hit
30.description:
Chaos Bolts' hits against {Cursed} enemies casts {Bone Curse} at their location.

This effect has a 6 second cooldown.

1.name: Ghostflame Ignite And Damned Chance Per Second
1.description: Ghostflame has a chance to inflict damned and ignite enemies each second.

2.name: Ghostflame Damage Conversion To Physical
2.description:
Ghostflames's base necrotic and fire damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to necrotic or fire damage.

Damned and ignite chance from all sources are converted to bleed chance per second.

Ghostflame now drains a portion of your health each second.

Swaps Ghostflames's {Necrotic} and {Fire} tags for a {Physical} tag.

3.name: Ghostflame Physical Damage Leeched As Health
3.description:
You leech a portion of the physical damage you deal as health while channeling Ghostflame.

A portion of your global bleed chance on hit now applies as bleed chance per second for Ghostflame.

4.name: Ghostflame Cast Marrow Shards
4.description:
Damaging an enemy with Ghostflame causes you to cast {Marrow Shards} towards them.

This effect can occur a maximum number of times each second.

5.name: Ghostflame Increased Marrow Shards Frequency
5.description:
Increases the frequency of {Marrow Shards} per second from the {Feast of Bones} node.

Improves the {Marrow Shards'} base critical strike chance cast this way.

6.name: Ghostflame Ignite And Damned Duration
6.description: Ghostflame has increased ignite and damned duration per point of Intelligence.

7.name: Ghostflame Ignite And Damned Chance As Chance Per Second
7.description:
A portion of your global ignite chance on hit now applies as ignite chance per second for Ghostflame.

A portion of your global damned chance on hit now applies as damned chance per second for Ghostflame.

8.name: Ghostflame Skull Screech
8.description:
After channelling Ghostflame for a short duration, the skull releases a terrible screech, cursing all nearby enemies with {Decrepify}.

Ghost Flame gains the {Curse} tag, but its direct damage still does not scale with increased curse damage.

9.name: Ghostflame Increased Screech Area And Reduced Delay
9.description: The screech from the {Decrepit Mortals} node has a shorter delay before being released and a larger area.

10.name: Ghostflame Screech Fears
10.description: The screech from the {Decrepit Mortals} node now also fears enemies and Ghostflame deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to feared enemies.

11.name: Ghostflame More Damage And Channel Cost
11.description: Ghostflame deals more damage, but has a higher channel cost (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

12.name: Ghostflame Less Damage From Ignited Damned And Bleeding
12.description: You take less damage from ignited, damned or bleeding enemies while channeling Ghostflame, but it costs more mana to channel.

13.name: Ghostflame More Damage More Area
13.description: Ghostflame deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

14.name: Ghostflame Health Leeched Against Cursed Enemies
14.description:
You leech a portion of the damage you deal as health against {Cursed} enemies while channeling Ghostflame.

Additionally, Ghostflame has a chance to inflict Frailty each second.

15.name: Ghostflame Gain Haste And Ward
15.description:
When you stop channeling Ghostflame after having channeled for at least 1 second, you gain the {Haste} buff for a short duration.

Additionally, when you stop channeling you gain ward per {Cursed} enemy.

16.name: Ghostflame Skull Persists
16.description:
After channeling for 1.1 seconds Ghostflame detaches itself, and persists for short duration without you needing to channel.

This effect ends early if you start channeling Ghostflame again.

17.name: Ghostflame Skull Duration Increased
17.description: The duration from the {Memorial of Flames} node is longer, but Ghostflame now has an upfront mana cost.

18.name: Ghostflame Skull Moves
18.description: The detached Ghostflame now slowly seeks out nearby enemies.

19.name: Ghostflame Consume Ward Gain Area
19.description: After channeling for 1 second, Ghostflame consumes a portion of your current ward, and it deals damage in a larger area per ward consumed.

20.name: Ghostflame Cast Beams
20.description:
For each 200 ward consumed by the {Silver Oblation} node you now cast a {Stygian Beam} at a nearby enemy dealing spell necrotic damage.

Enemies cannot be hit by more than 1 beam.

21.name: Ghostflame Addply Stack To Minions
21.description:
All your {Wraiths}, {Spectres}, and {Revenants} gain a stack of {Spirit Kindling} every 0.5 seconds while they are inside Ghostflame's area of effect.

Each stack of {Spirit Kindling} lasts 5 seconds, drains health per second, and grants increased movement speed, melee attack speed, and ignite chance equal to a portion of your ignite chance.

22.name: Ghostflame Full Circle
22.description: Ghostflame now deals damage in a full circle around you, but it has a higher channel cost.

23.name: Ghostflame Move Toward Cursor
23.description: You now move towards the target location while channeling Ghostflame with increased movement speed, but it has a higher channel cost.

24.name: Ghostflame Less Movespeed Less Channel Cost
24.description: Ghostflame has a lower channel cost, but you move slower while channeling Ghostflame.

25.name: Ghostflame More Movespeed
25.description: You move faster while channeling Ghostflame.

26.name: Ghostflame Direct Damage Increased
26.description: Ghostflame deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second you spend channeling Ghostflame.

27.name: Ghostflame Less Channel Cost And Mana As Ward
27.description: Ghostflame has a lower channel cost and you gain a portion of your current mana as ward each second while channeling Ghostflame.

28.name: Ghostflame More Dodge Rating
28.description: You gain additional dodge rating per intelligence while channeling Ghostflame, as well as more dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers) while channeling Ghostflame.

29.name: Ghostflame Dodge Rating Conversion To Armor
29.description: All of your dodge rating is converted to armor while channeling Ghostflame.

2.name: Profane Veil Slow Chance And DoT Leeched
2.description:
Chthonic Fissure costs less mana and it refunds some of its mana cost if there is a cursed player, rare enemy or boss within 20 meters when you cast it.

This effect also works if you are Cursed.

3.name: Profane Veil Damage Converted To Fire And Ignite Chance Per Second
3.description: {Tormenting} an ignited enemy spreads all of your ignite stacks from it to a number of other enemies around it.

4.name: Profane Veil Convert Ailment Chance To Ignite Chance
4.description: The Fissure releases {Spirits} more frequently.

5.name: Profane Veil Alter Movespeed
5.description: Chthonic Fissure now creates a secondary Fissure in the opposite direction that casts its own {Spirits}. Enemies can take damage from both Fissures if they stand on both, but Chthonic Fissure costs significantly more mana.

6.name: Profane Veil Can Cast Infernal Shade
6.description:
{Spirits} now have a chance to be replaced by a cast of {Chaos Bolts} that consumes a portion of its mana cost and scales with your {Chaos Bolts} tree.

{Chaos Bolts} cast this way have a chance to have no additional projectiles.

7.name: Profane Veil Immobilise Cursed Enemies
7.description: When {Tormented} enemies die they have a chance to release the {Spirit} to inflict and {Torment} another enemy within 8 meters.

8.name: Profane Veil More Damage To Cursed Enemies
8.description: The {Spirits'} hits shred enemy necrotic resistance.

9.name: Profane Veil Casting Curse Reduce Cooldown
9.description: The {Spirits'} hits shred enemy fire resistance.

10.name: Profane Veil Increase Area
10.description: When {Spirits} {Torment} an enemy afflicted by an {Infernal Shade} they consume the Shade, causing it to instantly deal its remaining damage and increases all existing Chthonic Fissures' frequency of releasing {Spirits} up to a maximum.

11.name: Profane Veil Gains On Weapons
11.description: The {Spirits'} hits inflict enemies with {Damned}.

12.name: Profane Veil Fear Enemies On Form Exit
12.description: Chthonic Fissure and ailments it inflicts deal more necrotic damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1% Added Critical Strike Multiplier.

13.name: Profane Veil Armor Works For DoT
13.description: {Torment} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on your uncapped necrotic resistance.

14.name: Profane Veil Can Buff Wandering Spirit
14.description:
Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to rare enemies and bosses.

This effect is doubled if the enemy or you are cursed.

15.name: Profane Veil Gain Ward On Dodge
15.description:
{Spirits} now target you instead of enemies, and whenever you are {Tormented} or {Torment's} duration on you is refreshed, you gain additional spell damage and Endurance Threshold.

This buff can stack and has the same duration as {Torment}, but persists if {Torment} is cleansed.

16.name: Profane Veil Increased Duration And Movespeed
16.description: The Fissure deals more direct damage for each second it is active (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you leech a portion of the damage it does.

17.name: Profane Veil Cannot Change Direction
17.description:
You can now have additional Fissures active at a time, but {Spirits} are released less frequently.

If a Fissure is placed over an existing one, the new Fissure closes after 1 second.

18.name: Profane Veil Consumes Minions
18.description: Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but it no longer releases {Spirits}.

19.name: Profane Veil Summon Volatile Zombies
19.description:
Fissures now cast {Volatile Zombies} every 2 seconds, but consumes mana equal to a portion of {Volatile Zombies} mana cost.

{Volatile Zombie} cast this way has a chance to not create multiple {Zombies} if it would otherwise.

20.name: Profane Veil Grant Ward And Summon Volatile Zombies Upon Killing
20.description:
Chthonic Fissure deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled if you are cursed.

21.name: Profane Veil Damage Converted To Physical
21.description: The Fissure's initial impact now hits enemies dealing spell fire damage, with added damage applying at 300% effectiveness for this hit.

22.name: Profane Veil Cast Bone Curse
22.description:
The Fissure's initial hit now deals additional spell damage with a higher chance to stun per 2% ignite chance.

This effects scales with bleed or poison if the Fissure is converted to physical or poison respectively.

23.name: Profane Veil Second AoE
23.description: The Fissure's initial hit now Curse enemies with {Acid Skin}, which causes them to take poison damage over time and a chance to be critically struck by any hit.

24.name: Profane Veil Second AoE At Target
24.description:
Your hits against enemies cursed by {Acid Skin} have additional base critical strike chance per 10% of your global increased poison damage.

This bonus critical strike chance is not affected by other critical strike chance modifiers.

25.name: Profane Veil Less Mana Cost And More Damages
25.description: The Fissure's initial impact now spreads all of your ignite stacks from the target to nearby enemies up to a maximum.

26.name: Profane Veil Applies Marked For Death
26.description:
When directly casting Chthonic Fissure you now travel along the Fissure as it opens, but this adds a cooldown to Chthonic Fissure.

Chthonic Fissure gains the {Traversal} tag.

27.name: Profane Veil Proliferate Poison And Damn
27.description:
The Fissure gains a percentage of your global chance to ignite on hit as ignite chance per second. 

Additionally, the Fissure has a base chance to ignite enemies each second.

28.name: Profane Veil Cast Profane Orbs
28.description:
Chthonic Fissure's base fire damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources are converted to bleed chance per second for the Fissure.

Swaps Chthonic Fissures' {Fire} tag for a {Physical} tag.

29.name: Profane Veil Increase Profane Orbs Frequency And Damage
29.description: {Torment} lasts longer and any ignite, poison and bleed inflicted by Chthonic Fissure also last longer.

30.name: Profane Veil Less Mana Cost
30.description: {Torment} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to ignited, poisoned or bleeding enemies.

31.name: Profane Veil Apply Penance
31.description:
Chthonic Fissure's base fire damage over time is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to poison chance per second for the Fissure.

Swaps Chthonic Fissures' {Fire} tag for a {Poison} tag.

32.name: Profane Veil Cleanses Ailments
32.description: You now cleanse all negative ailments on you when you enter Profane Veil.

2.name: Falconry Falconers Mark
2.description: Whenever the Falcon hits an enemy with {Falcon Strikes} it {Marks} them. Your next hit against a {Marked} target deals more damage and consumes the {Mark}.

1.name: Falconry Falcon Applies Falconers Mark
1.description: Your Falcon's other hits now have a chance to inflict {Falconer's Mark}.

4.name: Falconry Consume Mark For Added Damage Buff
4.description:
When you consume a {Falconer's Mark} your Falcon gains additional melee damage equal to a portion of your added melee damage, throwing damage, bow damage, or spell damage depending on the type of ability used to consume the mark.

This effect lasts 10 seconds and can stack a limited number of times.

5.name: Falconry Falcon Throws Acid Flasks
5.description:
Your Falcon now throws {Acid Flasks} for you. {Acid Flasks} thrown by the Falcon scale with your stats and your {Acid Flask} tree, but can apply {Falcon's Mark} from {Marking Strikes}.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of your {Acid Flask's} mana cost and has a 6 second cooldown.

6.name: Falconry Falcon More Max Acid Flasks
6.description: Your Falcon has additional {Acid Flask} charges.

7.name: Falconry Falcon Acid Flask Charges From You
7.description: When you directly use {Acid Flask} your Falcon has a chance to gain additional {Acid Flask} charges.

8.name: Falconry Falcon More Damage Per Char Level And Dex
8.description: Your Falcon deals more global damage per character level and per point of Dexterity (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Falconry Falcon More Damage Doubled For Falcon Strikes
9.description:
Your Falcon deals more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). 

This effect is tripled for {Falcon Strikes}.

10.name: Falconry Falcon Prioritizes Targets Near You
10.description: Your Falcon now more heavily prioritizes enemies close to you during combat.

11.name: Falconry Falcon Prioritizes Targets Location Of Your Recent Attack
11.description: Your Falcon now heavily prioritizes enemies close to the target location of your most recent melee, throwing or bow attack.

12.name: Falconry Falcon More Damage To Moving Enemies
12.description:
Your Falcon deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is tripled against moving targets.

13.name: Falconry Falcon Chance To Drop Black Arrow
13.description: When your Falcon hits an enemy it has a chance to drop a {Black Arrow} at its location.

14.name: Falconry Ailment Sharing To Falcon
14.description: A portion of your chance to inflict bleed, poison, shred armor, shred resistances, and slow on hit now also apply to your Falcon's hits.

15.name: Falconry Falcon Feather Knives
15.description:
Your Falcon now uses {Feather Knives} at nearby enemies. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

Your Falcon also throws a single Feather Knife whenever you consume {Falconer's Mark}.

16.name: Falconry Feather Knives CDR From Your Throwing Attack Speed
16.description: A portion of your global throwing attack speed now applies to the Falcon's {Feather Knives} ability as increased cooldown recovery speed.

17.name: Falconry Increased Damage Sharing To Falcon
17.description: A portion of the highest of your global increased melee damage, increased throwing damage, or increased bow damage now apply to all your Falcon's damage.

18.name: Falconry Crit Chance Sharing To Falcon
18.description: Your critical strike chance modifiers now also apply to your {Falcon}, but at a reduced ratio.

19.name: Falconry Crit Multi Sharing To Falcon After Skill Use
19.description:
When you use a melee, throwing, or bow attack and critically strike at least one enemy, your Falcon gains a portion of your global melee, throwing, or bow critical strike multiplier respectively for 10 seconds.

This effect can occur at most twice every two second.

20.name: Falconry Your Abilities Reduce Cooldown
20.description: When you directly use a melee, throwing, or bow attack and hit at least one enemy, you reduce a portion of {Falcon Strike's} remaining cooldown.

21.name: Falconry Falcon Screech
21.description: After the first hit of {Falcon Strike} your Falcon lets out a {Screech} which slows and applies {Frailty} to enemies around it.

22.name: Falconry Screech Fears
22.description:
Your Falcon's {Screech} now also fears enemies it hits.

Additionally, your Falcon moves to you when a hit leaves you at low health, and this effect will interrupt any skill it is currently using.

This effect can occur at most every 10 seconds.

23.name: Falconry More Falcon Strike Hits
23.description: {Falcon Strikes} hits addtional times and your {Falcon} has increased melee attack speed.

24.name: Falconry Falcon Strikes Culling
24.description:
{Falcon Strikes} instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node then the highest threshold is used.

25.name: Falconry Razor Wing Line Attack
25.description: {Falcon Strikes} now cause your Falcon to swoop down in a line in front of you attacking all enemies in that line rather than hitting enemies individually.

26.name: Falconry Increased Area Sharing To Falcon
26.description:
A portion of your global increased area for area skills now applies to the width of {Falcon Strikes}.

Additionally, {Falcon Strikes} deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if you have directly used an area skill in the past 8 seconds.

27.name: Falconry Falcon Strikes Additional Hits On Kill Or Hit
27.description:
If {Falcon Strikes} kills an enemy it will hit an additional time.

Additionally, when {Falcon Strikes} hits a boss or rare enemy it has a chance to hit an additional time.

28.name: Falconry Health And Mana Recovery On Boss Or Rare Kill
28.description: When your Falcon kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy it restores health and mana to you based on your total attributes. This effect can occur from hits a limited number of times per 3 seconds.

29.name: Falconry Consume Mark For Falcons Wake Speed Buff
29.description:
When you consume {Falconer's Mark} you gain the {Falcon's Wake} buff for a short duration. 

This buff grants you increased movement speed, attack and cast speed.

30.name: Falconry Consuming Mark Recovers Falcon Strike Cooldown
30.description: Consuming a {Falconer's Mark} instantly recovers {Falcon Strike's} cooldown, but it now also costs additional mana.

2.name: Aerial Assault More Damage And CDR
2.description: Aerial Assault deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown.

3.name: Aerial Assault Featherstorm
3.description: After the initial {Wing Burst} your Falcon continues releasing {Featherstorm} at the target location for 5 seconds.

4.name: Aerial Assault Featherstorm Slow Chance And Dodge Rating
4.description:
{Featherstorm} now has a chance to slow enemies inside its area each second. 

Additionally, you and your allies have additional dodge rating while inside the area.

5.name: Aerial Assault Shadow Falcon Featherstorm
5.description: If there is a boss or rare enemy nearby, Aerial Assault now also creates a {Shadow Falcon} to use {Featherstorm} against it.

6.name: Aerial Assault No Longer Moves You But More Damage
6.description:
Aerial Assault no longer moves you. Additionally, it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it no longer has a minimum range.

Aerial Assault loses its {Traversal} tag.

7.name: Aerial Assault Featherstorm Duration And More Direct Damage Per Second
7.description: {Featherstorm} lasts longer and deals more direct damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per second it has been active.

8.name: Aerial Assault Featherstorm Black Arrow Chance
8.description: {Featherstorm} now has a chance each second to drop a {Black Arrow}.

9.name: Aerial Assault Featherstorm Poison Conversion
9.description:
{Featherstorms'} base physical damage over time is converted to poison. Consequently this damage scales with increases to poison damage, but not increases to physical damage.

A portion of your global poison chance on hit now applies as poison chance per second for {Featherstorm}.

Swaps {Featherstorms'} {Physical} tag for a {Poison} tag.

10.name: Aerial Assault Cooldown Reduction On Falcon Hits
10.description: A portion of Aerial Assault's cooldown is recovered when your Falcon hits an enemy. This effect can occur a limited number of times per 3 seconds.

11.name: Aerial Assault Drops Caltrops
11.description: Using Aerial Assault now also drops {Caltrops} at your location.

12.name: Aerial Assault Caltrops Duration And Damage
12.description: {Caltrops} from all sources have a chance to slow on hit and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

13.name: Aerial Assault Additional Caltrops On The Halfway
13.description: You now drop additional {Caltrops} halfway through Aerial Assault's movement if you traveled at least 6 meters.

14.name: Aerial Assault Caltrops Bleed Chance And Falcon Bleed Chance Buff
14.description:
{Caltrops'} hits from all sources have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. 

Additionally, when an enemy walks over your {Caltrops} your Falcon's hits gain additional bleed chance scaling with your Dexterity for 4 seconds. This effect can occur a limited number of times per 4 seconds.

15.name: Aerial Assault Recover Missing Mana On Use
15.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing mana.

16.name: Aerial Assault Recovers Falconry And Dive Bomb Cooldowns
16.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of the remaining cooldown of {Falconry} and {Dive Bomb} per 10 maximum mana you have.

17.name: Aerial Assault Recover Missing Health On Use
17.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing health.

18.name: Aerial Assault Recovered Health Converted To Ward
18.description: Convert the health gain from the {Healing Gust} node to ward at half the effect.

19.name: Aerial Assault Aerial Prowess Buff On Crit
19.description:
For the next 8 seconds after using Aerial Assault, critical strikes dealt by you or your {Falcon} grant you a stack of {Aerial Prowess} up to a maximum.

When you next use Aerial Assault, it consumes all stacks to restore health per stack and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack.

20.name: Aerial Assault More Dodge While Traveling And Aerial Prowess Stacks
20.description:
You have more global dodge rating (multiplicative with other modifiers) while traveling with Aerial Assault.

Additionally, each hit you dodge while traveling grants you a stack of {Aerial Prowess}.

21.name: Aerial Assault Non Crits And On Kill Grant Aerial Prowess
21.description: Aerial Assault now has a chance to grant you {Aerial Prowess} stacks on non-critical strikes and when you kill an enemy.

22.name: Aerial Assault Consuming Aerial Prowess Grants Haste And Frenzy
22.description: Consuming stacks of {Aerial Assault} now grants you {Haste} and Frenzy for a short duration per stack consumed.

23.name: Aerial Assault Rogue Skills Consume Aerial Prowess To Gain More Damage
23.description: Directly using {Ballista,} {Explosive Trap}, or {Dive Bomb} now also consumes your stacks of {Aerial Prowess}, applying the damage bonus to the ability that consumed them.

25.name: Aerial Assault Frailty On Feather Burst
25.description: The {Wing Burst's} hits apply frailty.

26.name: Aerial Assault Ballistas Target Your Location After Landing
26.description: After landing, all your active {Ballistas} prioritize targets around you, deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per Intelligence, and gain increased attack speed.

27.name: Aerial Assault Feather Burst Area
27.description: The {Wing Burst} deals damage in a larger area.

28.name: Aerial Assault More Direct Damage To High Health Enemies
28.description: The {Wing Burst} deals more direct damage to enemies on high health.

29.name: Aerial Assault Ambush Damage Apply To Bosses And Rares
29.description: The damage bonus from {Ambush} always applies against bosses and rare enemies, regardless of their health.

30.name: Aerial Assault Creates Shadow On Feather Burst Kill
30.description: When the {Wing Burst} kills an enemy and you have 3 or fewer active {Shadows}, it creates a {Shadow} at that enemy's location.

31.name: Aerial Assault Your Damage Applies to Feather Burst
31.description: A portion of your added, increased, and more throwing damage modifiers now apply to the {Wing Burst}.

32.name: Aerial Assault Umbral Blades On Feather Burst
32.description: The {Wing Burst} now also includes a few {Umbral Blades} that your Falcon throws for you.

33.name: Aerial Assault Armor Shred On Umbral Blades From Feathers
33.description: The {Umbral Blades'} hits from the {Twilight Strike} node now shred enemy armor.

2.name: Dive Bomb Cooldown Recovery Speed
2.description: Dive Bomb has a shorter cooldown.

3.name: Dive Bomb Cooldown Reduction On Attack
3.description: You reduce a portion of Dive Bomb's remaining cooldown when you use a throwing or bow attack and hit at least one enemy.

4.name: Dive Bomb Featherfall
4.description:
Before your Falcon dives it now uses {Featherfall} that causes razor-sharp feathers to strike a number of enemies in an area around the target location.

{Shadow Falcons} won't use {Featherfall}.

32.name: Dive Bomb Featherfall Armor Shred
32.description: {Featherfall's} hits shred enemy armor.

6.name: Dive Bomb Area And Slow
6.description: Dive Bomb's hits slows enemies and it deals damage in a larger area.

7.name: Dive Bomb Crit Vulnerability
7.description: Dive Bomb's hits apply {Critical Vulnerability} on enemies.

8.name: Dive Bomb Talon Blades
8.description:
Dive Bomb and {Featherfall} hits grant you a stack of {Talon Blades} for 18 seconds.

You have increased critical strike chance and critical multiplier per stack.

All stacks of {Talon Blades} are lost if you directly use Dive Bomb again.

9.name: Dive Bomb Increased Movespeed With 5 Talon Blades
9.description: You move faster while you have at least 5 stacks of {Talon Blades}.

10.name: Dive Bomb Explodes Explosive Traps With And Buffs Them
10.description:
If Dive Bomb hits your {Explosive Traps} they instantly explode dealing more damage in a larger area (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Additionally, when you detonate an {Explosive Trap} this way you gain a stack of {Talon Blades}.

11.name: Dive Bomb Physical Shred
11.description: Dive Bomb's hits shred enemy physical resistance.

12.name: Dive Bomb Grants Crimson Shroud
12.description: Dive Bomb's hits grant you a stack of {Crimson Shroud} per enemy hit, up to a maximum.

13.name: Dive Bomb More Damage Per Bleed And Instant Bleeds
13.description:
Dive Bomb's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target up to a maximum.

Additionally, it causes all bleed stacks inflicted by you or your Falcon to be consumed to deal their remaining damage instantly.

14.name: Dive Bomb Reduced Delay And More Damage
14.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it has a shorter delay before the Falcon dives.

15.name: Dive Bomb More Damage Stun Duration And Cooldown Duration
15.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and stuns caused by it last longer, but it has a longer cooldown.

18.name: Dive Bomb Shadow Falcon
18.description:
Dive Bomb now creates a {Shadow Falcon} to strike the location of your own {Shadows} and it will prioritize your {Shadows} nearest the target location, but {Shadow Falcons} deal less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) than the real Falcon.

The number of {Shadow Falcons} cannot exceed the number of {Shadows} you currently have.

19.name: Dive Bomb Dusk Shrouds Per Hit
19.description: You have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} for each {Shadow Falcon} that hit at least one enemy.

20.name: Dive Bomb Shadow Falcon For Primary Attack
20.description:
A {Shadow Falcon} takes your Falcon's place, that uses Dive Bomb. Your Falcon is able to attack and use other abilities during this.
If you do not have an active Falcon, Dive Bomb will scale with your stats instead.

21.name: Dive Bomb Shadow Falcon Double Hit Inside Smoke Bomb
21.description: Your {Shadow Falcons} that land inside the area of your {Smoke Bomb} have a chance to take off again after a short delay before diving again at a nearby enemy to deal damage around them.

22.name: Dive Bomb Shadow Falcon Damage Per Umbral Blade
22.description: Your {Shadow Falcons} deal more damage (multiplicative with other modfiers) per {Umbral Blade} you have on the ground, up to a maximum.

23.name: Dive Bomb Spear Leap
23.description:
If you are wielding a spear you also leap to the target location when you use Dive Bomb. This deals damage in the area around the target.

Dive Bomb gains the {Traversal} tag.

24.name: Dive Bomb Bleed
24.description: Dive Bomb's hits cause enemies to bleed.

25.name: Dive Bomb Damage From Dual Wielding
25.description: If you are dual wielding, a portion of the damage specific stats from both of your weapons apply to your Falcon's Dive Bomb.

26.name: Dive Bomb More Ailment Damage Per Stun Chance
26.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10% of your increased stun chance.

27.name: Dive Bomb Regain Mana And Cooldown On Boss Or Rare Hit
27.description: If Dive Bomb hits at least one boss or rare enemy you regain mana and recover a portion of your remaining traversal skills' cooldown.

28.name: Dive Bomb Detonates Decoys For More Damage And Area
28.description:
If Dive Bomb hits one of your {Decoy}, it detonates it, causing its explosion to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area.

The effects from the {Rapid Pursuit} node are also gained when Dive Bomb hits one of your {Decoys}.

Dive Bomb cannot explode more than one {Decoy} per use.

29.name: Dive Bomb Less Mana Cost More Damage
29.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana.

30.name: Dive Bomb Increased Smoke Bomb Duration
30.description:
If your Falcon lands inside the area of your {Smoke Bomb} the smoke area lasts longer.

This effect can occur once per Smoke Bomb.

25.nodeName: Explosive Trap Reduced Mana Cost But Less Damage And Area
25.name: Explosive Trap Reduced Mana Cost But Less Damage And Area

27.name: Explosive Trap Blast Rain Instant Detonation When Hitting Ground
