2.name: Net Bleed On Hit
2.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits shred enemy fire resistance.

3.name: Net Area
3.description:
Whenever you hit an enemy with any melee attack, you attach an Explosive Trap to that enemy.

This effect has a 1.5 second cooldown and attached traps explode after 1 second ignoring arming time or when the enemy it's attached to dies. Enemies cannot have more than 1 trap attached.

4.name: Net Cannot Be Dodged
4.description:
Attached traps deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

If the enemy that the Explosive Trap is attached to hits you, it now attaches to you instead (but will still only damage enemies). Hitting an enemy then attaches it back to them without changing the delay before exploding.

Additionally, when it explodes, the trap deals 30% more damage for each time it has been passed.

5.name: Net Slows
5.description:
When an Explosive Trap detonates, all other Explosive Traps now also detonate in quick succession and fire {Detonating Arrows} at the original target trap's location. The Detonating Arrows can occur a limited number of times per 2 seconds.

This effect consumes mana equal to a portion of your {Detonating Arrow's} mana cost.

6.name: Net Cannot Dodge Or Avoid Crits
6.description: {Detonating Arrows} fired this way deal additional bow damage per 3 Dexterity.

7.name: Net Huntress Advantage Buff
7.description:
Explosive Trap's base fire damage is converted to lightning. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Fire resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to lightning resistance shred.

Swaps Explosive Trap's {Fire} tag for a {Lightning} tag.

8.name: Net Huntress Advantage Attack Speed
8.description: Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to shock enemies and inflict them with a {Spark Charge}.

9.name: Net Physical Damage Over Time
9.description:
When directly using Explosive Trap, an unconverted Explosive Trap and a trap corresponding to each conversion node you have taken are thrown at the same time. Traps thrown this way are thrown in a small area.

Additionally, Explosive Trap deals less damage in a smaller area (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and cost additional mana.

10.name: Net Lightning Conversion
10.description:
Explosive Trap's base fire damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to fire damage.

Fire resistance shred chance from all sources is converted to cold resistance shred.

Swaps Explosive Trap's {Fire} tag for a {Cold} tag.

11.name: Net Damage Per 100 Dodge Rating
11.description:
Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to chill enemies.

Additionally, Explosive Trap has additional freeze rate per Intelligence.

12.name: Net Damage And Bleed Duration
12.description:
When you directly throw Explosive Trap, its hits always freeze enemies, but it now has a cooldown.

Whenever you freeze an enemy with any skill, a portion of Explosive Trap's remaining cooldown is recovered.

13.name: Net Poison Conversion
13.description: Explosive Trap is now triggered from farther away and deals damage in a larger area.

14.name: Net No Flip Back
14.description:
Particularly fast enemies (with a movement speed above 6 meters per second) trigger Explosive Traps instantly, even if they haven't armed.

Additionally, Explosive Trap's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to moving enemies.

15.name: Net Trap
15.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for each second it has existed before detonating up to a maximum.

16.name: Net Spear Trap
16.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifeirs) if the arming time is not ignored, but it takes longer for it to arm before it can detonate.

17.name: Net Additional Traps
17.description: When an Explosive Trap detonates, if it hit at least one enemy, it has a chance to grant you a stack of {Dusk Shroud}. This chance increases for each second it spends arming.

18.name: Net Caltrops
18.description: Explosive Trap deals additional throwing damage per stack of {Dusk Shroud} you have.

19.name: Net Caltrops Area
19.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana and it has increased throwing attack speed.

20.name: Net Caltrops Crit Per Slow Chance
20.description:
Whenever one of your Explosive Traps detonate, your {Falcon} gains physical and elemental penetration for a short duration.

This effect can trigger up to a maximum of 15 times within 3 seconds.

21.name: Net Caltrops At Target Location
21.description: Whenever one of your Explosive Traps detonate, your {Falcon's} skills recover a portion of their remaining cooldowns.

22.name: Net Jump Distance
22.description:
Whenever you directly throw Explosive Trap, you now throw traps, up to your maximum number of traps, in a wide area around the target location.

Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per maximum traps, but it now has a cooldown and costs more mana per maximum trap.

23.name: Net Jump Forward
23.description: You can now have more active Explosive Traps.

24.name: Net Smoke Bomb After Jump
24.description: You now throw additional Explosive Traps per use, but Explosive Trap costs more mana.

25.name: Net Duration
25.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a smaller area.

26.name: Net Stun And Chill And Mana Gain
26.description:
You now shoot arrows attached with Explosive Traps up into the air that then drop down around the target location.

Explosive Trap now scales with your bow damage instead of throwing damage and your bow attack speed instead of throwing attack speed.

This requires wielding a bow.

27.name: Net Cooldown Recovery
27.description:
Explosive Traps now instantly detonate when the arrows hit the ground via the {Blast Rain} node, ignoring the arming time.

Additionally, Explosive Trap has a higher chance to stun enemies.

28.name: Net Traversal Conversion
28.description: Whenever an Explosive Trap detonates, it has a chance to drop a fresh Explosive Trap at its location as long as there is an enemy within 6 meters, but Explosive Trap costs more mana.

29.name: Net Netted Enemies Deal Less Phys Damage
29.description:
Explosive Trap has an additional chance to drop a fresh Explosive Trap via the {Trap Sprinkler} node, but Explosive Trap costs more mana.

Traps dropped this way cannot drop more additional traps.

30.name: Net Falcon Deals More Damage To Netted Enemies
30.description:
Whenever an Explosive Trap detonates, it now has a chance to create a {Ballista} for you.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Ballista's} mana cost.

31.name: Net Frailty On Hit
31.description:
Explosive Traps dropped by the {Trap Sprinkler} node are now flung at a nearby enemy within 12 meters instead of being dropped.

Explosive Traps dropped by the {Trap Sprinkler} node can now drop Explosive Traps when there's an enemy within 12 meters even if there is not an enemy within 6 meters.

2.name: Gathering Storm Additional Storm Bolt Chance
2.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} at an additional enemy.

3.name: Gathering Storm Damage And Storm Bolt Frequency
3.description: Gathering Storm deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you expend {Storm Stacks} more frequently, but {Storm Bolts} target enemies within a smaller area.

4.nodeName: In the Eye of the Storm
4.name: Gathering Storm Maelstrom Chance Per Stack
4.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to cast {Maelstrom}.

6.name: Gathering Storm Chance To Gain Instead Of Losing Stack
6.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to gain a stack instead of losing one.

7.name: Gathering Storm Haste Chance
7.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} you have a chance to gain {Haste}.

8.name: Gathering Storm Storm Stack On Companion Ability And More Storm Bolt Damage
8.description:
Whenever you use a companion ability you expend {Storm Stacks} over the next 0.3 seconds.

Storm Bolts triggered this way deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

9.name: Gathering Storm Chance To Cast Storm Bolt Again Against Boss Or Rare
9.description: Whenever you hit a boss or rare enemy with a {Storm Bolt} you have a chance to cast it again at the same enemy after 0.25 seconds.

10.name: Gathering Storm Melee Bolt With Staff
10.description: While wielding a staff the melee attack of Gathering Storm is replaced by a direct ranged cast of {Storm Bolt}, but Gathering Storm costs additional mana.

11.name: Gathering Storm Larger Targeting Area
11.description: {Storm Bolts} target enemies from farther away.

12.name: Gathering Storm Storm Stacks From Minions
12.description: If you have from 1 to 15 {Storm Stacks}, your minions' lightning skill hits have a chance to grant you a {Storm Stack}.

13.name: Gathering Storm Lightning Pen
13.description: Gathering Storm penetrates enemy lightning resistance.

14.name: Gathering Storm Consume Mana For More Damage
14.description: {Storm Bolts} now consume a portion of your current mana to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10 current mana, up to a maximum.

15.name: Gathering Storm Additional Targets While Dual Wielding
15.description: Whenever you expend a {Storm Stack} while dual wielding you now cast {Storm Bolts} at two enemies instead of one.

16.name: Gathering Storm Attack Speed
16.description: Gathering Storm has increased attack speed.

17.name: Gathering Storm Mana Gain Per Active Storm Stack
17.description: Whenever you directly use Gathering Storm you gain mana per active {Storm Stack} up to a maximum.

18.name: Gathering Storm Global Stun Chance And Freezy Multi
18.description: You have increased global stun chance and additional freeze rate multiplier per active {Storm Stack} up to a maximum.

19.name: Gathering Storm Chance To Consume Mana For Added Storm Stacks
19.description: Gathering Storm's hits have a chance to consume mana to grant you additional {Storm Stacks}.

20.name: Gathering Storm Melee Area And Chance For Added Storm Stacks
20.description: Gathering Storm's melee attack deals damage in a larger area and you have a chance to gain an additional {Storm Stack} if you hit at least 3 enemies with the same melee attack.

21.name: Gathering Storm Storm Crows Attack Additional Targets
21.description:
Whenever you use Gathering Storm's and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of {Wings of Lightning}.

Each time one of your {Storm Crows} attack they consume a stack of Wings of Lightning causing their basic attack to chain 2 additional times.

22.name: Gathering Storm Shock Chance And More Damage To Shocked Enemy
22.description:
{Storm Bolts'} hits have chance to shock enemies.

Gathering Storm deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to shocked enemies.

23.name: Gathering Storm Spell Damage Per Melee Damage
23.description:
Gathering Storm deals additional spell damage per 3 melee damage on your equipped axe or mace.

The added spell damage granted by this effect is significantly reduced when applied to a Storm Totem through its {Unmatched Storms}.

24.name: Gathering Storm Physical Conversion
24.description:
Gathering Storm's and {Storm Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to physical. Consequently this damage scales with increases to physical damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance on hit from all sources is converted to armor shred chance for Gathering Storm.

Swaps Gathering Storm's {Lightning} tag for a {Physical} tag.

25.name: Gathering Storm Melee Damage Per Strength
25.description: Gathering Storm deals additional melee damage per Strength while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

26.name: Gathering Storm Cold Conversion
26.description:
Gathering Storm's and {Storm Bolt's} base lightning damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to lightning damage.

Shock chance on hit from all sources is converted to frostbite chance for Gathering Storm.

Swaps Gathering Storm's {Lightning} tag for a {Cold} tag.

27.name: Gathering Storm Chill Chance And Freeze Rate
27.description: Gathering Storm's hits have a chance to chill enemies and a higher chance to freeze enemies.

28.name: Gathering Storm Freeze Rate Per Attunement And Cold Per For Frostbite
28.description: Gathering Storm has a higher chance to freeze enemies per 2 Attunement and it also has additional cold penetration for frostbite per 2 Attunement.

30.name: Gathering Storm Crit Chance Per Maelstrom
30.description: Gathering Storm has improved base critical strike chance per stack of {Maelstrom} on you from any source.

1.name: Healing Hands Deals Damage
1.description: Healing Hands now hits enemies within its area of effect, dealing spell fire damage. Added spell damage applies to it at 200% effectiveness.

2.name: Healings Hands Damage per Healing Effect
2.description: Healing hands deals additional spell damage based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree.

3.name: Healing Hands vs Void
3.description:
Healing Hands {Immobilizes} void enemies for 1 second on hit and deals more damage to them (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Healing Hands grants allies 10% less void damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds when cast on them. This buff does not stack.

4.name: Healing Hands vs Undead
4.description:
Healing Hands fears Undead Enemies for 2 to 3 seconds on hit and deals more damage to them (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Healing Hands grants allies 10% less necrotic damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds when cast on them. This buff does not stack.

5.name: Healings Hands Damage per Buff Skill Level
5.description: Healing hands deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on the combined levels of your specialised Buff skills.

6.name: Healings Hands Electrify
6.description: Healing hands has a chance to {Electrify} on hit.

7.name: Healing Hands Spread Electrify
7.description: Healing Hands deals more lightning damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and when you hit an electrified enemy with Healing Hands it spreads all stacks of your stacks of electrify from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres.

8.name: Healing Hands Melee
8.description:
Healing Hands is converted into a melee attack that hits in a wide arc in front of you. It now scales with melee damage instead of spell damage and effects on this tree that granted spell damage now grant melee damage instead.

Healing Hands still heals you, as well as allies within its area of affect.

9.name: Healing Hands Healing Effectiveness
9.description: Healing Hands has increased healing effectiveness. This bonus is doubled if there is a dead player within 30 meters.

10.name: Healing Hands Area And Mana Cost
10.description: Healing Hands has an increased area of effect and a lower mana cost.

11.name: Healing Hands Mana Cost
11.description: Healing Hands has a lower mana cost.

12.name: Healing Hands Divine Bolts
12.description:
You cast {Divine Bolt} at nearby enemies when you directly cast healing hands and heal yourself or an ally.

Divine Bolt is affected by specific passives from the Paladin tree and if you take this node then Divine Bolt from all sources scales with nodes on this tree.

13.name: Healing Hands Ward
13.description:
Healing Hands also grants ward to allies based on your Attunement.

If the ally has an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health, then it will not heal them, but will provide a percentage of its healing as ward.

14.name: Healing Hands Cast On Self
14.description:
If Healing Hands would not affect any allied players at the chosen target location, it is cast centered on you instead.

Healing Hands has increased healing effectiveness.

15.name: Healings Hands Ward per Healing Effect
15.description: Healing Hands also grants ward to allies based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree.

16.name: Healing Hands Channelled
16.description: Healing Hands becomes a channeled ability, casting 4 times per second regardless of cast speed, and draining your mana.

17.name: Healings Hands Ward per Second
17.description:
Healing Hands also grants ward per second for three seconds after being cast on an ally.

The ward per second is equal to a proportion of the ward granted up front by the other nodes on this tree and by items that cause you to grant ward with Healing Hands.

This effect cannot stack multiple times, casting again on the same ally just refreshes the duration.

18.name: Healings Hands Upfront Heal
18.description: Healing Hands restores additional health up front.

19.name: Healings Hands Heal over Time
19.description: Healing Hands restores additional health over time. This lasts for three seconds just like Healing Hands' inherent healing over time effect.

20.name: Healings Hands Melee Proc
20.description:
When you directly use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target. This consumes mana based on Healing Hands's mana cost.

Healing Hands restores less up front health when cast indirectly.

21.name: Healings Hands Smite Proc
21.description: When you directly cast Smite, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target location. This consumes 70% of its mana cost.

22.name: Healing Hands Traversal
22.description:
When you directly use Healing Hands you dash to the target location first. However, Healing Hands now has a cooldown and counts a {Traversal} skill.

This does not affect indirect casts of Healing Hands.

23.name: Healing Hands Cooldown Recovery
23.description: A portion of Healing Hands' remaining cooldown is recovered if you use it to heal an ally other than yourself. This effect can occur once per direct cast of Healing Hands.

24.name: Healings Hands Health Globe
24.description: When you cast Healing Hands, there is a chance it spawns a {Health Globe} at a random point inside the area of effect. When an ally walks over the globe, it is consumed, healing them for 70 health.

26.name: Healing Hands Immune While Moving
26.description: You are immune to damage while moving with Healing Hands.

28.name: Healing Hands Slow More Damage
28.description: Healing Hands takes longer to cast, but deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased healing effectiveness and a larger area of effect.

30.name: Healing Hands Heal To Full
30.description:
If you heal an allied player other than yourself that was below half prior to healing, Healing Hands restores them to full health and grants them ward equal to 80% of their max health.

This has no effect on you, nor on minions, nor players that have an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health.

32.name: Healings Hands Sky Beam
32.description:
While channelling Healing Hands you also call down a beam from the sky that deals fire damage over time to enemies around the target area and heals allies within its area of effect.

Healing Hands costs additional mana per second while channelling.

1.name: Heartseeker Leech And Recurve Chance
1.description: You leech a portion of Heartseeker's damage and it has an additional chance to {Recurve}.

2.name: Heartseeker Crit Chance And Crit Multi
2.description: Heartseeker has additional critical strike chance and its critical strikes deal more damage.

3.name: Heartseeker Bow Damage After Recurve
3.description: Heartseeker deals more bow damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) after each recurve, up to a maximum.

4.name: Heartseeker Debuffs And No Retarget
4.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to apply frailty and shred enemy armor, but it no longer seeks new targets when the first target dies.

5.name: Heartseeker Puncture On Recurve
5.description: When Heartseeker's target dies, you shoot {Puncture} at a nearby enemy for each {Recurve} it would have triggered after the target died.

6.name: Heartseeker Dusk Shroud On Recurve
6.description: Heartseeker has a chance on {Recurve} to grant you a {Dusk Shroud}, up to a maximum every 2 seconds.

7.name: Heartseeker Chance For Shadow Heartseeker
7.description: When you directly use Heartseeker and hit at least one enemy, it has a chance to consume one of your {Shadows} to use Heartseeker at the same target.

8.name: Heartseeker Dark Arrow After Recurve
8.description:
After a Heartseeker arrow {Recurves} at least 3 times, it has a chance to leave a {Black Arrow} between you and the target enemy if the enemy is at least 6 meters away.

This effect can occur a limited number of times every 3 seconds.

9.name: Heartseeker More Damage
9.description: Heartseeker's hits cannot be dodged and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

10.name: Heartseeker Cold Conversion
10.description:
Heartseeker's base physical damage is converted to cold and it now has a base freeze rate. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance on hit from all sources is converted to frostbite chance for Heartseeker.

Swaps Heartseeker's {Physical} tag for a {Cold} tag.

11.name: Heartseeker Freeze Rate and Frostbite
11.description: Heartseeker's hits have a higher chance to freeze and have a chance to chill enemies.

12.name: Heartseeker Cold Pen Per Cold Res
12.description: Heartseeker penetrate additional cold resistance scaling with your cold overcapped resistance.

13.name: Heartseeker Fire Conversion
13.description:
Heartseeker's base physical damage is converted to fire. Consequently this damage scales with increases to fire damage, but not increases to physical damage. 

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to ignite chance.

Swaps Heartseeker's {Physical} tag for a {Fire} tag.

14.name: Heartseeker Burning Dagger
14.description: Heartseeker has a chance to grant you a {Burning Dagger} on {Recurve} consuming mana.

15.name: Heartseeker Consecutive Recurve Buff
15.description: Consecutive {Recurves} each grant a stack of {Dragonfang} for 10 seconds. Higher stacks can only be achieved by a higher amount of consecutive {Recurves}, up to a maximum of 20.

16.name: Heartseeker Frenzy On Use
16.description:
Directly using Heartseeker and hitting at least one enemy grants you frenzy for a short duration. 

This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

17.name: Heartseeker Health And Mana Gain On Use
17.description: When directly used, Heartseeker arrows have a chance to grant mana and health on hit.

18.name: Heartseeker Increased Attack Speed And Mana Efficiency
18.description: Heartseeker has increased attack speed and costs less mana.

19.name: Heartseeker Poison Chance And Poison Duration
19.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to poison enemies and poison it inflicts last longer.

20.name: Heartseeker Bleed Chance And Bleed Pen
20.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and bleed it inflicts penetrate enemy physical resistance.

21.name: Heartseeker Ailment Damage After Recurve
21.description: Heartseeker deals more ailment damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) after each recurve, up to a maximum.

22.name: Heartseeker Crimson Shroud On Recurve
22.description: Heartseeker has a chance to grant you {Crimson Shroud} on {Recurve}.

23.name: Heartseeker Recurve Chance
23.description: Heartseeker has an additional chance to {Recurve}.

24.name: Heartseeker Big Hit Cooldown
24.description: Heartseeker has an additional chance to {Recurve}, and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but it now has a cooldown.

25.name: Heartseeker Added Charges
25.description: Heartseeker has additional charges.

26.name: Heartseeker Dark Arrows Restore Charges
26.description: Your Heartseeker restores a charge whenever you pick up a {Black Arrow}.

27.name: Heartseeker Minimum Recurve Chance
27.description: Heartseeker now has a minimum chance to {Recurve}.

28.name: Heartseeker Recurve Chance Per Dex
28.description: Heartseeker has an additional chance to {Recurve} scaling with Dexterity.

29.name: Heartseeker Adds Duration To Hail Of Arrows
29.description: Whenever Heartseeker {Recurves}, it extends the duration of your most recent {Hail of Arrows} by a small amount, up to 10 times per use of {Hail of Arrows}.

30.name: Heartseeker Slow Chance
30.description: Heartseeker now twists around in a semi-cirle to {Recurve} and its hits have a chance to slow enemies.

31.name: Heartseeker Armor Shred Converted To Poison
31.description: Armor shred chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

1.name: Flay Chill Chance And Damage
1.description: Flay deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and has a chance to chill on hit.

2.name: Flay Every Other Melee Eruption On Elite
2.description: Every second melee attack with Flay which hits a boss or rare enemy has a chance to trigger a Blood Eruption.

3.name: Flay More Hit Damage Doubled Against Low
3.description: Flay deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), doubled against low life enemies.

4.name: Flay Marked For Death And Cull
4.description: Enemies hit by Flay are inflicted with Marked for Death for a duration, and Flay hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

5.name: Flay Dagger Increased Attack Speed
5.description: While using a dagger, Flay has increased attack speed.

6.name: Flay Spirit Step Max Distance
6.description:
When you directly use Flay and hit at least one enemy, you have a chance to gain Haste for 2 seconds. This chance is tripled if Flay is a traversal skill.

Flay's Spirit Step can move you from a further distance.

8.name: Flay Melee Hit Aura Of Decay Area
8.description: When you directly use Flay and hit at least one enemy with the melee attack, your active {Aura of Decay} is granted more ailment frequency (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increased radius for 4 seconds.

9.name: Flay Transfer Aura of Decay On Elite Hit
9.description:
Hitting a boss or rare enemy with Flay's melee attack transfers your active Aura of Decay to them for up to 6 seconds.

While the aura is attached to an enemy, you can move away from it to avoid the self-inflicted ailments.

10.name: Flay Area And Damage Double By Bleeding
10.description: Flay has increased area of effect and additional spell damage. These effects are doubled if there is a bleeding enemy within 15 meters.

11.name: Flay Axe Dagger Melee Added As Spell
11.description: A percentage of the melee damage on your equipped axes or daggers is also applied as spell damage for the Blood Eruption.

12.name: Flay More Spell Damage Per 100 Max Mana
12.description:
Flay and all skills triggered by its skill tree deal more spell damage per 100 maximum mana. 
Flay has additional mana cost.

13.name: Flay Chaos Bolt Chance Per Max Mana
13.description:
Directly using Flay and hitting at least one enemy with the melee attack has a chance per 1 maximum mana to release a {Chaos Bolt} towards an enemy.
This effect consumes 2 mana per Chaos Bolt released.

14.name: Flay Crit Chance And Leech
14.description: Flay has additional critical strike chance, and leeches a percentage of damage dealt as health.

15.name: Flay Marrow Shards On Crit
15.description:
Flay has additional critical strike multiplier.
Critically hitting at least one enemy with Flay's melee attack has a chance to release Marrow Shards towards another nearby enemy within 6 meters.

16.name: Flay Exposed Flesh
16.description: Flay inflicts {Exposed Flesh} on hit, a Curse which reduces cold resistance and armor, and increases the target's chance to be frozen.

17.name: Flay Blood Eruption More Damage Per Curse
17.description: Blood Eruption has increased area of effect and deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each of your curses that were on the enemy.

18.name: Flay Eruption Casts Wandering Spirit
18.description: Blood Eruption consumes mana to release a Wandering Spirit. This effect can trigger a limited number of times per 4 seconds.

20.name: Flay Blood Eruption Spreads Bleeds
20.description: Blood Eruption spreads all bleeds on that enemy to a limited amount of other enemies within its range.

23.name: Flay Bleed And Bleed Duration
23.description: Flay has a chance to inflict bleed on hit, and bleeds inflicted by Flay have increased duration.

27.name: Flay More Hit To Chilled Or Frozen
27.description:
Flay deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to chilled or frozen enemies.

Flay has additional freeze rate per active skeleton or bone golem.

28.name: Flay Spectral Strike On Normal Enemy Hit
28.description: If you directly use Flay and hit at least one enemy, but do not hit a boss or rare enemy, a spectral copy of Flay strikes a random nearby boss or rare enemy.

29.name: Flay Spectral Strike On Any Enemy Hit
29.description:
Directly using Flay and hitting at least one enemy has a chance to trigger a spectral copy of Flay against a nearby enemy if one would not be triggered otherwise.

Spectral copies of Flay have increased area of effect.

30.name: Flay Consume Health And Ward For Melee And Spell Damage
30.description: Directly using Flay consumes a percentage of your current health and ward. Flay gains additional melee damage per 30 health consumed and additional spell damage per 30 ward consumed by this effect, up to a limited amount of each.

32.name: Flay Hits Reduce CD Reaper Form And Reap
32.description:
Flay deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Directly using Flay and hitting at least one enemy reduces the remaining cooldown of Reaper Form by a percentage. This can occur a limited number of times per use of Reaper Form or Reap.

24.name: Flay Bleed Chance And Dot Damage
24.description:
Flay has a chance to inflict bleed on hit, and Flay deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

Flay has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).

22.name: Flay Traversal Mode
22.description: Flay is now a traversal skill with a cooldown. The Spirit Step can move you from a much further distance and no longer requires a target.

25.name: Flay No Spirit Step
25.description: The Spirit Step is removed, and Flay has increased attack speed.

26.name: Flay Only Blood Eruption
26.description:
Flay's melee attack is removed. Flay becomes a spell that directly creates the Blood Eruption, and is now affected by cast speed instead of attack speed.

Any modifiers to Flay's attack speed in its skill tree instead apply to cast speed.

33.name: Flay Cold Conversion
33.description:
Flay's base damage is converted to cold and it now has a chance to freeze. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to frostbite chance.

This node has no effect if {Soul Ripper} is allocated.

34.name: Flay Necrotic Conversion
34.description:
Flay's base damage is converted to necrotic. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.

Bleed chance from all sources is converted to damned chance.

35.name: Flay Poison Conversion
35.description:
Bleed chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

This node has no effect if {Soul Ripper} or {Frostblight} are allocated.

36.name: Flay Blood Revelry Stack
36.description:
When you create a {Blood Eruption}, you gain a stack of {Blood Revelry}, up to 5. Direct uses of Harvest or Rip Blood can consume a stack of Blood Revelry to deal more damage and gain increased area of effect.

Blood Eruptions have a significantly reduced delay before erupting.

38.name: Flay More Melee Damage Less Attack Speed
38.description:
Flay deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a lower mana cost.

Flay has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers).
